sābhavat tatra gaṅgāyāṃ tasmāt tannāmato nadī 
revatīti samākhyātā rūpasaubhāgyadāyinī

punar darbhaiś ca vividhair abhiṣekaṃ cakāra saḥ 
puṇyarūpatvasaṃsiddhyai vidarbhā tad abhūn nadī

śraddhayā saṃgame snātvā revatīgaṅgayor naraḥ 
sarvapāpavinirmukto viṣṇuloke mahīyate

tathā vidarbhāgautamyoḥ saṃgame śraddhayā mune 
snānaṃ karoty asau yāti bhuktiṃ muktiṃ ca tatkṣaṇāt

ubhayos tīrayos tatra tīrthānāṃ śatam uttamam 
sarvapāpakṣayakaraṃ sarvasiddhipradāyakam

pūrṇatīrtham iti khyātaṃ gaṅgāyā uttare taṭe 
tatra snātvā naro 'jñānāt tathāpi śubham āpnuyāt

pūrṇatīrthasya māhātmyaṃ varṇyate kena jantunā 
svayaṃ saṃsthīyate yatra cakriṇā ca pinākinā

purā dhanvantarir nāma kalpādāv āyuṣaḥ sutaḥ 
iṣṭvā bahuvidhair yajñair aśvamedhapuraḥsaraiḥ

dattvā dānāny anekāni bhuktvā bhogāṃś ca puṣkalān 
vijñāya bhogavaiṣamyaṃ paraṃ vairāgyam āśritaḥ

giriśṛṅge 'mbudheḥ pāre tathā gaṅgānadītaṭe 
śivaviṣṇvor gṛhe vāpi viśeṣāt puṇyasaṃgame

taptaṃ hutaṃ ca japtaṃ ca sarvam akṣayatāṃ vrajet 
dhanvantarir iti jñātvā tatra tepe tapo mahat

jñānavairāgyasaṃpanno bhīmeśacaraṇāśrayaḥ 
tapaś cakāra vipulaṃ gaṅgāsāgarasaṃgame

purā ca nikṛto rājñā raṇaṃ hitvā mahāsuraḥ 
sahasram ekaṃ varṣāṇāṃ samudraṃ prāviśad bhayāt

dhanvantarau vanaṃ prāpte rājyaṃ prāpte tu tatsute 
virāgaṃ ca gate rājñi tataḥ prāyād athārṇavāt

tapasyantaṃ tamo nāma balavān asuro mune 
gaṅgātīraṃ samāśritya rājā dhanvantarir yataḥ

japahomarato nityaṃ brahmajñānaparāyaṇaḥ 
taṃ ripuṃ nāśayāmīti tamaḥ prāyād athārṇavāt

nāśito bahuśo 'nena rājñā balavatā tv aham 
taṃ ripuṃ nāśayāmīti tamaḥ prāyād athārṇavāt

māyayā pramadārūpaṃ kṛtvā rājānam abhyagāt 
nṛtyagītavatī subhrūr hasantī cārudarśanā

tāṃ dṛṣṭvā cārusarvāṅgīṃ bahukālaṃ nayānvitām 
śāntām anuvratāṃ bhaktāṃ kṛpayā cābravīn nṛpaḥ

kāsi tvaṃ kasya hetor vā vartase gahane vane 
kaṃ dṛṣṭvā harṣasīva tvaṃ vada kalyāṇi pṛcchate
pramadā cāpi tadvākyaṃ śrutvā rājānam abravīt

tvayi tiṣṭhati ko loke hetur harṣasya me bhavet 
aham indrasya yā lakṣmīs tvāṃ dṛṣṭvā kāmasaṃbhṛtam

harṣāc carāmi purato rājaṃs tava punaḥ punaḥ 
agaṇyapuṇyavirahād ahaṃ sarvasya durlabhā

etad vaco niśamyāśu tapas tyaktvā suduṣkaram 
tām eva manasā dhyāyaṃs tanniṣṭhas tatparāyaṇaḥ

tadekaśaraṇo rājā babhūva sa yadā tamaḥ 
antardhānaṃ gato brahman nāśayitvā tapo bṛhat

etasminn antare 'haṃ vai varān dātuṃ samabhyagām 
taṃ dṛṣṭvā vihvalībhūtaṃ tapobhraṣṭaṃ yathā mṛtam

tam āśvāsyātha vividhair hetubhir nṛpasattamam 
tava śatrus tamo nāma kṛtvā tāṃ tapasaś cyutim

caritārtho gato rājan na tvaṃ śocitum arhasi 
ānandayanti pramadās tāpayanti ca mānavam

sarvā eva viśeṣeṇa kim u māyāmayī tu sā 
tataḥ kṛtāñjalī rājā mām āha vigatabhramaḥ
kiṃ karomi kathaṃ brahmaṃs tapasaḥ pāram āpnuyām

tatas tasyottaraṃ prādāṃ devadevaṃ janārdanam 
stuhi sarvaprayatnena tataḥ siddhim avāpsyasi

sa hy aśeṣajagatsraṣṭā vedavedyaḥ purātanaḥ 
sarvārthasiddhidaḥ puṃsāṃ nānyo 'sti bhuvanatraye

sa jagāma nagaśreṣṭhaṃ himavantaṃ nṛpottamaḥ 
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā viṣṇuṃ tuṣṭāva bhaktitaḥ

jaya viṣṇo jayācintya jaya jiṣṇo jayācyuta 
jaya gopāla lakṣmīśa jaya kṛṣṇa jaganmaya

jaya bhūtapate nātha jaya pannagaśāyine 
jaya sarvaga govinda jaya viśvakṛte namaḥ

jaya viśvabhuje deva jaya viśvadhṛte namaḥ 
jayeśa sadasat tvaṃ vai jaya mādhava dharmiṇe

jaya kāmada kāma tvaṃ jaya rāma guṇārṇava 
jaya puṣṭida puṣṭīśa jaya kalyāṇadāyine

jaya bhūtapa bhūteśa jaya mānavidhāyine 
jaya karmada karma tvaṃ jaya pītāmbaracchada

jaya sarveśa sarvas tvaṃ jaya maṅgalarūpiṇe 
jaya sattvādhināthāya jaya vedavide namaḥ

jaya janmada janmistha paramātman namo 'stu te 
jaya muktida muktis tvaṃ jaya bhuktida keśava

jaya lokada lokeśa jaya pāpavināśana 
jaya vatsala bhaktānāṃ jaya cakradhṛte namaḥ

jaya mānada mānas tvaṃ jaya lokanamaskṛta 
jaya dharmada dharmas tvaṃ jaya saṃsārapāraga

jaya annada annaṃ tvaṃ jaya vācaspate namaḥ 
jaya śaktida śaktis tvaṃ jaya jaitravaraprada

jaya yajñada yajñas tvaṃ jaya padmadalekṣaṇa 
jaya dānada dānaṃ tvaṃ jaya kaiṭabhasūdana

jaya kīrtida kīrtis tvaṃ jaya mūrtida mūrtidhṛk 
jaya saukhyada saukhyātmañ jaya pāvanapāvana

jaya śāntida śāntis tvaṃ jaya śaṃkarasaṃbhava 
jaya pānada pānas tvaṃ jaya jyotiḥsvarūpiṇe

jaya vāmana vitteśa jaya dhūmapatākine 
jaya sarvasya jagato dātṛmūrte namo 'stu te

tvam eva lokatrayavartijīva nikāyasaṃkleśavināśadakṣa
śrīpuṇḍarīkākṣa kṛpānidhe tvaṃ nidhehi pāṇiṃ mama mūrdhni viṣṇo

evaṃ stuvantaṃ bhagavāñ śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ 
vareṇa cchandayām āsa sarvakāmasamṛddhidaḥ

dhanvantariḥ prītamanā varadānena cakriṇaḥ 
varadānāya deveśaṃ govindaṃ saṃsthitaṃ puraḥ

tam āha nṛpatiḥ prahvaḥ surarājyaṃ mamepsitam 
tac ca dattaṃ tvayā viṣṇo prāpto 'smi kṛtakṛtyatām

stutaḥ saṃpūjito viṣṇus tatraivāntaradhīyata 
tathaiva tridaśeśatvam avāpa nṛpatiḥ kramāt

prāgarjitānekakarmaparipākavaśāt tataḥ 
triḥkṛtvo nāśam agamat sahasrākṣaḥ svakāt padāt

nahuṣād vṛtrahatyāyāḥ sindhusenavadhāt tataḥ 
ahalyāyāṃ ca gamanād yena kena ca hetunā

smāraṃ smāraṃ tat tad indraś cintāsaṃtāpadurmanāḥ 
tataḥ surapatiḥ prāha vācaspatim idaṃ vacaḥ

hetunā kena vāgīśa bhraṣṭarājyo bhavāmy aham 
madhye madhye padabhraṃśād varaṃ niḥśrīkatā nṛṇām

gahanāṃ karmaṇāṃ jīvagatiṃ ko vetti tattvataḥ 
rahasyaṃ sarvabhāvānāṃ jñātuṃ nānyaḥ pragalbhate

bṛhaspatir hariṃ prāha brahmāṇaṃ pṛccha gaccha tam 
sa tu jānāti yad bhūtaṃ bhaviṣyac cāpi vartanam

sa tu vakṣyati yenedaṃ jātaṃ tac ca mahāmate 
tāv āgatya mahāprājñau namaskṛtya mamāntikam 
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā mām ūcatur idaṃ vacaḥ

bhagavan kena doṣeṇa śacībhartā udāradhīḥ 
rājyāt prabhraśyate nātha saṃśayaṃ chettum arhasi

tadāham abravaṃ brahmaṃś ciraṃ dhyātvā bṛhaspatim 
khaṇḍadharmākhyadoṣeṇa tena rājyapadāc cyutaḥ

deśakālādidoṣeṇa śraddhāmantraviparyayāt 
yathāvaddakṣiṇādānād asaddravyapradānataḥ

devabhūdevatāvajñāpātakāc ca viśeṣataḥ 
yat khaṇḍatvaṃ svadharmasya dehinām upajāyate

tenātimānasas tāpaḥ padahāniś ca dustyajā 
kṛto 'pi dharmo 'niṣṭāya jāyate kṣubdhacetasā

kāryasya na bhavet siddhyai tasmād avyākulāya ca 
asaṃpūrṇe svadharme hi kim aniṣṭaṃ na jāyate

tābhyāṃ yat pūrvavṛttāntaṃ tad apy uktaṃ mayānagha 
āyuṣas tu sutaḥ śrīmān dhanvantarir udāradhīḥ

tamasā ca kṛtaṃ vighnaṃ viṣṇunā tac ca nāśitam 
pūrvajanmasu vṛttāntam ityādi parikīrtitam
tac chrutvā vismitau cobhau mām eva punar ūcatuḥ
taddoṣapratibandhas tu kena syāt surasattama

punar dhyātvā tāv avadaṃ śrūyatāṃ doṣakārakam 
kāraṇaṃ sarvasiddhīnāṃ duḥkhasaṃsāratāraṇam

śaraṇaṃ taptacittānāṃ nirvāṇaṃ jīvatām api 
gatvā tu gautamīṃ devīṃ stūyetāṃ hariśaṃkarau

nopāyo 'nyo 'sti saṃśuddhyai tau tāṃ hitvā jagattraye 
tadaiva jagmatur ubhau gautamīṃ munisattama 
snātau kṛtakṣaṇau cobhau devau tuṣṭuvatur mudā

namo matsyāya kūrmāya varāhāya namo namaḥ 
narasiṃhāya devāya vāmanāya namo namaḥ

namo 'stu hayarūpāya trivikrama namo 'stu te 
namo 'stu buddharūpāya rāmarūpāya kalkine

anantāyācyutāyeśa jāmadagnyāya te namaḥ 
varuṇendrasvarūpāya yamarūpāya te namaḥ

parameśāya devāya namas trailokyarūpiṇe 
bibhratsarasvatīṃ vaktre sarvajño 'si namo 'stu te

lakṣmīvān asy ato lakṣmīṃ bibhrad vakṣasi cānagha 
bahubāhūrupādas tvaṃ bahukarṇākṣiśīrṣakaḥ 
tvām eva sukhinaṃ prāpya bahavaḥ sukhino 'bhavan

tāvan niḥśrīkatā puṃsāṃ mālinyaṃ dainyam eva vā 
yāvan na yānti śaraṇaṃ hare tvāṃ karuṇārṇavam

sūkṣmaṃ paraṃ jotir anantarūpam oṃkāramātraṃ prakṛteḥ paraṃ yat
cidrūpam ānandamayaṃ samastam evaṃ vadantīśa mumukṣavas tvām

ārādhayanty atra bhavantam īśaṃ mahāmakhaiḥ pañcabhir apy akāmāḥ
saṃsārasindhoḥ param āptakāmā viśanti divyaṃ bhuvanaṃ vapus te

sarveṣu sattveṣu samatvabuddhyā saṃvīkṣya ṣaṭsūrmiṣu śāntabhāvāḥ
jñānena te karmaphalāni hitvā dhyānena te tvāṃ praviśanti śaṃbho

na jātidharmāṇi na vedaśāstraṃ na dhyānayogo na samādhidharmaḥ
rudraṃ śivaṃ śaṃkaraṃ śānticittaṃ bhaktyā devaṃ somam ahaṃ namasye

mūrkho 'pi śaṃbho tava pādabhaktyā samāpnuyān muktimayīṃ tanuṃ te
jñāneṣu yajñeṣu tapaḥsu caiva dhyāneṣu homeṣu mahāphaleṣu

saṃpannam etat phalam uttamaṃ yat someśvare bhaktir aharniśaṃ yat
sarvasya jīvasya sadā priyasya phalasya dṛṣṭasya tathā śrutasya

svargasya mokṣasya jagannivāsa sopānapaṅktis tava bhaktir eṣā
tvatpādasaṃprāptiphalāptaye tu sopānapaṅktiṃ na vadanti dhīrāḥ

tasmād dayālo mama bhaktir astu naivāsty upāyas tava rūpasevā
ātmīyam ālokya mahattvam īśa pāpeṣu cāsmāsu kuru prasādam

sthūlaṃ ca sūkṣmaṃ tvam anādi nityaṃ pitā ca mātā yad asac ca sac ca
evaṃ stuto yaḥ śrutibhiḥ purāṇair namāmi someśvaram īśitāram
tataḥ prītau hariharāv ūcatus tridaśeśvarau
vriyatāṃ yan manobhīṣṭaṃ yad varaṃ cātidurlabham

indraḥ prāha sureśānaṃ madrājyaṃ tu punaḥ punaḥ 
jāyate bhraśyate caiva tat pāpam upaśāmyatām

yathā sthiro 'haṃ rājye syāṃ sarvaṃ syān niścalaṃ mama 
suprītau yadi deveśau sarvaṃ syān niścalaṃ sadā

tatheti harivākyaṃ tāv abhinandyedam ūcatuḥ 
paraṃ prasādam āpannau tāv ālokya smitānanau

nirapāyanirādhāranirvikārasvarūpiṇau 
śaraṇyau sarvalokānāṃ bhuktimuktipradāv ubhau

tridaivatyaṃ mahātīrthaṃ gautamī vāñchitapradā 
tasyām anena mantreṇa kurutāṃ snānam ādarāt

abhiṣekaṃ mahendrasya maṅgalāya bṛhaspatiḥ 
karotu saṃsmarann āvāṃ saṃpadāṃ sthairyasiddhaye

iha janmani pūrvasmin yat kiṃcit sukṛtaṃ kṛtam 
tat sarvaṃ pūrṇatām etu godāvari namo 'stu te

evaṃ smṛtvā tu yaḥ kaścid gautamyāṃ snānam ācaret 
āvābhyāṃ tu prasādena dharmaḥ saṃpūrṇatām iyāt 
pūrvajanmakṛtād doṣāt sa muktaḥ puṇyavān bhavet

tatheti cakratuḥ prītau surendradhiṣaṇau tataḥ 
mahābhiṣekam indrasya cakāra dyusadāṃ guruḥ

tenābhūd yā nadī puṇyā maṅgalety uditā tu sā 
tayā ca saṃgamaḥ puṇyo gaṅgāyāḥ śubhadas tv asau

indreṇa saṃstuto viṣṇuḥ pratyakṣo 'bhūj jaganmayaḥ 
trilokasaṃmitāṃ śakro bhūmiṃ lebhe jagatpateḥ

tannāmnā cāpi vikhyāto govinda iti tatra ca 
trilokasaṃmitā labdhā tena gaur vajradhāriṇā

dattā ca hariṇā tatra govindas tad abhūd dhariḥ 
trailokyarājyaṃ yat prāptaṃ hariṇā ca harer mune

niścalaṃ yena saṃjātaṃ devadevān maheśvarāt 
bṛhaspatir devagurur yatrāstauṣīn maheśvaram

rājyasya sthirabhāvāya devendrasya mahātmanaḥ 
siddheśvaras tatra devo liṅgaṃ tu tridaśārcitam

tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ govindam iti viśrutam 
maṅgalāsaṃgamaṃ caiva pūrṇatīrthaṃ tataḥ param

indratīrtham iti khyātaṃ bārhaspatyaṃ ca viśrutam 
yatra siddheśvaro devo viṣṇur govinda eva ca

teṣu snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca yat kiṃcit sukṛtārjanam 
sarvaṃ tad akṣayaṃ vidyāt pitṝṇām ativallabham

śṛṇoti yaś cāpi paṭhed yaś ca smarati nityaśaḥ 
tasya tīrthasya māhātmyaṃ bhraṣṭarājyapradāyakam

saptatriṃśat sahasrāṇi tīrthānāṃ tīrayor dvayoḥ 
ubhayor muniśārdūla sarvasiddhipradāyinām

na pūrṇatīrthasadṛśaṃ tīrtham asti mahāphalam 
niṣphalaṃ tasya janmādi yo na seveta tan naraḥ

rāmatīrtham iti khyātaṃ bhrūṇahatyāvināśanam 
tasya śravaṇamātreṇa sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate

ikṣvākuvaṃśaprabhavaḥ kṣatriyo lokaviśrutaḥ 
balavān matimāñ śūro yathā śakraḥ puraṃdaraḥ

pitṛpaitāmahaṃ rājyaṃ kurvann āste yathā baliḥ 
tasya tisro mahiṣyaḥ syū rājño daśarathasya hi

kauśalyā ca sumitrā ca kaikeyī ca mahāmate 
etāḥ kulīnāḥ subhagā rūpalakṣaṇasaṃyutāḥ

tasmin rājani rājye tu sthite 'yodhyāpatau mune 
vasiṣṭhe brahmavicchreṣṭhe purodhasi viśeṣataḥ

na ca vyādhir na durbhikṣaṃ na cāvṛṣṭir na cādhayaḥ 
brahmakṣatraviśāṃ nityaṃ śūdrāṇāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ

āśramāṇāṃ tu sarveṣām ānando 'bhūt pṛthak pṛthak 
tasmiñ śāsati rājendra ikṣvākūṇāṃ kulodvahe

devānāṃ dānavānāṃ tu rājyārthe vigraho 'bhavat 
kvāpi tatra jayaṃ prāpur devāḥ kvāpi tathetare

evaṃ pravartamāne tu trailokyam atipīḍitam 
abhūn nārada tatrāham avadaṃ daityadānavān

devāṃś cāpi viśeṣeṇa na kṛtaṃ tair madīritam 
punaś ca saṃgaras teṣāṃ babhūva sumahān mithaḥ

viṣṇuṃ gatvā surāḥ procus tatheśānaṃ jaganmayam 
tāv ūcatur ubhau devān asurān daityadānavān

tapasā balino yāntu punaḥ kurvantu saṃgaram 
tathety āhur yayuḥ sarve tapase niyatavratāḥ

yayus tu rākṣasān devāḥ punas te matsarānvitāḥ 
devānāṃ dānavānāṃ ca saṃgaro 'bhūt sudāruṇaḥ

na tatra devā jetāro naiva daityāś ca dānavāḥ 
saṃyuge vartamāne tu vāg uvācāśarīriṇī
yeṣāṃ daśaratho rājā te jetāro na cetare

iti śrutvā jayāyobhau jagmatur devadānavau 
tatra vāyus tvaran prāpto rājānam avadat tadā

āgantavyaṃ tvayā rājan devadānavasaṃgare 
yatra rājā daśaratho jayas tatreti viśrutam
tasmāt tvaṃ devapakṣe syā bhaveyur jayinaḥ surāḥ

tad vāyuvacanaṃ śrutvā rājā daśaratho nṛpaḥ 
āgamyate mayā satyaṃ gaccha vāyo yathāsukham

gate vāyau tadā daityā ājagmur bhūpatiṃ prati 
te 'py ūcur bhagavann asmatsāhāyyaṃ kartum arhasi

rājan daśaratha śrīman vijayas tvayi saṃsthitaḥ 
tasmāt tvaṃ vai daityapateḥ sāhāyyaṃ kartum arhasi

tataḥ provāca nṛpatir vāyunā prārthitaḥ purā 
pratijñātaṃ mayā tac ca yāntu daityāś ca dānavāḥ

sa tu rājā tathā cakre gatvā caiva triviṣṭapam 
yuddhaṃ cakre tathā daityair dānavaiḥ saha rākṣasaiḥ

paśyatsu devasaṃgheṣu namucer bhrātaras tadā 
vividhur niśitair bāṇair athākṣaṃ nṛpates tathā

bhinnākṣaṃ taṃ rathaṃ rājā na jānāti sa saṃbhramāt 
rājāntike sthitā subhrūḥ kaikeyyājñāyi nārada

na jñāpitaṃ tayā rājñe svayam ālokya suvratā 
bhagnam akṣaṃ samālakṣya cakre hastaṃ tadā svakam

akṣavan muniśārdūla tad etan mahad adbhutam 
rathena rathināṃ śreṣṭhas tayā dattakareṇa ca

jitavān daityadanujān devaiḥ prāpya varān bahūn 
tato devair anujñātas tv ayodhyāṃ punar abhyagāt

sa tu madhye mahārājo mārge vīkṣya tadā priyām 
kaikeyyāḥ karma tad dṛṣṭvā vismayaṃ paramaṃ gataḥ

tatas tasyai varān prādāt trīṃs tu nārada sā api 
anumānya nṛpaproktaṃ kaikeyī vākyam abravīt
tvayi tiṣṭhantu rājendra tvayā dattā varā amī

vibhūṣaṇāni rājendro dattvā sa priyayā saha 
rathena vijayī rājā yayau svanagaraṃ sukhī

yoṣitāṃ kim adeyaṃ hi priyāṇām ucitāgame 
sa kadācid daśaratho mṛgayāśīlibhir vṛtaḥ

aṭann araṇye śarvaryāṃ vāribandham athākarot 
saptavyasanahīnena bhavitavyaṃ tu bhūbhujā

iti jānann api ca tac cakāra tu vidher vaśāt 
gartaṃ praviśya pānārtham āgatān niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ

mṛgān hanti mahābāhuḥ śṛṇu kālaviparyayam 
gartaṃ praviṣṭe nṛpatau tasminn eva nagottame

vṛddho vaiśravaṇo nāma na śṛṇoti na paśyati 
tasya bhāryā tathābhūtā tāv abrūtāṃ tadā sutam

āvāṃ tṛṣārtau rātriś ca kṛṣṇā cāpi pravartate 
vṛddhānāṃ jīvitaṃ kṛtsnaṃ bālas tvam asi putraka

andhānāṃ badhirāṇāṃ ca vṛddhānāṃ dhik ca jīvitam 
jarājarjaradehānāṃ dhig dhik putraka jīvitam

tāvat puṃbhir jīvitavyaṃ yāval lakṣmīr dṛḍhaṃ vapuḥ 
yāvad ājñāpratihatā tīrthādāv anyathā mṛtiḥ

ity etad vacanaṃ śrutvā vṛddhayor guruvatsalaḥ 
putraḥ provāca tad duḥkhaṃ girā madhurayā haran

mayi jīvati kiṃ nāma yuvayor duḥkham īdṛśam 
na haraty ātmajaḥ pitror yaś caritrair manorujam
tena kiṃ tanujeneha kulodvegavidhāyinā

ity uktvā pitarau natvā tāv āśvāsya mahāmanāḥ 
taruskandhe samāropya vṛddhau ca pitarau tadā

haste gṛhītvā kalaśaṃ jagāma ṛṣiputrakaḥ 
sa ṛṣir na tu rājānaṃ jānāti nṛpatir dvijam

ubhau sarabhasau tatra dvijo vāri samāviśat 
satvaraṃ kalaśe nyubje vāri gṛhṇantam āśugaiḥ

dvijaṃ rājā dvipaṃ matvā vivyādha niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ 
vanadvipo 'pi bhūpānām avadhyas tad vidann api

vivyādha taṃ nṛpaḥ kuryān na kiṃ kiṃ vidhivañcitaḥ 
sa viddho marmadeśe tu duḥkhito vākyam abravīt

kenedaṃ duḥkhadaṃ karma kṛtaṃ sadbrāhmaṇasya me 
maitro brāhmaṇa ity ukto nāparādho 'sti kaścana

tad etad vacanaṃ śrutvā muner ārtasya bhūpatiḥ 
niśceṣṭaś ca nirutsāho śanais taṃ deśam abhyagāt

taṃ tu dṛṣṭvā dvijavaraṃ jvalantam iva tejasā 
asāv apy abhavat tatra saśalya iva mūrcchitaḥ
ātmānam ātmanā kṛtvā sthiraṃ rājābravīd idam

ko bhavān dvijaśārdūla kimartham iha cāgataḥ 
vada pāpakṛte mahyaṃ vada me niṣkṛtiṃ parām

brahmahā varṇibhiḥ kiṃtu śvapacair api jātucit 
na spraṣṭavyo mahābuddhe draṣṭavyo na kadācana
tad rājavacanaṃ śrutvā muniputro 'bravīd vacaḥ

utkramiṣyanti me prāṇā ato vakṣyāmi kiṃcana 
svacchandavṛttitājñāne viddhi pākaṃ ca karmaṇām

ātmārthaṃ tu na śocāmi vṛddhau tu pitarau mama 
tayoḥ śuśrūṣakaḥ kaḥ syād andhayor ekaputrayoḥ

vinā mayā mahāraṇye kathaṃ tau jīvayiṣyataḥ 
mamābhāgyam aho kīdṛk pitṛśuśrūṣaṇe kṣatiḥ

jātā me 'dya vinā prāṇair hā vidhe kiṃ kṛtaṃ tvayā 
tathāpi gaccha tatra tvaṃ gṛhītakalaśas tvaran
tābhyāṃ dehy udapānaṃ tvaṃ yathā tau na mariṣyataḥ

ity evaṃ bruvatas tasya gatāḥ prāṇā mahāvane 
visṛjya saśaraṃ cāpam ādāya kalaśaṃ nṛpaḥ

tatrāgāt sa tu vegena yatra vṛddhau mahāvane 
vṛddhau cāpi tadā rātrau tāv anyonyaṃ samūcatuḥ

udvignaḥ kupito vā syād athavā bhakṣitaḥ katham 
na prāptaś cāvayor yaṣṭiḥ kiṃ kurmaḥ kā gatir bhavet

na kopi tādṛśaḥ putro vidyate sacarācare 
yaḥ pitror anyathā vākyaṃ na karoty api ninditaḥ

vajrād api kaṭhoraṃ vā jīvitaṃ tam apaśyatoḥ 
śīghraṃ na yānti yat prāṇās tadekāyattajīvayoḥ

evaṃ bahuvidhā vāco vṛddhayor vadator vane 
tadā daśaratho rājā śanais taṃ deśam abhyagāt
pādasaṃcāraśabdena menāte sutam āgatam

kuto vatsa cirāt prāptas tvaṃ dṛṣṭis tvaṃ parāyaṇam 
na brūṣe kiṃtu ruṣṭo 'si vṛddhayor andhayoḥ sutaḥ

saśalya iva duḥkhārtaḥ śocan duṣkṛtam ātmanaḥ 
sa bhīta iva rājendras tāv uvācātha nārada

udapānaṃ ca kurutāṃ tac chrutvā nṛpabhāṣitam 
nāyaṃ vaktā suto 'smākaṃ ko bhavāṃs tat purā vada
paścāt pibāvaḥ pānīyaṃ tato rājābravīc ca tau
tatra tiṣṭhati vāṃ putro yatra vārisamāśrayaḥ

tac chrutvocatur ārtau tau satyaṃ brūhi na cānyathā 
ācacakṣe tato rājā sarvam eva yathātatham

tatas tu patitau vṛddhau tatrāvāṃ naya mā spṛśa 
brahmaghnasparśanaṃ pāpaṃ na kadācid vinaśyati

ninye vai śravaṇaṃ vṛddhaṃ sabhāryaṃ nṛpasattamaḥ 
yatrāsau patitaḥ putras taṃ spṛṣṭvā tau vilepatuḥ

yathā putraviyogena mṛtyur nau vihitas tathā 
tvaṃ cāpi pāpa putrasya viyogān mṛtyum āpsyasi

evaṃ tu jalpator brahman gatāḥ prāṇās tato nṛpaḥ 
agninā yojayām āsa vṛddhau ca ṛṣiputrakam

tato jagāma nagaraṃ duḥkhito nṛpatir mune 
vasiṣṭhāya ca tat sarvaṃ nyavedayad aśeṣataḥ

nṛpāṇāṃ sūryavaṃśyānāṃ vasiṣṭho hi parā gatiḥ 
vasiṣṭho 'pi dvijaśreṣṭhaiḥ saṃmantryāha ca niṣkṛtim

gālavaṃ vāmadevaṃ ca jābālim atha kaśyapam 
etān anyān samāhūya hayamedhāya yatnataḥ
yajasva hayamedhaiś ca bahubhir bahudakṣiṇaiḥ

akarod dhayamedhāṃś ca rājā daśaratho dvijaiḥ 
etasminn antare tatra vāg uvācāśarīriṇī

pūtaṃ śarīram abhavad rājño daśarathasya hi 
vyavahāryaś ca bhavitā bhaviṣyanti tathā sutāḥ 
jyeṣṭhaputraprasādena rājāpāpo bhaviṣyati

tato bahutithe kāle ṛṣyaśṛṅgān munīśvarāt 
devānāṃ kāryasiddhyarthaṃ sutā āsan suropamāḥ

kauśalyāyāṃ tathā rāmaḥ sumitrāyāṃ ca lakṣmaṇaḥ 
śatrughnaś cāpi kaikeyyāṃ bharato matimattaraḥ

te sarve matimantaś ca priyā rājño vaśe sthitāḥ 
taṃ rājānam ṛṣiḥ prāpya viśvāmitraḥ prajāpatiḥ

rāmaṃ ca lakṣmaṇaṃ cāpi ayācata mahāmate 
yajñasaṃrakṣaṇārthāya jñātatanmahimā muniḥ
ciraprāptasuto vṛddho rājā naivety abhāṣata

mahatā daivayogena kathaṃcid vārdhake mune 
jātāv ānandasaṃdohadāyakau mama bālakau
saśarīram idaṃ rājyaṃ dāsye naiva sutāv imau
vasiṣṭhena tadā prokto rājā daśarathas tv iti
raghavaḥ prārthanābhaṅgaṃ na rājan kvāpi śikṣitāḥ
rāmaṃ ca lakṣmaṇaṃ caiva kathaṃcid avadan nṛpaḥ
viśvāmitrasya brahmarṣeḥ kurutāṃ yajñarakṣaṇam

vadann iti sutau soṣṇaṃ niśvasan glapitādharaḥ 
putrau samarpayām āsa viśvāmitrasya śāstrakṛt

tathety uktvā daśarathaṃ namasya ca punaḥ punaḥ 
jagmatū rakṣaṇārthāya viśvāmitreṇa tau mudā

tataḥ prahṛṣṭaḥ sa munir mudā prādāt tadobhayoḥ 
māheśvarīṃ mahāvidyāṃ dhanurvidyāpuraḥsarām

śāstrīm āstrīṃ laukikīṃ ca rathavidyāṃ gajodbhavām 
aśvavidyāṃ gadāvidyāṃ mantrāhvānavisarjane

sarvavidyām athāvāpya ubhau tau rāmalakṣmaṇau 
vanaukasāṃ hitārthāya jaghnatus tāṭakāṃ vane

ahalyāṃ śāpanirmuktāṃ pādasparśāc ca cakratuḥ 
yajñavidhvaṃsanāyātāñ jaghnatus tatra rākṣasān

kṛtavidyau dhanuṣpāṇī cakratur yajñarakṣaṇam 
tato mahāmakhe vṛtte viśvāmitro munīśvaraḥ

putrābhyāṃ sahito rājño janakaṃ draṣṭum abhyagāt 
citrām adarśayat tatra rājamadhye nṛpātmajaḥ

rāmaḥ saumitrisahito dhanurvidyāṃ guror matām 
tatprīto janakaḥ prādāt sītāṃ lakṣmīm ayonijām

tathaiva lakṣmaṇasyāpi bharatasyānujasya ca 
śatrughnabharatādīnāṃ vasiṣṭhādimate sthitaḥ

rājā daśarathaḥ śrīmān vivāham akaron mune 
tato bahutithe kāle rājyaṃ tasya prayacchati

nṛpatau sarvalokānām anumatyā guror api 
mantharātmakadurdaivapreritā matsarākulā

kaikeyī vighnam ātasthe vanapravrājanaṃ tathā 
bharatasya ca tad rājyaṃ rājā naiva ca dattavān

pitaraṃ satyavākyaṃ taṃ kurvan rāmo mahāvanam 
viveśa sītayā sārdhaṃ tathā saumitriṇā saha

satāṃ ca mānasaṃ śuddhaṃ sa viveśa svakair guṇaiḥ 
tasmin vinirgate rāme vanavāsāya dīkṣite

samaṃ lakṣmaṇasītābhyāṃ rājyatṛṣṇāvivarjite 
taṃ rāmaṃ cāpi saumitriṃ sītāṃ ca guṇaśālinīm

duḥkhena mahatāviṣṭo brahmaśāpaṃ ca saṃsmaran 
tadā daśaratho rājā prāṇāṃs tatyāja duḥkhitaḥ

kṛtakarmavipākena rājā nīto yamānugaiḥ 
tasmai rājñe mahāprājña yāvat sthāvarajaṅgame

yamasadmany anekāni tāmisrādīni nārada 
narakāṇy atha ghorāṇi bhīṣaṇāni bahūni ca

tatra kṣiptas tadā rājā narakeṣu pṛthak pṛthak 
pacyate chidyate rājā piṣyate cūrṇyate tathā

śoṣyate daśyate bhūyo dahyate ca nimajjyate 
evamādiṣu ghoreṣu narakeṣu sa pacyate

rāmo 'pi gacchann adhvānaṃ citrakūṭam athāgamat 
tatraiva trīṇi varṣāṇi vyatītāni mahāmate

punaḥ sa dakṣiṇām āśām ākrāmad daṇḍakaṃ vanam 
vikhyātaṃ triṣu lokeṣu deśānāṃ tad dhi puṇyadam

prāviśat tan mahāraṇyaṃ bhīṣaṇaṃ daityasevitam 
tadbhayād ṛṣibhis tyaktaṃ hatvā daityāṃs tu rākṣasān

vicaran daṇḍakāraṇye ṛṣisevyam athākarot 
tatredaṃ vṛttam ākhyāsye śṛṇu nārada yatnataḥ

tāvac chanais tv agād rāmo yāvad yojanapañcakam 
gautamīṃ samanuprāpto rājāpi narake sthitaḥ

yamaḥ svakiṃkarān āha rāmo daśarathātmajaḥ 
gautamīm abhito yāti pitaraṃ tasya dhīmataḥ

ākarṣantv atha rājānaṃ narakān nātra saṃśayaḥ 
uttīrya gautamīṃ yāti yāvad yojanapañcakam

rāmas tāvat tasya pitā narake naiva pacyatām 
yad etan madvacaḥ puṇyaṃ na kuryur yadi dūtakāḥ

tataś ca narake ghore yūyaṃ sarve nimajjatha 
yā kāpy uktā parā śaktiḥ śivasya samavāyinī

tām eva gautamīṃ santo vadanty ambhaḥsvarūpiṇīm 
haribrahmamaheśānāṃ mānyā vandyā ca saiva yat

nistīryate na kenāpi tad atikramajaṃ tv agham 
pāpino 'py ātmajaḥ kaścid yaś ca gaṅgām anusmaret

so 'nekadurganirayān nirgato muktatāṃ vrajet 
kiṃ punas tādṛśaḥ putro gautamīnikaṭe sthitaḥ

yasyāsau narake paktuṃ na kairapi hi śakyate 
dakṣiṇāśāpater vākyaṃ niśamya yamakiṃkarāḥ

narake pacyamānaṃ tam ayodhyādhipatiṃ nṛpam 
uttārya ghoranarakād vacanaṃ cedam abruvan

dhanyo 'si nṛpaśārdūla yasya putraḥ sa tādṛśaḥ 
iha cāmutra viśrāntiḥ suputraḥ kena labhyate
sa viśrāntaḥ śanai rājā kiṃkarān vākyam abravīt

narakeṣv atha ghoreṣu pacyamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ 
kathaṃ tv ākarṣitaḥ śīghraṃ tan me vaktum ihārhatha
tatra kaścic chāntamanā rājānam idam abravīt

vedaśāstrapurāṇādāv etad gopyaṃ prayatnataḥ 
prakāśyate tad api te sāmarthyaṃ putratīrthayoḥ

rāmas tava sutaḥ śrīmān gautamītīram āgataḥ 
tasmāt tvaṃ narakād ghorād ākṛṣṭo 'si narottama

yadi tvāṃ tatra gautamyāṃ smared rāmaḥ salakṣmaṇaḥ 
snānaṃ kṛtvātha piṇḍādi te dadyāt sa nṛpottama 
tatas tvaṃ sarvapāpebhyo mukto yāsi triviṣṭapam

tatra gatvā bhavadvākyam ākhyāsye svasutau prati 
bhavanta eva śaraṇam anujñāṃ dātum arhatha

tad rājavacanaṃ śrutvā kṛpayā yamakiṃkarāḥ 
ājñāṃ ca pradadus tasmai rājā prāgāt sutau prati

bhīṣaṇaṃ yātanādeham āpanno niḥśvasan muhuḥ 
nirīkṣya svaṃ lajjamānaḥ kṛtaṃ karma ca saṃsmaran

svecchayā viharan gaṅgām āsasāda ca rāghavaḥ 
gautamyās taṭam āśritya rāmo lakṣmaṇa eva ca

sītayā saha vaidehyā sasnau caiva yathāvidhi 
naiva tatrābhavad bhojyaṃ bhakṣyaṃ vā gautamītaṭe

taddine tatra vasatāṃ gautamītīravāsinām 
tad dṛṣṭvā duḥkhito bhrātā lakṣmaṇo rāmam abravīt

putrau daśarathasyāvāṃ tavāpi balam īdṛśam 
nāsti bhojyam athāsmākaṃ gaṅgātīranivāsinām

bhrātar yad vihitaṃ karma naiva tac cānyathā bhavet 
pṛthivyām annapūrṇāyāṃ vayam annābhilāṣiṇaḥ

saumitre nūnam asmābhir na brāhmaṇamukhe hutam 
avajñayā mahīdevāṃs tarpayanty arcayanti na

te ye lakṣmaṇa jāyante sarvadaiva bubhukṣitāḥ 
snātvā devān athābhyarcya hotavyaś ca hutāśanaḥ 
tataḥ svasamaye devo vidhāsyaty aśanaṃ tu nau

bhrātroḥ saṃjalpator evaṃ paśyatoḥ karmaṇo gatim 
śanair daśaratho rājā taṃ deśam upajagmivān

taṃ dṛṣṭvā lakṣmaṇaḥ śīghraṃ tiṣṭha tiṣṭheti cābravīt 
dhanur ākṛṣya kopena rakṣas tvaṃ dānavo 'thavā

āsannaṃ ca punar dṛṣṭvā yāhi yāhy atra puṇyabhāk 
rāmo dāśarathī rājā dharmabhāk paśya vartate

gurubhaktaḥ satyasaṃdho devabrāhmaṇasevakaḥ 
trailokyarakṣādakṣo 'sau vartate yatra rāghavaḥ

na tatra tvādṛśām asti praveśaḥ pāpakarmaṇām 
yadi praviśase pāpa tato vadham avāpsyasi

tat putravacanaṃ śrutvā śanair āhūya vācayā 
uvācādhomukho bhūtvā snuṣāṃ putrau kṛtāñjaliḥ 
muhur antar vinidhyāyan gatiṃ duṣkṛtakarmaṇaḥ

ahaṃ daśaratho rājā putrau me śṛṇutaṃ vacaḥ 
tisṛbhir brahmahatyābhir vṛto 'haṃ duḥkham āgataḥ 
chinnaṃ paśyata me dehaṃ narakeṣu ca pātitam

tataḥ kṛtāñjalī rāmaḥ sītayā lakṣmaṇena ca 
bhūmau praṇemus te sarve vacanaṃ caitad abruvan
kasyedaṃ karmaṇas tāta phalaṃ nṛpatisattama
sa ca prāha yathāvṛttaṃ brahmahatyātrayaṃ tathā
niṣkṛtir brahmahantṝṇāṃ putrau kvāpi na vidyate

tato duḥkhena mahatāvṛtāḥ sarve bhuvaṃ gatāḥ 
rājānaṃ vanavāsaṃ ca mātaraṃ pitaraṃ tathā

duḥkhāgamaṃ karmagatiṃ narake pātanaṃ tathā 
evamādy atha saṃsmṛtya mumoha nṛpateḥ sutaḥ 
visaṃjñaṃ nṛpatiṃ dṛṣṭvā sītā vākyam athābravīt

na śocanti mahātmānas tvādṛśā vyasanāgame 
cintayanti pratīkāraṃ daivyam apy atha mānuṣam

śocadbhir yugasāhasraṃ vipattir naiva tīryate 
vyāmoham āpnuvantīha na kadācid vicakṣaṇāḥ

kim anenātra duḥkhena niṣphalena janeśvara 
dehi hatyāṃ prathamato yā jātā hy atibhīṣaṇā

pitṛbhaktaḥ puṇyaśīlo vedavedāṅgapāragaḥ 
anāgā yo hato vipras tatpāpasyātra niṣkṛtim

ācarāmi yathāśāstraṃ mā śokaṃ kurutaṃ yuvām 
dvitīyāṃ lakṣmaṇo hatyāṃ gṛhṇātu tv aparāṃ bhavān

etad dharmayutaṃ vākyaṃ sītayā bhāṣitaṃ dṛḍham 
tatheti cāhatur ubhau tato daśaratho 'bravīt

tvaṃ hi brahmavidaḥ kanyā janakasya tv ayonijā 
bhāryā rāmasya kiṃ citraṃ yad yuktam anubhāṣase

na kopi bhavatāṃ kiṃtu śramaḥ svalpo 'pi vidyate 
gautamyāṃ snānadānena piṇḍanirvapaṇena ca

tisṛbhir brahmahatyābhir mukto yāmi triviṣṭapam 
tvayā janakasaṃbhūte svakulocitam īritam

prāpayanti paraṃ pāraṃ bhavābdheḥ kulayoṣitaḥ 
godāvaryāḥ prasādena kiṃ nāmāsty atra durlabham

tatheti kriyamāṇe tu piṇḍadānāya śatruhā 
naivāpaśyad bhakṣyabhojyaṃ tato lakṣmaṇam abravīt

lakṣmaṇaḥ prāha vinayād iṅgudyāś ca phalāni ca 
santi teṣāṃ ca piṇyākam ānītaṃ tatkṣaṇād iva

piṇyākenātha gaṅgāyāṃ piṇḍaṃ dātuṃ tathā pituḥ 
manaḥ kurvaṃs tato rāmo mando 'bhūd duḥkhitas tadā

daivī vāg abhavat tatra duḥkhaṃ tyaja nṛpātmaja 
rājyabhraṣṭo vanaṃ prāptaḥ kiṃ vai niṣkiṃcano bhavān

aśaṭho dharmanirato na śocitum ihārhasi 
vittaśāṭhyena yo dharmaṃ karoti sa tu pātakī

śrūyate sarvaśāstreṣu yad rāma śṛṇu yatnataḥ 
yadannaḥ puruṣo rājaṃs tadannās tasya devatāḥ

piṇḍe nipatite bhūmau nāpaśyat pitaraṃ tadā 
śavaṃ ca patitaṃ yatra śavatīrtham anuttamam

mahāpātakasaṃghātavighātakṛd anusmṛtiḥ 
tatrāgacchaṃl lokapālā rudrādityās tathāśvinau

svaṃ svaṃ vimānam ārūḍhās teṣāṃ madhye 'tidīptimān 
vimānavaram ārūḍhaḥ stūyamānaś ca kiṃnaraiḥ

ādityasadṛśākāras teṣāṃ madhye babhau pitā 
tam adṛṣṭvā svapitaraṃ devān dṛṣṭvā vimāninaḥ

kṛtāñjalipuṭo rāmaḥ pitā me kvety abhāṣata 
iti divyābhavad vāṇī rāmaṃ saṃbodhya sītayā

tisṛbhir brahmahatyābhir mukto daśaratho nṛpaḥ 
vṛtaṃ paśya surais tāta devā apy ūcire ca tam

dhanyo 'si kṛtakṛtyo 'si rāma svargaṃ gataḥ pitā 
nānānirayasaṃghātāt pūrvajān uddharet tu yaḥ

sa dhanyo 'laṃkṛtaṃ tena kṛtinā bhuvanatrayam 
enaṃ paśya mahābāho muktapāpaṃ raviprabham

sarvasaṃpattiyukto 'pi pāpī dagdhadrumopamaḥ 
niṣkiṃcano 'pi sukṛtī dṛśyate candramaulivat
dṛṣṭvābravīt sutaṃ rājā āśīrbhir abhinandya ca

kṛtakṛtyo 'si bhadraṃ te tārito 'haṃ tvayānagha 
dhanyaḥ sa putro loke 'smin pitṝṇāṃ yas tu tārakaḥ

tataḥ suragaṇāḥ procur devānāṃ kāryasiddhaye 
rāmaṃ ca puruṣaśreṣṭhaṃ gaccha tāta yathāsukham 
tatas tadvacanaṃ śrutvā rāmas tān abravīt surān
gurau pitari me devāḥ kiṃ kṛtyam avaśiṣyate

nadī na gaṅgayā tulyā na tvayā sadṛśaḥ sutaḥ 
na śivena samo devo na tāreṇa samo manuḥ

tvayā rāma gurūṇāṃ ca kāryaṃ sarvam anuṣṭhitam 
tāritāḥ pitaro rāma tvayā putreṇa mānada 
gacchantu sarve svasthānaṃ tvaṃ ca gaccha yathāsukham

tad devavacanād dhṛṣṭaḥ sītayā lakṣmaṇāgrajaḥ 
tad dṛṣṭvā gaṅgāmāhātmyaṃ vismito vākyam abravīt

aho gaṅgāprabhāvo 'yaṃ trailokye nopamīyate 
vayaṃ dhanyā yato gaṅgā dṛṣṭāsmābhis tripāvanī

harṣeṇa mahatā yukto devaṃ sthāpya maheśvaram 
taṃ ṣoḍaśabhir īśānam upacāraiḥ prayatnataḥ

saṃpūjyāvaraṇair yuktaṃ ṣaṭtriṃśatkalam īśvaram 
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā rāmas tuṣṭāva śaṃkaram

namāmi śaṃbhuṃ puruṣaṃ purāṇaṃ namāmi sarvajñam apārabhāvam
namāmi rudraṃ prabhum akṣayaṃ taṃ namāmi śarvaṃ śirasā namāmi

namāmi devaṃ param avyayaṃ tam umāpatiṃ lokaguruṃ namāmi
namāmi dāridryavidāraṇaṃ taṃ namāmi rogāpaharaṃ namāmi

namāmi kalyāṇam acintyarūpaṃ namāmi viśvodbhavabījarūpam
namāmi viśvasthitikāraṇaṃ taṃ namāmi saṃhārakaraṃ namāmi

namāmi gaurīpriyam avyayaṃ taṃ namāmi nityaṃ kṣaram akṣaraṃ tam
namāmi cidrūpam ameyabhāvaṃ trilocanaṃ taṃ śirasā namāmi

namāmi kāruṇyakaraṃ bhavasya bhayaṃkaraṃ vāpi sadā namāmi
namāmi dātāram abhīpsitānāṃ namāmi someśam umeśam ādau

namāmi vedatrayalocanaṃ taṃ namāmi mūrtitrayavarjitaṃ tam
namāmi puṇyaṃ sadasadvyatītaṃ namāmi taṃ pāpaharaṃ namāmi

namāmi viśvasya hite rataṃ taṃ namāmi rūpāṇi bahūni dhatte
yo viśvagoptā sadasatpraṇetā namāmi taṃ viśvapatiṃ namāmi

yajñeśvaraṃ saṃprati havyakavyaṃ tathā gatiṃ lokasadāśivo yaḥ
ārādhito yaś ca dadāti sarvaṃ namāmi dānapriyam iṣṭadevam

namāmi someśvaram asvatantram umāpatiṃ taṃ vijayaṃ namāmi
namāmi vighneśvaranandināthaṃ putrapriyaṃ taṃ śirasā namāmi

namāmi devaṃ bhavaduḥkhaśoka vināśanaṃ candradharaṃ namāmi
namāmi gaṅgādharam īśam īḍyam umādhavaṃ devavaraṃ namāmi

namāmy ajādīśapuraṃdarādi surāsurair arcitapādapadmam
namāmi devīmukhavādanānām īkṣārtham akṣitritayaṃ ya aicchat

pañcāmṛtair gandhasudhūpadīpair vicitrapuṣpair vividhaiś ca mantraiḥ
annaprakāraiḥ sakalopacāraiḥ saṃpūjitaṃ somam ahaṃ namāmi

tataḥ sa bhagavān āha rāmaṃ śaṃbhuḥ salakṣmaṇam 
varān vṛṇīṣva bhadraṃ te rāmaḥ prāha vṛṣadhvajam

stotreṇānena ye bhaktyā toṣyanti tvāṃ surottama 
teṣāṃ sarvāṇi kāryāṇi siddhiṃ yāntu maheśvara

yeṣāṃ ca pitaraḥ śaṃbho patitā narakārṇave 
teṣāṃ piṇḍādidānena pūtā yāntu triviṣṭapam

janmaprabhṛti pāpāni manovākkāyikaṃ tv agham 
atra tu snānamātreṇa tat sadyo nāśam āpnuyāt

atra ye bhaktitaḥ śaṃbho dadaty arthibhya aṇv api 
sarvaṃ tad akṣayaṃ śaṃbho dātṝṇāṃ phalakṛd bhavet

evam astv iti taṃ rāmaṃ śaṃkaro hṛṣito 'bravīt 
gate tasmin suraśreṣṭhe rāmo 'py anucaraiḥ saha

gautamī yatra cotpannā śanais taṃ deśam abhyagāt 
tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ rāmatīrtham udāhṛtam

dayālor apatat tatra lakṣmaṇasya karāc charaḥ 
tad bāṇatīrtham abhavat sarvāpadvinivāraṇam

yatra saumitriṇā snānaṃ śaṃkarasyārcanaṃ kṛtam 
tat tīrthaṃ lakṣmaṇaṃ jātaṃ tathā sītāsamudbhavam

nānāvidhāśeṣapāpasaṃghanirmūlanakṣamam 
yad aṅghrisaṃgād abhavad gaṅgā trailokyapāvanī

sa yatra snānam akarot tad vaiśiṣṭyaṃ kim ucyate 
tad rāmatīrthasadṛśaṃ tīrthaṃ kvāpi na vidyate

putratīrtham iti khyātaṃ puṇyatīrthaṃ tad ucyate 
sarvān kāmān avāpnoti yanmahimnaḥ śruter api

tasya svarūpaṃ vakṣyāmi śṛṇu yatnena nārada 
diteḥ putrāś ca danujāḥ parikṣīṇā yadābhavan 
adites tu sutā jyeṣṭhāḥ sarvabhāvena nārada

kṣīṇāḥ sutā āvayor eva bhadre kiṃ kurmahe karma loke garīyaḥ
paśyāditer vaṃśam abhinnam uttamaṃ saurājyayuktaṃ yaśasā jayaśriyā

jitārim abhyunnatakīrtidharmaṃ maccittasaṃharṣavināśadakṣam
samānabhartṛtvasamānadharme samānagotre 'pi samānarūpe

na jīvayeyaṃ śriyam unnatiṃ ca jīrṇāsmi dṛṣṭvā tv aditiprasūtān
kām apy avasthām anuyāmi duḥsthā 'diter vilokyātha parāṃ samṛddhim

evaṃ bruvāṇām atidīnavaktrāṃ viniśvasantīṃ parameṣṭhiputraḥ
kṛtābhipūjo vigataśramas tāṃ sa sāntvayann āha manobhirāmām

khedo na kāryaḥ samabhīpsitaṃ yat tat prāpyate puṇyata eva bhadre
tatsādhanaṃ vetti mahānubhāvaḥ prajāpatis te sa tu vakṣyatīti
sādhvy etat sarvabhāvena praśrayāvanatā satī
evaṃ bruvāṇāṃ ca ditiṃ danuḥ provāca nārada

bhartāraṃ kaśyapaṃ bhadre toṣayasva nijair guṇaiḥ 
tuṣṭo yadi bhaved bhartā tataḥ kāmān avāpsyasi

tathety uktvā sarvabhāvais toṣayām āsa kaśyapam 
ditiṃ provāca bhagavān kaśyapo 'tha prajāpatiḥ
kiṃ dadāmi vadābhīṣṭaṃ dite varaya suvrate

ditir apy āha bhartāraṃ putraṃ bahuguṇānvitam 
jetāraṃ sarvalokānāṃ sarvalokanamaskṛtam

yena jātena loke 'smin bhaveyaṃ vīraputriṇī 
taṃ vareyaṃ surapitar ity āha vinayānvitā

upadekṣye vrataṃ śreṣṭhaṃ dvādaśābdaphalapradam 
tata āgatya te garbham ādhāsye yan manogatam 
niṣpāpatāyāṃ jātāyāṃ sidhyanti hi manorathāḥ

bhartṛvākyād ditiḥ prītā taṃ namasyāyatekṣaṇā 
upadiṣṭaṃ vrataṃ cakre bhartrādiṣṭaṃ yathāvidhi

tīrthasevāpātradānavratacaryādivarjitāḥ 
katham āsādayiṣyanti prāṇino 'tra manorathān

tataś cīrṇe vrate tasyāṃ dityāṃ garbham adhārayat 
punaḥ kāntām athovāca kaśyapas tāṃ ditiṃ rahaḥ

na prāpnuvanti yatkāmān munayo 'pi tapassthitāḥ 
yathāvihitakarmāṅgaavajñayā tac chucismite

ninditaṃ ca na kartavyaṃ saṃdhyayor ubhayor api 
na svaptavyaṃ na gantavyaṃ muktakeśī ca no bhava

bhoktavyaṃ subhage naiva kṣutaṃ vā jṛmbhaṇaṃ tathā 
saṃdhyākāle na kartavyaṃ bhūtasaṃghasamākule

sāntardhānaṃ sadā kāryaṃ hasitaṃ tu viśeṣataḥ 
gṛhāntadeśe saṃdhyāsu na sthātavyaṃ kadācana

muśalolūkhalādīni śūrpapīṭhapidhānakam 
naivātikramaṇīyāni divā rātrau sadā priye

udakśīrṣaṃ tu śayanaṃ na saṃdhyāsu viśeṣataḥ 
vaktavyaṃ nānṛtaṃ kiṃcin nānyagehāṭanaṃ tathā

kāntād anyo na vīkṣyas tu prayatnena naraḥ kvacit 
ityādiniyamair yuktā yadi tvam anuvartase 
tatas te bhavitā putras trailokyaiśvaryabhājanam

tatheti pratijajñe sā bhartāraṃ lokapūjitam 
gataś ca kaśyapo brahmann itaś cetaḥ surān prati

diter garbho 'pi vavṛdhe balavān puṇyasaṃbhavaḥ 
etat sarvaṃ mayo daityo māyayā vetti tattvataḥ

indrasya sakhyam abhavan mayena prītipūrvakam 
mayo gatvā rahaḥ prāha indraṃ sa vinayānvitaḥ

diter danor abhiprāyaṃ vrataṃ garbhasya vardhanam 
tasya vīryaṃ ca vividhaṃ prītyendrāya nyavedayat

viśvāsaikagṛhaṃ mitram apāyatrāsavarjitam 
arjitaṃ sukṛtaṃ nānāvidhaṃ cet tad avāpyate

namuceś ca priyo bhrātā mayo daityo mahābalaḥ 
bhrātṛhantrā kathaṃ maitryaṃ mayasyāsīt sureśvara

daityānām adhipaś cāsīd balavān namuciḥ purā 
indreṇa vairam abhavad bhīṣaṇaṃ lomaharṣaṇam

yuddhaṃ hitvā kadācid bho gacchantaṃ tu śatakratum 
dṛṣṭvā daityapatiḥ śūro namuciḥ pṛṣṭhato 'nvagāt

tam āyāntam abhiprekṣya śacībhartā bhayāturaḥ 
airāvataṃ gajaṃ tyaktvā indraḥ phenam athāviśat

sa vajrapāṇis tarasā phenenaivāhanad ripum 
namucir nāśam agamat tasya bhrātā mayo 'nujaḥ

bhrātṛhantṛvināśāya tapas tepe mayo mahat 
māyāṃ ca vividhām āpa devānām atibhīṣaṇām

varāṃś cāvāpya tapasā viṣṇor lokaparāyaṇāt 
dānaśauṇḍaḥ priyālāpī tadābhavad asau mayaḥ

agnīṃś ca brāhmaṇān pūjya jetum indraṃ kṛtakṣaṇaḥ 
dātāraṃ ca tadārthibhyaḥ stūyamānaṃ ca bandibhiḥ

viditvā maghavā vāyor mayaṃ māyāvinaṃ ripum 
upakrāntaṃ suyuddhāya vipro bhūtvā tam abhyagāt 
śacībhartā mayaṃ daityaṃ provācedaṃ punaḥ punaḥ

dehi daityapate mahyam arthine 'pekṣitaṃ varam 
tvāṃ śrutvā dātṛtilakam āgato 'haṃ dvijottamaḥ

mayo 'pi brāhmaṇaṃ matvā 'vadad dattaṃ mayā tava 
vicārayanti kṛtino bahv alpaṃ vā puro 'rthini

ity ukte tu hariḥ prāha sakhyam icche hy ahaṃ tvayā 
indraṃ mayaḥ punaḥ prāha kim anena dvijottama

na tvayā mama vairaṃ bhoḥ svastīty āha harir mayam 
tattvaṃ vadeti sa harir daityenoktaḥ svakaṃ vapuḥ

darśayām āsa daityāya sahasrākṣaṃ yad ucyate 
tataḥ savismayo daityo mayo harim uvāca ha
kim idaṃ vajrapāṇis tvaṃ tavāyogyā kṛtiḥ sakhe

pariṣvajya vihasyātha vṛttam ity abravīd dhariḥ 
kenāpi sādhayanty atra paṇḍitāś ca samīhitam

tataḥ prabhṛti śakrasya mayena mahatī hy abhūt 
suprītir muniśārdūla mayo harihitaḥ sadā

indrasya bhavanaṃ gatvā tasmai sarvaṃ nyavedayat 
kiṃ me kṛtyam iti prāha mayaṃ māyāvinaṃ hariḥ

haraye ca mayo māyāṃ prādāt prītyā tathā hariḥ 
prāptaḥ saṃprītimān āha kiṃ kṛtyaṃ maya tad vada

agastyasyāśramaṃ gaccha tatrāste garbhiṇī ditiḥ 
tasyāḥ śuśrūṣaṇaṃ kurvann āssva tatra kiyanti ca

ahāni maghavaṃs tasyā garbham āviśya vajradhṛk 
vardhamānaṃ ca taṃ chindhi yāvad vaśyo 'thavā mṛtim 
prāpnoti tāvad vajreṇa tato na bhavitā ripuḥ

tathety uktvā mayaṃ pūjya maghavān eka eva hi vinītavat tadā prāyād ditiṃ mātaram añjasā
śuśrūṣamāṇas tāṃ devīṃ śakro daiteyamātaram sā na jānāti tac cittaṃ śakrasya dviṣato ditiḥ

garbhe sthitaṃ tu yad bhūtaṃ devendrasya viceṣṭitam 
amoghaṃ tan munes tejaḥ kaśyapasya durāsadam

tataḥ pragṛhya kuliśaṃ sahasrākṣaḥ puraṃdaraḥ 
antaḥpraveśakāmo 'sau bahukālaṃ samāvasan

saṃdhyodakśīrṣanidrāṃ tām avekṣya kuliśāyudhaḥ 
idam antaram ity uktvā dityāḥ kukṣiṃ samāviśat

antarvarti ca yad bhūtam indraṃ dṛṣṭvā dhṛtāyudham 
hantukāmaṃ tadovāca punaḥ punar abhītavat

kiṃ māṃ na rakṣase vajrin bhrātaraṃ tvaṃ jighāṃsasi 
nāraṇe māraṇād anyat pātakaṃ vidyate mahat

ṛte yuddhān mahābāho śakra yudhyasva nirgate 
mayi tasmān naitad evaṃ tava yuktaṃ bhaviṣyati

śatakratuḥ sahasrākṣaḥ śacībhartā puraṃdaraḥ 
vajrapāṇiḥ surendras tvaṃ te na yuktaṃ bhavet prabho

athavā yuddhakāmas tvaṃ mama niṣkramaṇaṃ yathā 
tathā kuru mahābāho mārgād asmād apāsara

kumārge na pravartante mahānto 'pi vipadgatāḥ 
avidyaś cāpy aśastraś ca naiva cāyudhasaṃgrahaḥ

tvaṃ vidyāvān vajrapāṇe māṃ nighnan kiṃ na lajjase 
kurvanti garhitaṃ karma na kulīnāḥ kadācana

hatvā vā kiṃ tu jāyeta yaśo vā puṇyam eva vā 
vadhyante bhrātaraḥ kāmād garbhasthāḥ kiṃ nu pauruṣam

yadi vā yuddhabhaktis te mayi bhrātar asaṃśayam 
tato muṣṭiṃ puraskṛtya vajriṇe 'sau vyavasthitaḥ

bālaghātī brahmaghātī tathā viśvāsaghātakaḥ 
evaṃbhūtaṃ phalaṃ śakra kasmān māṃ hantum udyataḥ

yasyājñayā sarvam idaṃ vartate sacarācaram 
sa hantā bālakaṃ māṃ vai kiṃ yaśaḥ kiṃ tu pauruṣam

evaṃ bruvantaṃ taṃ garbhaṃ ciccheda kuliśena saḥ 
krodhāndhānāṃ lobhināṃ ca na ghṛṇā kvāpi vidyate

na mamāra tato duḥkhād āhus te bhrātaro vayam 
punaś ciccheda tān khaṇḍān mā vadhīr iti cābruvan

viśvastān mātṛgarbhasthān nijabhrātṝñ śatakrato 
dveṣavidhvastabuddhīnāṃ na citte karuṇākaṇaḥ

evaṃ tu khaṇḍitaṃ khaṇḍaṃ hastapādādijīvavat 
nirvikāraṃ tato dṛṣṭvā saptasapta suvismitaḥ

ekavad bahurūpāṇi garbhasthāni śubhāni ca 
rudanti bahurūpāṇi mā rutety abravīd dhariḥ

tatas te maruto jātā balavanto mahaujasaḥ 
garbhasthā eva te 'nyonyam ūcuḥ śakraṃ gatabhramāḥ

agastyaṃ muniśārdūlaṃ mātā yasyāśrame sthitā 
asmatpitā tava bhrātā sakhyaṃ te bahu manyate

asmān upari sasnehaṃ manas te vidmahe mune 
na yat karoti śvapacaḥ pravṛttas tatra vajradhṛk

ity etad vacanaṃ śrutvā agastyo 'gāt sasaṃbhramaḥ 
ditiṃ saṃbodhayām āsa vyathitāṃ garbhavedanāt
tatrāgastyaḥ śacīkāntam aśapat kupito bhṛśam

saṃgrāme ripavaḥ pṛṣṭhaṃ paśyeyus te sadā hare 
jīvatām eva maraṇam etad eva hi māninām 
pṛṣṭhaṃ palāyamānānāṃ yat paśyanty ahitā raṇe
sāpi taṃ garbhasaṃsthaṃ ca śaśāpendraṃ ruṣā ditiḥ

na pauruṣaṃ kṛtaṃ tasmāc chāpo 'yaṃ bhavitā tava 
strībhiḥ paribhavaṃ prāpya rājyāt prabhraśyase hare

etasminn antare tatra kaśyapo vai prajāpatiḥ 
prāyāc ca vyathito 'gastyāc chrutvā śakraviceṣṭitam 
garbhāntaragataḥ śakraḥ pitaraṃ prāha bhītavat
agastyāc ca diteś caiva bibhemi kramituṃ bahiḥ

etasminn antare prāpya kaśyapo 'pi prajāpatiḥ 
putrakarma ca tad dṛṣṭvā garbhāntaḥsthitim eva ca 
ditiśāpam agastyasya śrutvāsau duḥkhito 'bhavat

nirgaccha śakra putraitat pāpaṃ kiṃ kṛtavān asi 
na nirmalakulotpannā manaḥ kurvanti pātake

sa nirgato vajrapāṇiḥ savrīḍo 'dhomukho 'bravīt 
tanmūrtir eva vadati sadasacceṣṭitaṃ nṛṇām
yad uktam atra śreyaḥ syāt tatkartāham asaṃśayam

tato mamāntikaṃ prāyāl lokapālaiḥ sa kaśyapaḥ 
sarvaṃ vṛttam athovāca punaḥ papraccha māṃ suraiḥ

ditigarbhasya vai śāntiṃ sahasrākṣaviśāpatām 
garbhasthānāṃ ca sarveṣām indreṇa saha mitratām

teṣām ārogyatāṃ cāpi śacībhartur adoṣatām 
agastyadattaśāpasya viśāpatvam api kramāt

tato 'ham abravaṃ vākyaṃ kaśyapaṃ vinayānvitam 
prajāpate kaśyapa tvaṃ vasubhir lokapālakaiḥ

indreṇa sahitaḥ śīghraṃ gautamīṃ yāhi mānada 
tatra snātvā maheśānaṃ stuhi sarvaiḥ samanvitaḥ

tataḥ śivaprasādena sarvaṃ śreyo bhaved iti 
tathety uktvā jagāmāsau kaśyapo gautamīṃ tadā

snātvā tuṣṭāva deveśam ebhir eva padakramaiḥ 
sarvaduḥkhāpanodāya dvayam eva prakīrtitam 
gautamī vā puṇyanadī śivo vā karuṇākaraḥ

pāhi śaṃkara deveśa pāhi lokanamaskṛta 
pāhi pāvana vāgīśa pāhi pannagabhūṣaṇa

pāhi dharma vṛṣārūḍha pāhi vedatrayekṣaṇa 
pāhi godhara lakṣmīśa pāhi śarva gajāmbara

pāhi tripurahan nātha pāhi somārdhabhūṣaṇa 
pāhi yajñeśa someśa pāhy abhīṣṭapradāyaka

pāhi kāruṇyanilaya pāhi maṅgaladāyaka 
pāhi prabhava sarvasya pāhi pālaka vāsava

pāhi bhāskara vitteśa pāhi brahmanamaskṛta 
pāhi viśveśa siddheśa pāhi pūrṇa namo 'stu te

ghorasaṃsārakāntārasaṃcārodvignacetasām 
śarīriṇāṃ kṛpāsindho tvam eva śaraṇaṃ śiva

evaṃ saṃstuvatas tasya purato 'bhūd vṛṣadhvajaḥ 
vareṇa cchandayām āsa kaśyapaṃ taṃ prajāpatim

kaśyapo 'pi śivaṃ prāha vinītavad idaṃ vacaḥ 
sa prāha vistareṇātha indrasya tu viceṣṭitam

śāpaṃ nāśaṃ ca putrāṇāṃ parasparam amitratām 
pāpaprāptiṃ tu śakrasya śāpaprāptiṃ tathaiva ca 
tato vṛṣākapiḥ prāha ditiṃ cāgastyam eva ca

maruto ye bhavatputrāḥ pañcāśac caikavarjitāḥ 
sarve bhaveyuḥ subhagā bhaveyur yajñabhāginaḥ
indreṇa sahitā nityaṃ vartayeyur mudānvitāḥ

indrasya tu havirbhāgo yatra yatra makhe bhavet 
ādau tu marutas tatra bhaveyur nātra saṃśayaḥ

marudbhiḥ sahitaṃ śakraṃ na jayeyuḥ kadācana 
jetā bhavet sarvadaiva sukhaṃ tiṣṭha prajāpate

adyaprabhṛti ye kuryur anayād bhrātṛghātanam 
vaṃśacchedo vipattiś ca nityaṃ teṣāṃ bhaviṣyati
agastyam ṛṣiśārdūlaṃ śaṃbhur apy āha yatnataḥ

na kuryās tvaṃ ca kopaṃ ca śacībhartari vai mune 
śamaṃ vraja mahāprājña marutas tv amarā bhavan
ditiṃ cāpi śivaḥ prāha prasanno vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ

eko bhūyān mama sutas trailokyaiśvaryamaṇḍitaḥ 
ity evaṃ cintayantī tvaṃ tapase niyatābhavaḥ

tad etat saphalaṃ te 'dya putrā bahuguṇāḥ śubhāḥ 
abhavan balinaḥ śūrās tasmāj jahi manorujam 
anyān api varān subhrūr yācasva gatasaṃbhramā

tad etad vacanaṃ śrutvā devadevasya sā ditiḥ 
kṛtāñjalipuṭā natvā śaṃbhuṃ vākyam athābravīt

loke yad etat paramaṃ yat pitroḥ putradarśanam 
viśeṣeṇa tu tan mātuḥ priyaṃ syāt surapūjita

tatrāpi rūpasaṃpattiśauryavikramavān bhavet 
eko 'pi tanayaḥ kiṃtu bahavaś cet kim ucyate

matputrās te prabhāvāc ca jetāro balino dhruvam 
indrasya bhrātaraḥ satyaṃ putrāś caiva prajāpateḥ

agastyasya prasādāc ca gaṅgāyāś ca prasādataḥ 
yatra deva prasādas te tac chubhaṃ ko 'tra saṃśayaḥ

kṛtārthāhaṃ tathāpi tvāṃ bhaktyā vijñāpayāmy aham 
śṛṇuṣva deva vacanaṃ kuruṣva ca jagaddhitam
vadety uktā jagaddhātrā ditir namrābravīd idam

saṃtatiprāpaṇaṃ loke durlabhaṃ suravandita 
viśeṣeṇa priyaṃ mātuḥ putraś cet kiṃ nu varṇyate

sa cāpi guṇavāñ śrīmān āyuṣmān yadi jāyate 
kiṃ tu svargeṇa deveśa pārameṣṭhyapadena vā

sarveṣām api bhūtānām ihāmutra phalaiṣiṇām 
guṇavatputrasaṃprāptir abhīṣṭā sarvadaiva ca 
tasmād āplavanād atra kriyatāṃ samanugrahaḥ

mahāpāpaphalaṃ cedaṃ yad etad anapatyatā 
striyā vā puruṣasyāpi vandhyatvaṃ yadi jāyate

tad atra snānamātreṇa taddoṣo nāśam āpnuyāt 
snātvā tatra phalaṃ dadyāt stotram etac ca yaḥ paṭhet

sa tu putram avāpnoti trimāsasnānadānataḥ 
aputriṇī tv atra snānaṃ kṛtvā putram avāpnuyāt

ṛtusnātā tu yā kācit tatra snātā sutāṃl labhet 
trimāsābhyantaraṃ yā tu gurviṇī bhaktitas tv iha

phalaiḥ snātvā tu māṃ paśyet stotreṇa stauti māṃ tathā 
tasyāḥ śakrasamaḥ putro jāyate nātra saṃśayaḥ

pitṛdoṣaiś ca ye putraṃ na labhante dite śṛṇu 
dhanāpahāradoṣaiś ca tatraiṣā niṣkṛtiḥ parā

tatraiṣāṃ piṇḍadānena pitṝṇāṃ prīṇanena ca 
kiṃcit suvarṇadānena tataḥ putro bhaved dhruvam

ye nyāsādyapahartāro ratnāpahnavakārakāḥ 
śrāddhakarmavihīnāś ca teṣāṃ vaṃśo na vardhate

doṣiṇāṃ tu paretānāṃ gatir eṣā bhaved iti 
saṃtatir jāyatāṃ ślāghyā jīvatāṃ tīrthasevanāt

saṃgame ditigaṅgāyāḥ snātvā siddheśvaraṃ prabhum 
anādyapāram ajaraṃ citsadānandavigraham

devarṣisiddhagandharvayogīśvaraniṣevitam 
liṅgātmakaṃ mahādevaṃ jyotirmayam anāmayam

pūjayitvopacāraiś ca nityaṃ bhaktyā yatavrataḥ 
stotreṇānena yaḥ stauti caturdaśyaṣṭamīṣu ca

yathāśaktyā svarṇadānaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca bhojanam 
yaḥ karoty atra gaṅgāyāṃ sa putraśatam āpnuyāt

saṃprāpya sakalān kāmān ante śivapuraṃ vrajet 
stotreṇānena yaḥ kaścid yatra kvāpi stavīti mām 
ṣaṇmāsāt putram āpnoti api vandhyāpy aśaṅkitam

tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ putratīrtham udāhṛtam 
tatra tu snānadānādyaiḥ sarvakāmān avāpnuyāt

marudbhiḥ saha maitryeṇa mitratīrthaṃ tad ucyate 
niṣpāpatvena cendrasya śakratīrthaṃ tad ucyate

aindrīṃ śriyaṃ yatra lebhe tat tīrthaṃ kamalābhidham 
etāni sarvatīrthāni sarvābhīṣṭapradāni hi

sarvaṃ bhaviṣyatīty uktvā śivaś cāntaradhīyata 
kṛtakṛtyāś ca te jagmuḥ sarva eva yathāgatam 
tīrthānāṃ puṇyadaṃ tatra lakṣam ekaṃ prakīrtitam

yamatīrtham iti khyātaṃ pitṝṇāṃ prītivardhanam 
dṛṣṭādṛṣṭeṣṭadaṃ sarvadevarṣigaṇasevitam

tasya prabhāvaṃ vakṣyāmi sarvapāpapraṇāśanam 
anuhrāda iti khyātaḥ kapoto balavān abhūt

tasya bhāryā hetināmnī pakṣiṇī kāmarūpiṇī 
mṛtyoḥ pautro hy anuhrādo dauhitrī hetir eva ca

kālenātha tayoḥ putrāḥ pautrāś caiva babhūvire 
tasya śatruś ca balavān ulūko nāma pakṣirāṭ

tasya putrāś ca pautrāś ca āgneyās te balotkaṭāḥ 
tayoś ca vairam abhavad bahukālaṃ dvijanmanoḥ

gaṅgāyā uttare tīre kapotasyāśramo 'bhavat 
tasyāś ca dakṣiṇe kūla ulūko nāma pakṣirāṭ

vāsaṃ cakre tatra putraiḥ pautraiś ca dvijasattama 
tayoś ca yuddham abhavad bahukālaṃ viruddhayoḥ

putraiḥ pautraiś ca vṛtayor balinor balibhiḥ saha 
ulūko vā kapoto vā naivāpnoti jayājayau

kapoto yamam ārādhya mṛtyuṃ paitāmahaṃ tathā 
yāmyam astram avāpyātha sarvebhyo 'py adhiko 'bhavat

tatholūko 'gnim ārādhya balavān abhavad bhṛśam 
varair unmattayor yuddham abhavac cātibhīṣaṇam

tatrāgneyam ulūko 'pi kapotāyāstram ākṣipat 
kapoto 'py atha pāśān vai yāmyān ākṣipya śatrave

ulūkāyātha daṇḍaṃ ca mṛtyupāśān avāsṛjat 
punas tad abhavad yuddhaṃ purāḍibakayor yathā

hetiḥ kapotakī dṛṣṭvā jvalanaṃ prāptam antike 
pativratā mahāyuddhe bhartuḥ sā duḥkhavihvalā

agninā veṣṭyamānāṃś ca putrān dṛṣṭvā viśeṣataḥ 
sā gatvā jvalanaṃ hetis tuṣṭāva vividhoktibhiḥ

rūpaṃ na dānaṃ na parokṣam asti yasyātmabhūtaṃ ca padārthajātam
aśnanti havyāni ca yena devāḥ svāhāpatiṃ yajñabhujaṃ namasye

mukhabhūtaṃ ca devānāṃ devānāṃ havyavāhanam 
hotāraṃ cāpi devānāṃ devānāṃ dūtam eva ca

taṃ devaṃ śaraṇaṃ yāmi ādidevaṃ vibhāvasum 
antaḥ sthitaḥ prāṇarūpo bahiś cānnaprado hi yaḥ 
yo yajñasādhanaṃ yāmi śaraṇaṃ taṃ dhanaṃjayam

amogham etad astraṃ me nyastaṃ yuddhe kapotaki 
yatra viśramayed astraṃ tan me brūhi pativrate

mayi viśramyatām astraṃ na putre na ca bhartari 
satyavāg bhava havyeśa jātavedo namo 'stu te

tuṣṭo 'smi tava vākyena bhartṛbhaktyā pativrate 
tavāpi bhartṛputrāṇāṃ heti kṣemaṃ dadāmy aham

āgneyam etad astraṃ me na bhartāraṃ sutān api 
na tvāṃ dahet tato yāhi sukhena tvaṃ kapotaki

etasminn antare tatra ulūkī dadṛśe patim 
veṣṭyamānaṃ yāmyapāśair yamadaṇḍena tāḍitam 
ulūkī duḥkhitā bhūtvā yamaṃ prāyād bhayāturā

tvadbhītā anudravante janās tvadbhītā brahmacaryaṃ caranti
tvadbhītāḥ sādhu caranti dhīrās tvadbhītāḥ karmaniṣṭhā bhavanti

tvadbhītā anāśakam ācaranti grāmād araṇyam abhi yac caranti
tvadbhītāḥ saumyatām āśrayante tvadbhītāḥ somapānaṃ bhajante
evaṃ bruvatyāṃ tasyāṃ tām āha dakṣiṇadikpatiḥ
varaṃ varaya bhadraṃ te dāsye 'haṃ manasaḥ priyam
yamasyeti vacaḥ śrutvā sā tam āha pativratā

bhartā me veṣṭitaḥ pāśair daṇḍenābhihatas tava 
tasmād rakṣa suraśreṣṭha putrān bhartāram eva ca
tadvākyāt kṛpayā yukto yamaḥ prāha punaḥ punaḥ
pāśānāṃ cāpi daṇḍasya sthānaṃ vada śubhānane

sā provāca yamaṃ devaṃ mayi pāśās tvayeritāḥ 
āviśantu jagannātha daṇḍo mayy eva saṃviśet 
tataḥ provāca bhagavān yamas tāṃ kṛpayā punaḥ
tava bhartā ca putrāś ca sarve jīvantu vijvarāḥ

nyavārayad yamaḥ pāśān āgneyāstraṃ tu havyavāṭ 
kapotolūkayoś cāpi prītiṃ vai cakratuḥ surau 
āhatuś ca dvijanmānau vriyatāṃ vara īpsitaḥ

bhavator darśanaṃ labdhaṃ vairavyājena duṣkaram 
vayaṃ ca pakṣiṇaḥ pāpāḥ kiṃ vareṇa surottamau

atha deyo varo 'smākaṃ bhavadbhyāṃ prītipūrvakam 
nātmārtham anuyācāvo dīyamānaṃ varaṃ śubham

ātmārthaṃ yas tu yāceta sa śocyo hi sureśvarau 
jīvitaṃ saphalaṃ tasya yaḥ parārthodyataḥ sadā

agnir āpo raviḥ pṛthvī dhānyāni vividhāni ca 
parārthaṃ vartanaṃ teṣāṃ satāṃ cāpi viśeṣataḥ

brahmādayo 'pi hi yato yujyante mṛtyunā saha 
evaṃ jñātvā tu deveśau vṛthā svārthapariśramaḥ

janmanā saha yat puṃsāṃ vihitaṃ parameṣṭhinā 
kadācin nānyathā tad vai vṛthā kliśyanti jantavaḥ

tasmād yācāvahe kiṃcid dhitāya jagatāṃ śubham 
guṇadāyi tu sarveṣāṃ tad yuvām anumanyatām

tāv āhatur ubhau devau pakṣiṇau lokaviśrutau 
dharmasya yaśaso 'vāptye lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā

āvābhyām āśramau tīrthe gaṅgāyā ubhaye taṭe 
bhavetāṃ jagatāṃ nāthāv eṣa eva paro varaḥ

snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ pitṝṇāṃ cāpi pūjanam 
sukṛtī duṣkṛtī vāpi yaḥ karoti yathā tathā 
sarvaṃ tad akṣayaṃ puṇyaṃ syād ity eṣa paro varaḥ
evam astu tathā cānyat suprītau tu bravāvahai

uttare gautamītīre yamastotraṃ paṭhanti ye 
teṣāṃ saptasu vaṃśeṣu nākāle mṛtyum āpnuyāt

puruṣo bhājanaṃ ca syāt sarvadā sarvasaṃpadām 
yas tv idaṃ paṭhate nityaṃ mṛtyustotraṃ jitātmavān

aṣṭāśītisahasraiś ca vyādhibhir na sa bādhyate 
asmiṃs tīrthe dvijaśreṣṭhau trimāsād gurviṇī satī

arvāgvandhyā ca ṣaṇmāsāt saptāhaṃ snānam ācaret 
vīrasūḥ sā bhaven nārī śatāyuḥ sa suto bhavet

lakṣmīvān matimāñ śūraḥ putrapautravivardhanaḥ 
tatra piṇḍādidānena pitaro muktim āpnuyuḥ 
manovākkāyajāt pāpāt snānān mukto bhaven naraḥ
yamavākyād anu tathā havyavāḍ āha pakṣiṇau

matstotraṃ dakṣiṇe tīre ye paṭhanti yatavratāḥ 
teṣām ārogyam aiśvaryaṃ lakṣmīṃ rūpaṃ dadāmy aham

idaṃ stotraṃ tu yaḥ kaścid yatra kvāpi paṭhen naraḥ 
naivāgnito bhayaṃ tasya likhite 'pi gṛhe sthite

snānaṃ dānaṃ ca yaḥ kuryād agnitīrthe śucir naraḥ 
agniṣṭomaphalaṃ tasya bhaved eva na saṃśayaḥ

tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ yāmyam āgneyam eva ca 
kapotaṃ ca tatholūkaṃ hetyulūkaṃ vidur budhāḥ

tatra trīṇi sahasrāṇi tāvanty eva śatāni ca 
punar navatitīrthāni pratyekaṃ muktibhājanam

teṣu snānena dānena pretībhūtāś ca ye narāḥ 
pūtās te putravittāḍhyā ākrameyur divaṃ śubhāḥ

tapastīrtham iti khyātaṃ tapovṛddhikaraṃ mahat 
sarvakāmapradaṃ puṇyaṃ pitṝṇāṃ prītivardhanam

tasmiṃs tīrthe tu yad vṛttaṃ śṛṇu pāpapraṇāśanam 
apām agneś ca saṃvādam ṛṣīṇāṃ ca parasparam

apo jyeṣṭhatamāḥ kecin menire 'gniṃ tathāpare 
evaṃ bruvanto munayaḥ saṃvādaṃ cāgnivāriṇoḥ

vināgniṃ jīvanaṃ kva syāj jīvabhūto yato 'nalaḥ 
ātmabhūto havyabhūtaś cāgninā jāyate 'khilam

agninā dhriyate loko hy agnir jyotirmayaṃ jagat 
tasmād agneḥ paraṃ nāsti pāvanaṃ daivataṃ mahat

antarjyotiḥ sa evoktaḥ paraṃ jyotiḥ sa eva hi 
vināgninā kiṃcid asti yasya dhāma jagattrayam

tasmād agneḥ paraṃ nāsti bhūtānāṃ jyaiṣṭhyabhājanam 
yoṣitkṣetre 'rpitaṃ bījaṃ puruṣeṇa yathā tathā

tasya dehādikā śaktiḥ kṛśānor eva nānyathā 
devānāṃ hi mukhaṃ vahnis tasmān nātaḥ paraṃ viduḥ

apare tu hy apāṃ jyaiṣṭhyaṃ menire vedavādinaḥ 
adbhiḥ saṃpatsyate hy annaṃ śucir adbhiḥ prajāyate

adbhir eva dhṛtaṃ sarvam āpo vai mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ 
trailokyajīvanaṃ vāri vadantīti purāvidaḥ

utpannam amṛtaṃ hy adbhyas tābhyaś cauṣadhisaṃbhavaḥ 
agnir jyeṣṭha iti prāhur āpo jyeṣṭhatamāḥ pare

evaṃ mīmāṃsamānās te ṛṣayo vedavādinaḥ 
viruddhavādino māṃ ca samabhyetyedam abruvan
agner apāṃ vada jyaiṣṭhyaṃ trailokyasya bhavān prabhuḥ

aham apy abravaṃ prāptān ṛṣīn sarvān yatavratān 
ubhau pūjyatamau loka ubhābhyāṃ jāyate jagat

ubhābhyāṃ jāyate havyaṃ kavyaṃ cāmṛtam eva ca 
ubhābhyāṃ jīvanaṃ loke śarīrasya ca dhāraṇam

nānayoś ca viśeṣo 'sti tato jyaiṣṭhyaṃ samaṃ matam 
tato madvacanāj jyaiṣṭhyam ubhayor naiva kasyacit

jyaiṣṭhyam anyatarasyeti menire ṛṣisattamāḥ 
na tṛptā mama vākyena jagmur vāyuṃ tapasvinaḥ
kasya jyaiṣṭhyaṃ bhavān prāṇo vāyo satyaṃ tvayi sthitam

vāyur āhānalo jyeṣṭhaḥ sarvam agnau pratiṣṭhitam 
nety uktvānyonyam ṛṣayo jagmus te 'pi vasuṃdharām
satyaṃ bhūme vada jyaiṣṭhyam ādhārāsi carācare
bhūmir apy āha vinayād āgatāṃs tān ṛṣīn idam

mamāpy ādhārabhūtāḥ syur āpo devyaḥ sanātanāḥ 
adbhyas tu jāyate sarvaṃ jyaiṣṭhyam apsu pratiṣṭhitam

nety uktvānyonyam ṛṣayo jagmuḥ kṣīrodaśāyinam 
tuṣṭuvur vividhaiḥ stotraiḥ śaṅkhacakragadādharam

yo veda sarvaṃ bhuvanaṃ bhaviṣyad yaj jāyamānaṃ ca guhāniviṣṭam
lokatrayaṃ citravicitrarūpam ante samastaṃ ca yam āviveśa

yad akṣaraṃ śāśvatam aprameyaṃ yaṃ vedavedyam ṛṣayo vadanti
yam āśritāḥ svepsitam āpnuvanti tad vastu satyaṃ śaraṇaṃ vrajāmaḥ

bhūtaṃ mahābhūtajagatpradhānaṃ na vindate yogino viṣṇurūpam
tad vaktum ete ṛṣayo 'tra yātāḥ satyaṃ vadasveha jagannivāsa

tvam antarātmākhiladehabhājāṃ tvam eva sarvaṃ tvayi sarvam īśa
tathāpi jānanti na keapi kutrāpi aho bhavantaṃ prakṛtiprabhāvāt
tataḥ prāha jagaddhātrī daivī vāg aśarīriṇī

ubhāv ārādhya tapasā bhaktyā ca niyamena ca 
yasya syāt prathamaṃ siddhis tad bhūtaṃ jyeṣṭham ucyate

tathety tathā yayuḥ sarve ṛṣayo lokapūjitāḥ 
śrāntāḥ khinnāntarātmānaḥ paraṃ vairāgyam āśritāḥ

sarvalokaikajananīṃ bhuvanatrayapāvanīm 
gautamīm agaman sarve tapas taptuṃ yatavratāḥ

abdaivataṃ tathāgniṃ ca pūjanāyodyatās tadā 
agneś ca pūjakā ye ca apāṃ vai pūjane sthitāḥ 
tatra vāg abravīd daivī vedamātā sarasvatī

agner āpas tathā yonir adbhiḥ śaucam avāpyate 
agneś ca pūjakā ye ca vinādbhiḥ pūjanaṃ katham

apsu jātāsu sarvatra karmaṇy adhikṛto bhavet 
tāvat karmaṇy anarho 'yam aśucir malino naraḥ

na magnaḥ śraddhayā yāvad apsu śītāsu vedavit 
tasmād āpo variṣṭhāḥ syur mātṛbhūtā yataḥ smṛtāḥ 
tasmāj jyaiṣṭhyam apām eva jananyo 'gner viśeṣataḥ

etad vacaḥ śuśruvus te ṛṣayo vedavādinaḥ 
niścayaṃ ca tataś cakrur bhavej jyaiṣṭhyam apām iti

yatra tīrthe vṛttam idam ṛṣisattre ca nārada 
tapastīrthaṃ tu tat proktaṃ sattratīrthaṃ tad ucyate

agnitīrthaṃ ca tat proktaṃ tathā sārasvataṃ viduḥ 
teṣu snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca sarvakāmapradaṃ śubham

caturdaśa śatāny atra tīrthānāṃ puṇyadāyinām 
teṣu snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca svargamokṣapradāyakam

kṛtaṃ saṃdehaharaṇam ṛṣīṇāṃ yatra bhāṣayā 
sarasvaty abhavat tatra gaṅgayā saṃgatā nadī 
māhātmyaṃ tasya ko vaktuṃ saṃgamasya kṣamo naraḥ

devatīrtham iti khyātaṃ gaṅgāyā uttare taṭe 
tasya prabhāvaṃ vakṣyāmi sarvapāpapraṇāśanam

ārṣṭiṣeṇa iti khyāto rājā sarvaguṇānvitaḥ 
tasya bhāryā jayā nāma sākṣāl lakṣmīr ivāparā

tasya putro bharo nāma matimān pitṛvatsalaḥ 
dhanurvede ca vede ca niṣṇāto dakṣa eva ca

tasya bhāryā rūpavatī suprabhety abhiviśrutā 
ārṣṭiṣeṇas tato rājā putre rājyaṃ niveśya saḥ

purodhasā ca mukhyena dīkṣāṃ cakre nareśvaraḥ 
sarasvatyās tatas tīre hayamedhāya yatnavān

ṛtvigbhir ṛṣimukhyaiś ca vedaśāstraparāyaṇaiḥ 
dīkṣitaṃ taṃ nṛpaśreṣṭhaṃ brāhmaṇāgnisamīpataḥ

mithur dānavarāṭ śūraḥ pāpabuddhiḥ pratāpavān 
makhaṃ vidhvasya nṛpatiṃ sabhāryaṃ sapurohitam

ādāya vegāt sa prāgād rasātalatalaṃ mune 
nīte tasmin nṛpavare yajñe naṣṭe tato 'marāḥ

ṛtvijaś ca yayuḥ sarve svaṃ svaṃ sthānaṃ makhāt tataḥ 
purohitasuto rājño devāpir iti viśrutaḥ

bālas tāṃ mātaraṃ dṛṣṭvā ātmanaḥ pitaraṃ na ca 
dṛṣṭvā savismayo bhūtvā duḥkhito 'tīva cābhavat

sa mātaraṃ tu papraccha pitā me kva gato 'mbike 
pitṛhīno na jīveyaṃ mātaḥ satyaṃ vadasva me

dhig dhik pitṛvihīnānāṃ jīvitaṃ pāpakarmaṇām 
na vakṣi yadi me mātar jalam agnim athāviśe

putraṃ provāca sā mātā rājño bhāryā purodhasaḥ 
dānavena talaṃ nīto rājñā saha pitā tava

kva nītaḥ kena vā nītaḥ kathaṃ nītaḥ kva karmaṇi 
keṣu paśyatsu kiṃ sthānaṃ dānavasya vadasva me

dīkṣitaṃ yajñasadasi sabhāryaṃ sapurodhasam 
rājānaṃ taṃ mithur daityo nītavān sa rasātalam 
paśyatsu devasaṃgheṣu vahnibrāhmaṇasaṃnidhau

tan mātṛvacanaṃ śrutvā devāpiḥ kṛtyam asmarat 
devān paśye 'thavāgniṃ vā ṛtvijo vāsurāṃs tathā

eteṣv eva pitānveṣyo nānyatreti matir mama 
iti niścitya devāpir bharaṃ prāha nṛpātmajam

tapasā brahmacaryeṇa vratena niyamena ca 
ānetavyā mayā sarve nītā ye ca rasātalam

jāte parābhave ghore yo na kuryāt pratikriyām 
narādhamena kiṃ tena jīvatā vā mṛtena vā

tvaṃ praśādhi mahīṃ kṛtsnām ārṣṭiṣeṇaḥ pitā yathā 
mātā mama tvayā pālyā rājan yāvan mamāgatiḥ 
bhavec ca kṛtakāryasya anujānīhi māṃ bhara
bhareṇoktaḥ sa devāpiḥ sarvaṃ niścitya yatnataḥ
siddhiṃ kuru sukhaṃ yāhi mā cintām alpikāṃ bhaja

tato devāpir amararājāṅghridhyānatatparaḥ 
ṛtvijo 'nveṣya yatnena natvā tān ṛtvijaḥ pṛthak 
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bālo devāpir vākyam abravīt

bhavadbhiś ca makho rakṣyo yajamānaś ca dīkṣitaḥ 
purodhāś ca tathā rakṣyaḥ patnī yā dīkṣitasya tu

bhavatsu tatra paśyatsu yajñaṃ vidhvasya daityarāṭ 
rājādayas tena nītās tan na yuktatamaṃ bhavet

athāpy etad ahaṃ manye bhavantas tān arogiṇaḥ 
dātum arhanti tān sarvān anyathā śāpam arhatha

makhe 'gniḥ prathamaṃ pūjyo hy agnir evātra daivatam 
tasmād vayaṃ na jānīmo hy agnīnāṃ paricārakāḥ
sa eva dātā bhoktā ca hartā kartā ca havyavāṭ

ṛtvijaḥ pṛṣṭhataḥ kṛtvā devāpir jātavedasam 
pūjayitvā yathānyāyam agnaye tan nyavedayat

yathartvijas tathā cāhaṃ devānāṃ paricārakaḥ 
havyaṃ vahāmi devānāṃ bhoktāro rakṣakāś ca te

devān āhūya yatnena havirbhāgān pṛthak pṛthak 
dāsye 'ham eṣa doṣo me tasmād yāhi surān prati

devāpiḥ sa surān prāpya natvā tebhyaḥ pṛthak pṛthak 
ṛtvigvākyaṃ cāgnivākyaṃ śāpaṃ cāpi nyavedayat

āhūtā vaidikair mantrair ṛtvigbhiś ca yathākramam 
bhokṣyāmahe havirbhāgān na svatantrā dvijottama

tasmād vedānugā nityaṃ vayaṃ vedena coditāḥ 
paratantrās tato vipra vedebhyas tan nivedaya

sa devāpiḥ śucir bhūtvā vedān āhūya yatnataḥ 
dhyānena tapasā yukto vedāś cāpi puro 'bhavan

vedān uvāca devāpir namasya tu punaḥ punaḥ 
ṛtvigvākyaṃ cāgnivākyaṃ devavākyaṃ nyavedayat

paratantrā vayaṃ tāta īśvarasya vaśānugāḥ 
aśeṣajagadādhāro nirādhāro nirañjanaḥ

sarvaśaktyaikasadanaṃ nidhānaṃ sarvasaṃpadām 
sa tu kartā mahādevaḥ saṃhartā sa maheśvaraḥ

vayaṃ śabdamayā brahman vadāmo vidma eva ca 
asmākam etat kṛtyaṃ syād vadāmo yat tu pṛcchasi

kena nītās tasya nāma tatpuraṃ tadbalaṃ tathā 
bhakṣitāḥ kiṃ tu no naṣṭā etaj jānīmahe vayam

yathā ca tava sāmarthyaṃ yam ārādhya ca yatra ca 
syād ity etac ca jānīmo yathā prāpsyasi tān puraḥ
etac chrutvāvadad vedān vicārya suciraṃ hṛdi

vedā vadantv etad eva sarvam eva yathārthataḥ 
sarvān prāpsye talaṃ nītān alaṃ tebhyo namo 'stu vaḥ

gautamīṃ gaccha devāpe tatra stuhi maheśvaram 
suprasannas tavābhīṣṭaṃ dāsyaty eva kṛpākaraḥ

bhaved devaḥ śivaḥ prītaḥ stutaḥ satyaṃ mahāmate 
ārṣṭiṣeṇaś ca nṛpatis tasya jāyā jayā satī

pitā tavāpy upamanyus tale tiṣṭhanty arogiṇaḥ 
varadānān maheśasya mithuṃ hatvā ca rākṣasam 
yaśaḥ prāpsyasi dharmaṃ ca etac chakyaṃ na cetarat

tad vedavacanād bālo devāpir gautamīṃ gataḥ 
snātvā kṛtakṣaṇo vipras tuṣṭāva ca maheśvaram

bālo 'haṃ devadeveśa gurūṇāṃ tvaṃ gurur mama 
na me śaktis tvatstavane tubhyaṃ śaṃbho namo 'stu te

na tvāṃ jānanti nigamā na devā munayo na ca 
na brahmā nāpi vaikuṇṭho yo 'si so 'si namo 'stu te

ye 'nāthā ye ca kṛpaṇā ye daridrāś ca rogiṇaḥ 
pāpātmāno ye ca loke tāṃs tvaṃ pāsi maheśvara

tapasā niyamair mantraiḥ pūjitās tridivaukasaḥ 
tvayā dattaṃ phalaṃ tebhyo dāsyanti jagatāṃ pate

yācitāraś ca dātāras tebhyo yad yan manīṣitam 
bhavatīti na citraṃ syāt tvaṃ viparyayakārakaḥ

ye 'jñānino ye ca pāpā ye magnā narakārṇave 
śiveti vacanān nātha tān pāsi tvaṃ jagadguro
evaṃ tu stuvatas tasya puraḥ prāha trilocanaḥ
varaṃ brūhy atha devāpe alaṃ dainyena bālaka

rājānaṃ rājapatnīṃ ca pitaraṃ ca guruṃ mama 
prāptum icche jagannātha nidhanaṃ ca ripor mama

devāpivacanaṃ śrutvā tathety āhākhileśvaraḥ 
devāpeḥ sarvam abhavad ājñayā śaṃkarasya tat

punar apy āha taṃ śaṃbhur devāpikaruṇākaraḥ 
nandinaṃ preṣayām āsa śaṃbhuḥ śūlena nārada

rasātalaṃ mithuṃ nandī hatvā cāsurapuṃgavān 
tatpitrādīn samānīya tasmai tān sa nyavedayat

hayamedhaś ca tatrāsīd ārṣṭiṣeṇasya dhīmataḥ 
agniś ca ṛtvijo devā vedāś ca ṛṣayo 'bruvan

yatra sākṣād abhūc chaṃbhur devāpe bhaktavatsalaḥ 
devadevo jagannātho devatīrtham abhūc ca tat

sarvapāpakṣayakaraṃ sarvasiddhipradaṃ nṛṇām 
puṇyadaṃ tīrtham etat syāt tava kīrtiś ca śāśvatī

aśvamedhe nivṛtte tu surās tebhyo varān daduḥ 
snātvā kṛtārthā gaṅgāyāṃ tatas te divam ākraman

tataḥ prabhṛti tatrāsaṃs tīrthāni daśa pañca ca 
sahasrāṇi śatāny aṣṭāv ubhayor api tīrayoḥ 
teṣu snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca hy atīva phaladaṃ viduḥ

tapovanam iti khyātaṃ nandinīsaṃgamaṃ tathā 
siddheśvaraṃ tatra tīrthaṃ gautamyā dakṣiṇe taṭe

śārdūlaṃ ceti vikhyātaṃ teṣāṃ vṛttam idaṃ śṛṇu 
yasyākarṇanamātreṇa sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate

agnir hotā purā tv āsīd devānāṃ havyavāhanaḥ 
bhāryāṃ prāpto dakṣasutāṃ svāhānāmnīṃ surūpiṇīm

sānapatyā purā cāsīt putrārthaṃ tapa āviśat 
tapaś carantīṃ vipulaṃ toṣayantīṃ hutāśanam 
sa bhartā hutabhuk prāha bhāryāṃ svāhām aninditām
apatyāni bhaviṣyanti mā tapaḥ kuru śobhane

etac chrutvā bhartṛvākyaṃ nivṛttā tapaso 'bhavat 
strīṇām abhīṣṭadaṃ nānyad bhartṛvākyaṃ vinā kvacit

tataḥ katipaye kāle tārakād bhaya āgate 
anutpanne kārttikeye cirakālarahogate

maheśvare bhavānyā ca trastā devāḥ samāgatāḥ 
devānāṃ kāryasiddhyartham agniṃ procur divaukasaḥ

deva gaccha mahābhāga śaṃbhuṃ trailokyapūjitam 
tārakād bhayam utpannaṃ śaṃbhave tvaṃ nivedaya

na gantavyaṃ tatra deśe daṃpatyoḥ sthitayo rahaḥ 
sāmānyamātrato nyāyaḥ kiṃ punaḥ śūlapāṇini

ekāntasthitayoḥ svairaṃ jalpator yaḥ sarāgayoḥ 
daṃpatyoḥ śṛṇuyād vākyaṃ nirayāt tasya noddhṛtiḥ

sa svāmy akhilalokānāṃ mahākālas triśūlavān 
nirīkṣaṇīyaḥ kena syād bhavānyā rahasi sthitaḥ

mahābhaye cānugate nyāyaḥ ko 'nv atra varṇyate 
tārakād bhaya utpanne gaccha tvaṃ tārako bhavān

mahābhayābdhau sādhūnāṃ yat parārthāya jīvitam 
rūpeṇānyena vā gaccha vācaṃ vada yathā tathā

viśrāvya devavacanaṃ śaṃbhum āgaccha satvaraḥ 
tato dāsyāmahe pūjām ubhayor lokayoḥ kave

śuko bhūtvā jagāmāśu devavākyād dhutāśanaḥ 
yatrāsīj jagatāṃ nātho ramamāṇas tadomayā

sa bhītavad atha prāyāc chuko bhūtvā tadānalaḥ 
nāśakad dvāradeśe tu praveṣṭuṃ havyavāhanaḥ

tato gavākṣadeśe tu tasthau dhunvann adhomukhaḥ 
taṃ dṛṣṭvā prahasañ śaṃbhur umāṃ prāha rahogataḥ
paśya devi śukaṃ prāptaṃ devavākyād dhutāśanam

lajjitā cāvadad devam alaṃ deveti pārvatī 
puraścarantaṃ deveśo hy agniṃ taṃ dvijarūpiṇam

āhūya bahuśaś cāpi jñāto 'sy agne 'tra mā vada 
vidārayasva svamukhaṃ gṛhāṇedaṃ nayasva tat

ity uktvā tasya cāsye 'gne retaḥ sa prākṣipad bahu 
retogarbhas tadā cāgnir gantuṃ naiva ca śaktavān

suranadyās tatas tīraṃ śrānto 'gnir upatasthivān 
kṛttikāsu ca tad retaḥ prakṣepāt kārttiko 'bhavat

avaśiṣṭaṃ ca yat kiṃcid agner dehe ca śāṃbhavam 
tad eva reto vahnis tu svabhāryāyāṃ dvidhākṣipat

svāhāyāṃ priyabhūtāyāṃ putrārthinyāṃ viśeṣataḥ 
purā sāśvāsitā tena saṃtatis te bhaviṣyati

tad vahninātha saṃsmṛtya tat kṣiptaṃ śāṃbhavaṃ mahaḥ 
tad agne retasas tasyāṃ jajñe mithunam uttamam

suvarṇaś ca suvarṇā ca rūpeṇāpratimaṃ bhuvi 
agneḥ prītikaraṃ nityaṃ lokānāṃ prītivardhanam

agniḥ prītyā suvarṇāṃ tāṃ prādād dharmāya dhīmate 
suvarṇasyātha putrasya saṃkalpām akarot priyām 
evaṃ putrasya putryāś ca vivāham akarot kaviḥ

anyonyaretovyatiṣaṅgadoṣād agner apatyam ubhayaṃ tathaiva
putraḥ suvarṇo bahurūparūpī rūpāṇi kṛtvā surasattamānām

indrasya vāyor dhanadasya bhāryāṃ jaleśvarasyāpi munīśvarāṇām
bhāryās tu gacchaty aniśaṃ suvarṇo yasyāḥ priyaṃ yac ca vapuḥ sa kṛtvā

yāti kvacic cāpi kaves tanūjas tadbhartṛrūpaṃ ca pativratāsu
kṛtvāniśaṃ tābhir udārabhāvaḥ kurvan kṛtārthaṃ madanaṃ sa reme

kṛtvā gatā kvāpi caivaṃ suvarṇā dharmasya bhāryāpi suvarṇanāmnī
svāhāsutā svairiṇī sā babhūva yasyāpi yasyāpi manogatā yā

bhāryāsvarūpā saiva bhūtvā suvarṇā reme patīn mānuṣān āsurāṃś ca
devān ṛṣīn pitṛrūpāṃs tathānyān rūpaudāryasthairyagāmbhīryayuktān

yābhipretā yasya devasya bhāryā tadrūpā sā ramate tena sārdham
nānābhedaiḥ karaṇaiś cāpy anekair ākarṣantī tanmanaḥ kāmasiddhim

evaṃ suvarṇasya nirīkṣya ceṣṭām agneḥ sūnoḥ putrikāyās tathāgneḥ
sarve ca śepuḥ kupitās tadāgneḥ putraṃ ca putrīṃ ca surāsurās te

kṛtaṃ yad etad vyabhicārarūpaṃ yac chadmanā vartanaṃ pāparūpam
tasmāt sutas te vyabhicāravāṃś ca sarvatra gāmī jāyatāṃ havyavāha

tathā suvarṇāpi na caikaniṣṭhā bhūyād agne naikatṛptā bahūṃś ca
nānājātīn ninditān dehabhājo bhajitrī syād eṣa doṣaś ca putryāḥ

ity etac chāpavacanaṃ śrutvāgnir atibhītavat 
mām abhyetya tadovāca niṣkṛtiṃ vada putrayoḥ

tadāham abravaṃ vahne gautamīṃ gaccha śaṃkaram 
stutvā tatra mahābāho nivedaya jagatpateḥ

māheśvareṇa vīryeṇa tava dehasthitena ca 
evaṃvidhaṃ tv apatyaṃ te jātaṃ vahne tato bhavān

nivedayasva devāya devānāṃ śāpam īdṛśam 
svāpatyarakṣaṇāyāsau śaṃbhuḥ śreyaḥ kariṣyati

stuhi devaṃ ca devīṃ ca bhaktyā prīto bhavec chivaḥ 
tatas tv apatyaviṣaye priyān kāmān avāpsyasi

tato madvacanād agnir gaṅgāṃ gatvā maheśvaram 
tuṣṭāva niyato vākyaiḥ stutibhir vedasaṃmitaiḥ

viśvasya jagato dhātā viśvamūrtir nirañjanaḥ 
ādikartā svayaṃbhūś ca taṃ namāmi jagatpatim

yo 'gnir bhūtvā saṃharati sraṣṭā vai jalarūpataḥ 
sūryarūpeṇa yaḥ pāti taṃ namāmi ca tryambakam

tataḥ prasanno bhagavān anantaḥ śaṃbhur avyayaḥ 
vareṇa cchandayām āsa pāvakaṃ surapūjitam

sa vinītaḥ śivaṃ prāha tava vīryaṃ mayi sthitam 
tena jātaḥ suto ramyaḥ suvarṇo lokaviśrutaḥ

tathā suvarṇā putrī ca tasmād eva jagatprabho 
anyonyavīryasaṅgāc ca taddoṣād ubhayaṃ tv idam

vyabhicārāt sadoṣaṃ ca apatyam abhavac chiva 
śāpaṃ daduḥ surāḥ sarve tayoḥ śāntiṃ kuru prabho
tadagnivacanāc chaṃbhuḥ provācedaṃ śubhodayam

madvīryād abhavat tvattaḥ suvarṇo bhūrivikramaḥ 
samagrā ṛddhayaḥ sarvāḥ suvarṇe 'smin samāhitāḥ

bhaviṣyanti na saṃdeho vahne śṛṇu vaco mama 
trayāṇām api lokānāṃ pāvanaḥ sa bhaviṣyati

sa eva cāmṛtaṃ loke sa eva suravallabhaḥ 
sa eva bhuktimuktī ca sa eva makhadakṣiṇā

sa eva rūpaṃ sarvasya gurūṇām apy asau guruḥ 
vīryaṃ śreṣṭhatamaṃ vidyād vīryaṃ matto yad uttamam

viśeṣatas tvayi kṣiptaṃ tasya kā syād vicāraṇā 
hīnaṃ tena vinā sarvaṃ saṃpūrṇās tena saṃpadaḥ

jīvanto 'pi mṛtāḥ sarve suvarṇena vinā narāḥ 
nirguṇo 'pi dhanī mānyaḥ saguṇo 'py adhano nahi

tasmān nātaḥ paraṃ kiṃcit suvarṇād dhi bhaviṣyati 
tathā caiṣā suvarṇāpi syād utkṛṣṭāpi cañcalā

anayā vīkṣitaṃ sarvaṃ nyūnaṃ pūrṇaṃ bhaviṣyati 
tapasā japahomaiś ca yeyaṃ prāpyā jagattraye

tasyāḥ prabhāvaṃ prāśastyam agne kiṃcic ca kīrtyate 
sarvatra yā tu saṃtiṣṭhed āyātu vicariṣyati

suvarṇā kamalā sākṣāt pavitrā ca bhaviṣyati 
adya prabhṛty ātmajayos tathā svairaṃ viceṣṭatoḥ
tathāpi caitayoḥ puṇyaṃ na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati

evam uktvā tataḥ śaṃbhuḥ sākṣāt tatrābhavac chivaḥ 
liṅgarūpeṇa sarveṣāṃ lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā

varān prāpya sutābhyāṃ sa agnis tuṣṭo 'bhavat tataḥ 
svabhartrā ca suvarṇā sā dharmeṇāgnisutā mudā

vartayām āsa putro 'pi vahneḥ saṃkalpayā mudā 
etasminn antare svarṇām agner duhitaraṃ mune

paribhūya ca dharmaṃ taṃ śārdūlo dānaveśvaraḥ 
aharad bhāgyasaubhāgyavilāsavasatiṃ chalāt

nītā rasātalaṃ tena suvarṇā lokaviśrutā 
jāmātāgneḥ sa dharmaś ca agniś caiva sa havyavāṭ

viṣṇave lokanāthāya stutvā caiva punaḥ punaḥ 
kāryavijñāpanaṃ cobhau cakratuḥ prabhaviṣṇave

tataś cakreṇa ciccheda śārdūlasya śiro hariḥ 
sānītā viṣṇunā devī suvarṇā lokasundarī

maheśvarasutā caiva agneś caiva tathā priyā 
maheśvarāya tāṃ viṣṇur darśayām āsa nārada

prīto 'bhavan maheśo 'pi sasvaje tāṃ punaḥ punaḥ 
cakraṃ prakṣālitaṃ yatra śārdūlacchedi dīptimat

cakratīrthaṃ tu vikhyātaṃ śārdūlaṃ ceti tad viduḥ 
yatra nītā suvarṇā sā viṣṇunā śaṃkarāntikam

tat tīrthaṃ śāṃkaraṃ jñeyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ siddham eva tu 
yatrānandam anuprāpto hy agnir dharmaś ca śāśvataḥ

ānandāśrūṇi nyapatan yatrāgner munisattama 
ānandeti nadī jātā tathā vai nandinīti ca

tasyāś ca saṃgamaḥ puṇyo gaṅgāyāṃ tatra vai śivaḥ 
tatraiva saṃgame sākṣāt suvarṇādyāpi saṃsthitā

dākṣāyaṇī saiva śivā āgneyī ceti viśrutā 
ambikā jagadādhārā śivā kātyāyanīśvarī

bhaktābhīṣṭapradā nityam alaṃkṛtyobhayaṃ taṭam 
tapas tepe yatra cāgnis tat tīrthaṃ tu tapovanam

evamādīni tīrthāni tīrayor ubhayor mune 
teṣu snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca sarvakāmapradaṃ śubham

uttare caiva pāre ca sahasrāṇi caturdaśa 
dakṣiṇe ca tathā pāre sahasrāṇy atha ṣoḍaśa

tatra tatra ca tīrthāni sābhijñānāni santi vai 
nāmāni ca pṛthak santi saṃkṣepāt tan mayocyate

etāni yaś ca śṛṇuyād yaś ca vā paṭhati smaret 
sarveṣu tatra kāmyeṣu paripūrṇo bhaven naraḥ

etad vṛttaṃ tu yo jñātvā tatra snānādikaṃ caret 
lakṣmīvāñ jāyate nityaṃ dharmavāṃś ca viśeṣataḥ

abjakāt paścime tīrthaṃ tac chārdūlam udāhṛtam 
vārāṇasyāditīrthebhyaḥ sarvebhyo hy adhikaṃ bhavet

tatra snātvā pitṝn devān vandate tarpayaty api 
sarvapāpavinirmukto viṣṇuloke mahīyate

tapovanāc ca śārdūlān madhye tīrthāny aśeṣataḥ 
tasyaikaikasya māhātmyaṃ na kenāpy atra varṇyate

indratīrtham iti khyātaṃ tatraiva ca vṛṣākapam 
phenāyāḥ saṃgamo yatra hanūmataṃ tathaiva ca

abjakaṃ cāpi yat proktaṃ yatra devas trivikramaḥ 
tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca punarāvṛttidurlabham

tatra vṛttāny athākhyāsye gaṅgāyā dakṣiṇe taṭe 
indreśvaraṃ cottare ca śṛṇu bhaktyā yatavrataḥ

namucir balavān āsīd indraśatrur madotkaṭaḥ 
tasyendreṇābhavad yuddhaṃ phenenendro 'harac chiraḥ

apāṃ ca namuceḥ śatros tatphenavajrarūpadhṛk 
śiraś chittvā tac ca phenaṃ gaṅgāyā dakṣiṇe taṭe

nyapatad bhūmiṃ bhittvā tu rasātalam athāviśat 
rasātalabhavaṃ gāṅgaṃ vāri yad viśvapāvanam

vajrādiṣṭena mārgeṇa vyagamad bhūmimaṇḍalam 
taj jalaṃ phenanāmnā tu nadī pheneti gadyate

tasyās tu saṃgamaḥ puṇyo gaṅgayā lokaviśrutaḥ 
sarvapāpakṣayakaro gaṅgāyamunayor iva

hanūmadupamātā vai yatrāplavanamātrataḥ 
mārjāratvād abhūn muktā viṣṇugaṅgāprasādataḥ

mārjāraṃ ceti tat tīrthaṃ purā proktaṃ mayā tava 
hanūmataṃ ca tat proktaṃ tatrākhyānaṃ puroditam

vṛṣākapaṃ cābjakaṃ ca tatredaṃ prayataḥ śṛṇu 
hiraṇya iti vikhyāto daityānāṃ pūrvajo balī

tapas taptvā suraiḥ sarvair ajeyo 'bhūt sudāruṇaḥ 
tasyāpi balavān putro devānāṃ durjayaḥ sadā

mahāśanir iti khyātas tasya bhāryā parājitā 
tenendrasyābhavad yuddhaṃ bahukālaṃ nirantaram

mahāśanir mahāvīryaḥ satataṃ raṇamūrdhani 
jitvā nāgena sahitaṃ śakraṃ pitre nyavedayat

baddhvā hastisamāyuktaṃ svasāraṃ vīkṣya tāṃ tadā 
vihāya krūratāṃ daityo hiraṇyāya nyavedayat

mahāśanipitā daityaḥ pūrveṣāṃ pūrvavattaraḥ 
śacīkāntaṃ tale sthāpya tasya rakṣām athākarot

mahāśanir hariṃ jitvā jetuṃ varuṇam abhyagāt 
varuṇo 'pi mahābuddhiḥ prādāt kanyāṃ mahāśaneḥ

udadhiṃ svālayaṃ prādād varuṇas tu mahāśaneḥ 
tayoś ca sakhyam abhavad varuṇasya mahāśaneḥ

vāruṇī cāpi yā kanyā sā priyābhūn mahāśaneḥ 
vīryeṇa yaśasā cāpi śauryeṇa ca balena ca

mahāśanir mahādaityas trailokye nopamīyate 
nirindratvaṃ gate loke devāḥ sarve nyamantrayan

viṣṇur evendradātā syād daityahantā sa eva ca 
mantradṛg vā sa eva syād indraṃ cānyaṃ kariṣyati

evaṃ saṃmantrya te devā viṣṇor mantraṃ nyavedayan 
mamāvadhyo mahādaityo mahāśanir iti bruvan

prāyād vārīśvaraṃ viṣṇuḥ śvaśuraṃ varuṇaṃ tadā 
keśavo varuṇaṃ gatvā prāhendrasya parābhavam

tathā tvayaitat kartavyaṃ yathāyāti puraṃdaraḥ 
tadviṣṇuvacanāc chīghraṃ yayau jalapatir mune

sutāpatiṃ hiraṇyasutaṃ vikrāntaṃ taṃ mahāśanim 
atisaṃmānitas tena jāmātrā varuṇaḥ prabhuḥ

papracchāgamanaṃ daityo vinayāc chvaśuraṃ tadā 
varuṇaḥ prāha taṃ daityaṃ yad āgamanakāraṇam

indraṃ dehi mahābāho yas tvayā nirjitaḥ purā 
baddhaṃ rasātalasthaṃ taṃ devānām adhipaṃ sakhe

asmākaṃ sarvadā mānyaṃ dehi tvaṃ mama śatruhan 
baddhvā vimokṣaṇaṃ śatror mahate yaśase satām

tathety uktvā kathaṃcit sa daityeśo varuṇāya tam 
prādād indraṃ śacīkāntaṃ vāraṇena samanvitam

sa daityamadhye 'tivirājamāno hariṃ tadovāca jaleśasaṃnidhau
saṃpūjya caivātha mahopacārair mahāśanir maghavantaṃ babhāṣe

kena tvam indro 'dya kṛto 'si kena vīryaṃ tavedṛg bahu bhāṣase ca
tvaṃ saṃgare śatrubhir bādhyase ca tathāpi cendro bhavasīti citram

athāpi baddhā puruṣeṇa kācit tasyāḥ patis tāṃ mocayatīti yuktam
striyo 'svatantrāḥ puruṣapradhānās tvaṃ vai pumān bhavitā śakra sādho

baddho mayā saṃgare vāhanena kvāpy astraṃ te vajram uddāmaśakti
cintāratnaṃ nandanaṃ yoṣitas tā yaśo balaṃ devarājopabhogyam

taj jīvanaṃ yat tu yaśonidhānaṃ sa eva mṛtyur yaśaso yad virodhi
evaṃ jānañ śakra kathaṃ jaleśān muktiṃ prāpto naiva lajjāṃ bhajethāḥ

triviṣṭapasthaḥ pariveṣṭitaḥ san sarvaiḥ suraiḥ kāntayā vījyamānaḥ
saṃstūyamānaś ca tathāpsarobhir nūnaṃ lajjā te bibhetīti manye

tvaṃ vṛtrahā namuceś cāpi hantā purāṃ bhettā gotrabhid vajrabāhuḥ
evaṃ surās tvāṃ paripūjayantīty ato jiṣṇo sarvam etat tyajasva

vikāram āpyāpy ahitodbhavaṃ ye jīvanti lokān anusaṃviśanti
bhavādṛśāṃ duścyavanābjajanmā kathaṃ na hṛdbhedam avāpa kartā

evam uktvā tu daityeśo varuṇāya mahātmane 
prādād indraṃ punaś cedaṃ vacanaṃ tad abhāṣata

adya prabhṛty asau śiṣya indraḥ syād varuṇo guruḥ 
śvaśuro mama yena tvaṃ muktim āpto 'si vāsava

tathā tvaṃ bhṛtyabhāvena vartethā varuṇaṃ prati 
no ced baddhvā punas tvāṃ vai kṣepsye caiva rasātalam

evaṃ nirbhartsya taṃ śakraṃ hasaṃś cāpi punaḥ punaḥ 
abravīd gaccha gaccheti varuṇaṃ cānumanya tu

sa tu prāptaḥ svanilayaṃ lajjayā kaluṣīkṛtaḥ 
paulomyāṃ prāha tat sarvaṃ yat tac chatruparābhavam

evam uktaḥ kṛtaś caiva śatruṇāhaṃ varānane 
nirvāpayāmi yena svam ātmānaṃ subhage vada

dānavānām athodbhūtiṃ śakra māyāṃ parābhavam 
varadānaṃ tathā mṛtyuṃ jāne 'haṃ balasūdana

tasmād yasmāt tasya mṛtyur athavāpi parābhavaḥ 
jāyeta śṛṇu tat sarvaṃ vakṣye 'haṃ prītaye tava

hiraṇyasya suto vīraḥ pitṛvyasya suto balī 
tasmān mama syāt sa bhrātā varadānāc ca darpitaḥ

brahmāṇaṃ toṣayām āsa tapasā niyamena ca 
īdṛśaṃ balam āpannaṃ tapasā kiṃ na sidhyati

tasmāt tvayā cittarāgo vismayo vā kathaṃcana 
na kāryaḥ śṛṇu tatredaṃ kāryaṃ yat tu kramāgatam
evam uktvā tu paulomī prāhendraṃ vinayānvitā

nāsādhyam asti tapaso nāsādhyaṃ yajñakarmaṇaḥ 
nāsādhyaṃ lokanāthasya viṣṇor bhaktyā harasya ca

punaś cedaṃ mayā kānta śrutam asty atiśobhanam 
strīṇāṃ svabhāvaṃ jānanti striya eva surādhipa

tasmād bhūmes tathā cāpāṃ nāsādhyaṃ vidyate prabho 
tapo vā yajñakarmādi tābhyām eva yato bhavet

tatrāpi tīrthabhūtā tu yā bhūmis tāṃ vrajed bhavān 
tatra viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ pūjya sarvān kāmān avāpsyasi

śrutam asti punaś cedaṃ striyo yāś ca pativratāḥ 
tā eva sarvaṃ jānanti dhṛtaṃ tābhiś carācaram

pṛthivyāṃ sārabhūtaṃ syāt tanmadhye daṇḍakaṃ vanam 
tatra gaṅgā jagaddhātrī tatreśaṃ pūjaya prabho

viṣṇuṃ vā jagatām īśaṃ dīnārtārtiharaṃ vibhum 
anāthānām iha nṛṇāṃ majjatāṃ duḥkhasāgare

haro harir vā gaṅgā vā kvāpy anyac charaṇaṃ nahi 
tasmāt sarvaprayatnena toṣayaitān samāhitaḥ

bhaktyā stotraiś ca tapasā kuru caiva mayā saha 
tataḥ prāpsyasi kalyāṇam īśaviṣṇuprasādajam

ajñātvaikaguṇaṃ karma phalaṃ dāsyati karmiṇaḥ 
jñātvā śataguṇaṃ tat syād bhāryayā ca tad akṣayam

puṃsaḥ sarveṣu kāryeṣu bhāryaiveha sahāyinī 
svalpānām api kāryāṇāṃ nahi siddhis tayā vinā

ekena yat kṛtaṃ karma tasmād ardhaphalaṃ bhavet 
jāyayā tu kṛtaṃ nātha puṣkalaṃ puruṣo labhet

tasmād etat suviditam ardho jāyā iti śruteḥ 
śrūyate daṇḍakāraṇye saricchreṣṭhāsti gautamī

aśeṣāghapraśamanī sarvābhīṣṭapradāyinī 
tasmād gaccha mayā tatra kuru puṇyaṃ mahāphalam
tataḥ śatrūn nihatyājau mahat sukham avāpsyasi

tathety uktvā sa guruṇā bhāryayā ca śatakratuḥ 
yayau gaṅgāṃ jagaddhātrīṃ gautamīṃ ceti viśrutām

daṇḍakāraṇyamadhyasthāṃ yayau sa prītimān hariḥ 
tapaḥ kartuṃ manaś cakre devadevāya śaṃbhave

gaṅgāṃ natvā tu prathamaṃ snātvā ca sa kṛtāñjaliḥ 
śivaikaśaraṇo bhūtvā stotraṃ cedaṃ tato 'bravīt

svamāyayā yo hy akhilaṃ carācaraṃ sṛjaty avaty atti na sajjate 'smin
ekaḥ svatantro 'dvayacit sukhātmakaḥ sa naḥ prasanno 'stu pinākapāṇiḥ

na yasya tattvaṃ sanakādayo 'pi jānanti vedāntarahasyavijñāḥ
sa pārvatīśaḥ sakalābhilāṣa dātā prasanno 'stu mamāndhakāriḥ

sṛṣṭvā svayaṃbhūr bhagavān viriñciṃ bhayaṃkaraṃ cāsya śiro 'nvapaśyat
chittvā nakhāgrair nakhasaktam etac cikṣepa tasmād abhavat trivargaḥ

pāpaṃ daridraṃ tv atha lobhayācñe moho vipac ceti tato 'py anantam
jātaprabhāvaṃ bhavaduḥkharūpaṃ babhūva tair vyāptam idaṃ samastam

avekṣya sarvaṃ cakitaḥ sureśo devīm avocaj jagad astam eti
tvaṃ pāhi lokeśvari lokamātar ume śaraṇye subhage subhadre

jagatpratiṣṭhe varade jaya tvaṃ bhuktiḥ samādhiḥ paramā ca muktiḥ
svāhā svadhā svastir anādisiddhir gīr buddhir āsīr ajarāmare tvam

vidyādirūpeṇa jagattraye tvaṃ rakṣāṃ karoṣy eva madājñayā ca
tvayaiva sṛṣṭaṃ bhuvanatrayaṃ syād yataḥ prakṛtyaiva tathaiva citram

ity evam uktā dayitā hareṇa saṃśleṣasaṃlāpaparā babhūva
śrāntā bhavasyārdhatanau sulagnā cikṣepa ca svedajalaṃ karāgraiḥ

tasmād babhūva prathamaṃ sa dharmo lakṣmīr atho dānam atho suvṛṣṭiḥ
sattvaṃ susaṃpannadharaṃ sarāṃsi dhānyāni puṣpāṇi phalāni caiva

saubhāgyavastūni vapuḥ suveṣaḥ śṛṅgārabhājīni mahauṣadhāni
nṛtyāni gītāny amṛtaṃ purāṇaṃ śrutismṛtī nītir athānnapāne

śastrāṇi śāstrāṇi gṛhopayogyāny astrāṇi tīrthāni ca kānanāni
iṣṭāni pūrtāni ca maṅgalāni yānāni śubhrābharaṇāsanāni

bhavāṅgasaṃsargasusaṃprahāsa susvedasaṃlāparahaḥprakāraiḥ
tathaiva jātaṃ sacarācaraṃ ca apāpakaṃ devi tataś ca jātam

sukhaṃ prabhūtaṃ ca śubhaṃ ca nityaṃ virāji caitat tava devi bhāvāt
tasmāt tu māṃ rakṣa jagajjanitri bhītaṃ bhayebhyo jagatāṃ pradhāne

eke tarkair vimuhyanti līyante tatra cāpare 
śivaśaktyos tadādvaitaṃ sundaraṃ naumi vigraham
evaṃ tu stuvatas tasya purastād abhavac chivaḥ
kim abhīṣṭaṃ varayase hare vada parāyaṇam

balavān me ripuś cāsīd darśanaiś ca śanir yathā 
tena baddhas talaṃ nītaḥ paribhūtas tv anekadhā

vāksāyakais tathā viddhas tadvadhāya tv iyaṃ kṛtiḥ 
tadarthaṃ jagatām īśa yena jeṣye ripuṃ prabho

tad eva dehi vīryaṃ me yac cānyad ripunāśanam 
jātaḥ parābhavo yasmāt tadvināśe kṛte sati 
punarjātam ahaṃ manye varaṃ kīrtir jayaśriyoḥ

sa śivaḥ śakram āhedaṃ na mayaikena te ripuḥ 
vadham āpnoti tasmāt tvaṃ viṣṇum apy avyayaṃ harim

ārādhayasva paulomyā saha devaṃ janārdanam 
lokatrayaikaśaraṇaṃ nārāyaṇam ananyadhīḥ

tataḥ prāpsyasi tasmāc ca mattaś cāpi priyaṃ hare 
punaś covāca bhagavān ādikartā maheśvaraḥ

mantrābhyāsas tapo vāpi yogābhyasanam eva ca 
saṃgame yatra kutrāpi siddhidaṃ munayo viduḥ

kiṃ punaḥ saṃgame vipra gautamīsindhuphenayoḥ 
girīṇāṃ gahvare yad vā saritām atha saṃgame

vipro dhiyaiva bhavati mukundāṅghriniviṣṭayā 
gaṅgāyā dakṣiṇe tīra āpastambo munīśvaraḥ

āste tasyāpy ahaṃ toṣam agamaṃ balasūdana 
tena tvaṃ bhāryayā caiva toṣayasva gadādharam

āpastambena sahito gaṅgāyā dakṣiṇe taṭe 
tuṣṭāva devaṃ prayataḥ snātvā puṇye 'tha saṃgame

phenāyāś caiva gaṅgāyās tatra devaṃ janārdanam 
vaidikair vividhair mantrais tapasātoṣayat tadā

tatas tuṣṭo 'bhavad viṣṇuḥ kiṃ deyaṃ cety abhāṣata 
dehi me śatruhantāram ity āha bhagavān hariḥ

dattam ity eva jānīhi tam uvāca janārdanaḥ 
tatrābhavac chivasyaiva gaṅgāviṣṇvoḥ prasādataḥ

ambhasā puruṣo jātaḥ śivaviṣṇusvarūpadhṛk 
cakrapāṇiḥ śūladharaḥ sa gatvā tu rasātalam

nijaghāna tadā daityam indraśatruṃ mahāśanim 
sakhābhavat sa cendrasya abjakaḥ sa vṛṣākapiḥ

divistho 'pi sadā cendras tam anveti vṛṣākapim 
kupitā praṇayenābhūd anyāsaktaṃ vilokya tam 
śacīṃ tāṃ sāntvayann āha śatamanyur hasann idam

nāham indrāṇi śaraṇam ṛte sakhyur vṛṣākapeḥ 
vāri vāpi havir yasya agneḥ priyakaraṃ sadā

nāham anyatra gantāsmi priye cāṅgena te śape 
tasmān nārhasi māṃ vaktuṃ śaṅkayānyatra bhāmini

pativratā priyā me tvaṃ dharme mantre sahāyinī 
sāpatyā ca kulīnā ca tvatto 'nyā kā priyā mama

tasmāt tavopadeśena gaṅgāṃ prāpya mahānadīm 
prasādād devadevasya viṣṇor vai cakrapāṇinaḥ

tathā śivasya devasya prasādāc ca vṛṣākapeḥ 
jalodbhavāc ca me mitrād abjakāl lokaviśrutāt

uttīrṇaduḥkhaḥ subhage ita indro 'ham acyutaḥ 
kiṃ na sādhyaṃ yatra bhāryā bhartṛcittānugāminī

duṣkarā tatra no muktiḥ kiṃtv arthāditrayaṃ śubhe 
jāyaiva paramaṃ mitraṃ lokadvayahitaiṣiṇī

sā cet kulīnā priyabhāṣiṇī ca pativratā rūpavatī guṇāḍhyā
saṃpatsu cāpatsu samānarūpā tayā hy asādhyaṃ kim iha trilokyām

tasmāt tava dhiyā kānte mamedaṃ śubham āgatam 
itas tavoditaṃ caiva kartavyaṃ nānyad asti me

paraloke ca dharme ca satputrasadṛśaṃ na ca 
ārtasya puruṣasyeha bhāryāvad bheṣajaṃ nahi

niḥśreyasapadaprāptyai tathā pāpasya muktaye 
gaṅgayā sadṛśaṃ nāsti śṛṇu cānyad varānane

dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ prāptaye pāpamuktaye 
śivaviṣṇvor ananyatvajñānān nāsty atra muktaye

tasmāt tava dhiyā sādhvi sarvam etan manogatam 
avāptaṃ ca śivād viṣṇor gaṅgāyāś ca prasādataḥ

indratvaṃ me sthiraṃ ceto manye mitrabalāt punaḥ 
vṛṣākapir mama sakhā yo jātas tv apsu bhāmini

tvaṃ ca priyasakhī nityaṃ nānyat priyataraṃ mama 
tīrthānāṃ gautamī gaṅgā devānāṃ hariśaṃkarau

tasmād ebhyaḥ prasādena sarvaṃ cepsitam āptavān 
mama prītikaraṃ cedaṃ tīrthaṃ trailokyaviśrutam

tasmād etad dhi yāciṣye devān sarvān anukramāt 
anumanyantu ṛṣayo gaṅgā ca hariśaṃkarau

indreśvare cābjake ca ubhayos tīrayoḥ surāḥ 
ekatra śaṃkaro devo hy aparatra janārdanaḥ

pāvayan daṇḍakāraṇyaṃ sākṣād viṣṇus trivikramaḥ 
antare yāni tīrthāni sarvapuṇyapradāni ca

atra tu snānamātreṇa sarve te muktim āpnuyuḥ 
pāpiṣṭhāḥ pāpato muktim āpnuyur ye ca dharmiṇaḥ

teṣāṃ tu paramā muktiḥ pitṛbhiḥ pañcapañcabhiḥ 
atra kiṃcic ca ye dadyur arthibhyas tilamātrakam

dātṛbhyo hy akṣayaṃ tat syāt kāmadaṃ mokṣadaṃ tathā 
dhanyaṃ yaśasyam āyuṣyam ārogyaṃ puṇyavardhanam

ākhyānaṃ viṣṇuśaṃbhvoś ca jñātvā snānāc ca muktidam 
asya tīrthasya māhātmyaṃ ye śṛṇvanti paṭhanti ca

puṇyabhājo bhaveyus te tebhyo 'traiva smṛtir bhavet 
śivaviṣṇvor aśeṣāghasaṃghavicchedakāriṇī 
yāṃ prārthayanti munayo vijitendriyamānasāḥ

bhaviṣyaty evam eveti taṃ devā ṛṣayo 'bruvan 
gautamyā uttare pāre tīrthānāṃ mokṣadāyinām

devarṣisiddhasevyānāṃ sahasrāṇy atha sapta vai 
tathaiva dakṣiṇe tīre tīrthāny ekādaśaiva tu

abjakaṃ hṛdayaṃ proktaṃ godāvaryā munīśvaraiḥ 
viśrāmasthānam īśasya viṣṇor brahmaṇa eva ca

āpastambam iti khyātaṃ tīrthaṃ trailokyaviśrutam 
smaraṇād apy aśeṣāghasaṃghavidhvaṃsanakṣamam

āpastambo mahāprājño munir āsīn mahāyaśāḥ 
tasya bhāryākṣasūtreti patidharmaparāyaṇā

tasya putro mahāprājñaḥ karkināmātha tattvavit 
tasyāśramam anuprāpto hy agastyo munisattamaḥ

tam agastyaṃ pūjayitvā āpastambo munīśvaraḥ 
śiṣyair anugato dhīmāṃs taṃ praṣṭum upacakrame
