tataḥ provāca muditā vainateyasya mātaram

surāṇāṃ netu nilayaṃ garuḍo matsutān iti 
punaḥ prāha sarpamātā garuḍaṃ vinayānvitam

putrā me draṣṭum icchanti haṃsaṃ trijagatāṃ gurum 
namaskṛtvā tataḥ sūryam eṣyanti nilayaṃ mama 
haṇḍe tvaṃ naya putrān me sūryamaṇḍalam anvaham
sā vepamānā vinatā dīnā kadrūm abhāṣata

nāhaṃ kṣamā sarpamātaḥ putro me neṣyate sutān 
dṛṣṭvā dinakaraṃ devaṃ punar eva prayāntu te

vinatā svasutaṃ prāha vihagānām adhīśvaram 
namaskartum athecchanti nāgāḥ svāmitvam āgatāḥ

bhāsvantam ity uvāceyaṃ māṃ sarpajananī haṭhāt 
tathety uktvā sa garuḍo mām ārohantu pannagāḥ

tadārūḍhaṃ sarpasainyaṃ garuḍaṃ vihagādhipam 
śanaiḥ śanair upagamad yatra devo divākaraḥ 
te dahyamānās tīkṣṇena bhānutāpena vivyathuḥ

nivartasva mahāprājña pataṃgāya namo namaḥ 
alaṃ sūryasya sadanaṃ dagdhāḥ sūryasya tejasā 
yāmas tvayā vā garuḍa vihāya tvām athāpi vā

evaṃ nāgair ucyamāna ādityaṃ darśayāmi vaḥ 
ity uktvā gaganaṃ śīghraṃ jagāmādityasaṃmukhaḥ

dagdhabhogā nipetus te dvīpaṃ taṃ vīraṇaṃ prati 
bahavaḥ śatasāhasrāḥ pīḍitā dagdhavigrahāḥ

putrāṇām ārtasaṃnādaṃ patitānāṃ mahītale 
āśvāsituṃ samāyātā tān sā kadrūḥ suvihvalā

uvāca vinatāṃ kadrūs tava putro 'tiduṣkṛtam 
kṛtavān atidurmedhā yeṣāṃ śāntir na vidyate

nānyathā kartum āyāti svāmivākyaṃ phaṇīśvaraḥ 
sa kāśyapo bṛhattejā yady atra syād anāmayam

bhavec caivaṃ kathaṃ śāntiḥ putrāṇāṃ mama bhāmini 
kadrvās tad vacanaṃ śrutvā vinatā hy atibhītavat
putram āha mahātmānaṃ garuḍaṃ vihagādhipam

nedaṃ yuktataraṃ putra bhūṣaṇaṃ vinayena hi 
vartituṃ yuktam ity uktaṃ vaiparītyaṃ na yujyate

nāmitreṣv api kartavyaṃ sadbhir jihmaṃ kadācana 
śrotriye cāntyaje vāpi samaṃ candraḥ prakāśate

kurvanty aniṣṭaṃ kapaṭais ta eva mama putraka 
prasahya kartuṃ ye sākṣād aśaktāḥ puruṣādhamāḥ
vinatā ca tataḥ prāha kadrūṃ tāṃ sarpamātaram

kiṃ kṛtvā śāntir abhyeti putrāṇāṃ te karomi tat 
jarayā tu gṛhītās te vada śāntiṃ karomi tat

kadrūr apy āha vinatāṃ rasātalagataṃ payaḥ 
tenābhiṣecitānāṃ me putrāṇāṃ śāntir eṣyati

kadrvās tad vacanaṃ śrutvā rasātalagataṃ payaḥ 
kṣaṇenaiva samānīya nāgāṃs tān abhyaṣecayat 
tataḥ provāca garuḍo maghavānaṃ śatakratum
meghāś cāpy atra varṣantu trailokyasyopakāriṇaḥ

tathā vavarṣa parjanyo nāgānām abhavac chivam 
rasātalabhavaṃ gāṅgaṃ nāgasaṃjīvanaṃ payaḥ

jarāśokavināśārtham ānītaṃ garuḍena yat 
yatrābhiṣecitā nāgās tan nāgālayam ucyate

garuḍena yato vāri ānītaṃ tad rasātalāt 
tad gāṅgaṃ vāri sarveṣāṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam

jarāyā vāraṇaṃ yasmān nāgānām abhavac chivam 
rasātalabhavaṃ gāṅgaṃ nāgasaṃjīvanaṃ yataḥ

jarāśokavināśārthaṃ gaṅgāyā dakṣiṇe taṭe 
sākṣād amṛtasaṃvāhā vañjarā sābhavan nadī

jarādāridryasaṃtāpahāriṇī kleśavāriṇī 
rasātalabhavā gaṅgā martyalokabhavā tu yā

tayoś ca saṃgamo yaḥ syāt kiṃ punas tatra varṇyate 
yasyānusmaraṇād eva nāśaṃ yānty aghasaṃcayāḥ

tatra ca snānadānānāṃ phalaṃ ko vaktum īśvaraḥ 
sapādaṃ tatra tīrthānāṃ lakṣam āhur manīṣiṇaḥ

sarvasaṃpattidātṝṇāṃ sarvapāpaughahāriṇām 
vañjarāsaṃgamasamaṃ tīrthaṃ kvāpi na vidyate 
yadanusmaraṇenāpi vipadyante vipattayaḥ

devāgamaṃ nāma tīrthaṃ sarvakāmapradaṃ śivam 
bhuktimuktipradaṃ nṝṇāṃ pitṝṇāṃ tṛptikārakam

tatra vṛttaṃ samākhyāsye tava yatnena nārada 
devānām asurāṇāṃ ca spardhābhūd dhanahetave

svargaḥ surāṇām abhavad asurāṇām ilābhavat 
karmabhūmim avaṣṭabhya asurāḥ sarvato 'bhavan

devānāṃ yajñabhāgāṃś ca dātṝn ghnanty asurās tataḥ 
tataḥ suragaṇāḥ sarve yajñabhāgair vinā kṛtāḥ

vyathitā mām upājagmuḥ kiṃ kṛtyam iti cābruvan 
mayā coktāḥ suragaṇā yuddhe jitvāsurān balāt

bhuvaṃ prāpsyatha karmāṇi havīṃṣi ca yaśāṃsi ca 
tathety uktvā gatā devā bhūmiṃ te samarārthinaḥ

daityāś ca dānavāś caiva rākṣasā baladarpitāḥ 
ekībhūtvā yayus te 'pi jayino yuddhakāṅkṣiṇaḥ

ahir vṛtro balis tvāṣṭrir namuciḥ śambaro mayaḥ 
ete cānye ca bahavo yoddhāro baladarpitāḥ

agnir indro 'tha varuṇas tvaṣṭā pūṣā tathāśvinau 
maruto lokapālāś ca nānāyuddhaviśāradāḥ

te dānavāḥ sarva eva yāmyāṃ vai diśi saṃgare 
akurvanta mahāyatnaṃ dakṣiṇārṇavasaṃsthitāḥ

trikūṭaḥ parvataśreṣṭho rākṣasānāṃ purābhavat 
tadvanena yayuḥ sarve taiḥ sārdhaṃ dakṣiṇārṇavam

sarveṣāṃ melanaṃ yatra parvato malayas tu saḥ 
malayasyāpi deśo 'sau devārīṇām abhūt tadā

devānāṃ gautamītīre tatra saṃnihitaḥ śivaḥ 
iti teṣāṃ samāyogo devānām abhavat kila

devāḥ svaratham ārūḍhās tatra tatra samāgaman 
gautamyāḥ saridambāyāḥ puline vimalāśayāḥ

prasannābhīṣṭadā yā syāt pitṝṇām akhilasya tu 
tato devagaṇāḥ sarve stutvā devaṃ maheśvaram 
abhayaṃ cintayām āsus te sarve 'tha parasparam

atrāpy upāyaḥ ko 'smākaṃ nirjitānāṃ parair haṭhāt 
ekam evātra naḥ śreyo vijayo vāthavā mṛtiḥ 
sapatnair abhibhūtānāṃ jīvitaṃ dhiṅ manasvinām
etasminn antare putra vāg uvācāśarīriṇī

kleśenālaṃ suragaṇā gautamīm āśu gacchata 
bhaktyā hariharau tatra samārādhayateśvarau
godāvaryās tayoś caiva prasādāt kiṃ tu duṣkaram

prasannābhyāṃ harīśābhyāṃ devā jayam abhīpsitam 
avāpya sarvato jagmuḥ pālayanto divaukasaḥ

yatra devāgamo jātas tat tīrthaṃ tena viśrutam 
devāgamaṃ praśaṃsanti munayas tattvadarśinaḥ

tatrāśītisahasrāṇi śivaliṅgāni nārada 
devāgamaḥ parvato 'sau priya ity api kathyate 
tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ devapriyam ato viduḥ

kuśatarpaṇam ākhyātaṃ praṇītāsaṃgamaṃ tathā 
tīrthaṃ sarveṣu lokeṣu bhuktimuktipradāyakam

tasya svarūpaṃ vakṣyāmi śṛṇu pāpaharaṃ śubham 
vindhyasya dakṣiṇe pārśve sahyo nāma mahāgiriḥ

yadaṅghribhyo 'bhavan nadyo godābhīmarathīmukhāḥ 
yatrābhavat tad virajam ekavīrā ca yatra sā

na tasya mahimā kaiścid api śakyo 'nuvarṇitum 
tasmin girau puṇyadeśe śṛṇu nārada yatnataḥ

guhyād guhyataraṃ vakṣye sākṣād vedoditaṃ śubham 
yan na jānanti munayo devāś ca pitaro 'surāḥ

tad ahaṃ prītaye vakṣye śravaṇāt sarvakāmadam 
paraḥ sa puruṣo jñeyo hy avyakto 'kṣara eva tu

aparaś ca kṣaras tasmāt prakṛtyanvita eva ca 
nirākārāt sāvayavaḥ puruṣaḥ samajāyata

tasmād āpaḥ samudbhūtā adbhyaś ca puruṣas tathā 
tābhyām abjaṃ samudbhūtaṃ tatrāham abhavaṃ mune

pṛthivī vāyur ākāśa āpo jyotis tathaiva ca 
ete mattaḥ pūrvatarā ekadaivābhavan mune

etān eva prapaśyāmi nānyat sthāvarajaṅgamam 
naiva vedās tadā cāsan nāhaṃ draṣṭāsmi kiṃcana

yasmād ahaṃ samudbhūto na paśyeyaṃ tam apy atha 
tūṣṇīṃ sthite mayi tadā aśrauṣaṃ vācam uttamām
brahman kuru jagatsṛṣṭiṃ sthāvarasya carasya ca

tato 'ham abravaṃ vācaṃ paruṣāṃ tatra nārada 
kathaṃ srakṣye kva vā srakṣye kena srakṣya idaṃ jagat

saiva vāg abravīd daivī prakṛtir yābhidhīyate 
viṣṇunā preritā mātā jagadīśā jaganmayī

yajñaṃ kuru tataḥ śaktis te bhavitrī na saṃśayaḥ 
yajño vai viṣṇur ity eṣā śrutir brahman sanātanī
kiṃ yajvanām asādhyaṃ syād iha loke paratra ca

punas tām abravaṃ devīṃ kva vā keneti tad vada 
yajñaḥ kāryo mahābhāge tataḥ sovāca māṃ prati

oṃkārabhūtā yā devī mātṛkalpā jaganmayī 
karmabhūmau yajasveha yajñeśaṃ yajñapūruṣam

sa eva sādhanaṃ te syāt tena taṃ yaja suvrata 
yajñaḥ svāhā svadhā mantrā brāhmaṇā havirādikam
harir evākhilaṃ tena sarvaṃ viṣṇor avāpyate

punas tām abravaṃ devīṃ karmabhūḥ kva vidhīyate 
tadā nārada naivāsīd bhāgīrathy atha narmadā

yamunā naiva tāpī sā sarasvaty atha gautamī 
samudro vā nadaḥ kaścin na saraḥ sarito 'malāḥ 
sā śaktiḥ punar apy evaṃ mām uvāca punaḥ punaḥ

sumeror dakṣiṇe pārśve tathā himavato gireḥ 
dakṣiṇe cāpi vindhyasya sahyāc caivātha dakṣiṇe 
sarvasya sarvakāle tu karmabhūmiḥ śubhodayā

tat tu vākyam atho śrutvā tyaktvā meruṃ mahāgirim 
taṃ pradeśam athāgatya sthātavyaṃ kvety acintayam 
tato mām abravīt saiva viṣṇor vāṇy aśarīriṇī

ito gaccha itas tiṣṭha tathopaviśa cātra hi 
saṃkalpaṃ kuru yajñasya sa te yajñaḥ samāpyate

kṛte caivātha saṃkalpe yajñārthe surasattama 
yad vadanty akhilā vedā vidhe tat tat samācara

itihāsapurāṇāni yad anyac chabdagocaram 
svato mukhe mama prāyād abhūc ca smṛtigocaram

vedārthaś ca mayā sarvo jñāto 'sau tatkṣaṇena ca 
tataḥ puruṣasūktaṃ tad asmaraṃ lokaviśrutam

yajñopakaraṇaṃ sarvaṃ tad uktaṃ ca tv akalpayam 
taduktena prakāreṇa yajñapātrāṇy akalpayam

ahaṃ sthitvā yatra deśe śucir bhūtvā yatātmavān 
dīkṣito vipradeśo 'sau mannāmnā tu prakīrtitaḥ

maddevayajanaṃ puṇyaṃ nāmnā brahmagiriḥ smṛtaḥ 
caturaśītiparyantaṃ yojanāni mahāmune

maddevayajanaṃ puṇyaṃ pūrvato brahmaṇo gireḥ 
tatra madhye vedikā syād gārhapatyo 'sya dakṣiṇe

tatra cāhavanīyasya evam agnīṃs tv akalpayam 
vinā patnyā na sidhyeta yajñaḥ śrutinidarśanāt

śarīram ātmano 'haṃ vai dvedhā cākaravaṃ mune 
pūrvārdhena tataḥ patnī mamābhūd yajñasiddhaye

uttareṇa tv ahaṃ tadvad ardho jāyā iti śruteḥ 
kālaṃ vasantam utkṛṣṭam ājyarūpeṇa nārada

akalpayaṃ tathā cedhmaṃ grīṣmaṃ cāpi śarad dhaviḥ 
ṛtuṃ ca prāvṛṣaṃ putra tadā barhir akalpayam

chandāṃsi sapta vai tatra tadā paridhayo 'bhavan 
kalākāṣṭhānimeṣā hi samitpātrakuśāḥ smṛtāḥ

yo 'nādiś ca tv anantaś ca svayaṃ kālo 'bhavat tadā 
yūparūpeṇa devarṣe yoktraṃ ca paśubandhanam

sattvāditriguṇāḥ pāśā naiva tatrābhavat paśuḥ 
tato 'ham abravaṃ vācaṃ vaiṣṇavīm aśarīriṇīm

vinaiva paśunā nāyaṃ yajñaḥ parisamāpyate 
tato mām avadad devī saiva nityāśarīriṇī
pauruṣeṇātha sūktena stuhi taṃ puruṣaṃ param

tathety uktvā stūyamāne devadeve janārdane 
mama cotpādake bhaktyā sūktena puruṣasya hi

sā ca mām abravīd devī brahman māṃ tvaṃ paśuṃ kuru 
tadā vijñāya puruṣaṃ janakaṃ mama cāvyayam

kālayūpasya pārśve taṃ guṇapāśair niveśitam 
barhisthitam ahaṃ praukṣaṃ puruṣaṃ jātam agrataḥ

etasminn antare tatra tasmāt sarvam abhūd idam 
brāhmaṇās tu mukhāt tasya 'bhavan bāhvoś ca kṣatriyāḥ

mukhād indras tathāgniś ca śvasanaḥ prāṇato 'bhavat 
diśaḥ śrotrāt tathā śīrṣṇaḥ sarvaḥ svargo 'bhavat tadā

manasaś candramā jātaḥ sūryo 'bhūc cakṣuṣas tathā 
antarikṣaṃ tathā nābher ūrubhyāṃ viśa eva ca

padbhyāṃ śūdraś ca saṃjātas tathā bhūmir ajāyata 
ṛṣayo romakūpebhya oṣadhyaḥ keśato 'bhavan

grāmyāraṇyāś ca paśavo nakhebhyaḥ sarvato 'bhavan 
kṛmikīṭapataṃgādi pāyūpasthād ajāyata

sthāvaraṃ jaṅgamaṃ kiṃcid dṛśyādṛśyaṃ ca kiṃcana 
tasmāt sarvam abhūd devā mattaś cāpy abhavan punaḥ 
etasminn antare saiva viṣṇor vāg abravīc ca mām

sarvaṃ saṃpūrṇam abhavat sṛṣṭir jātā tathepsitā 
idānīṃ juhudhi hy agnau pātrāṇi ca samāni ca

visarjaya tathā yūpaṃ praṇītāṃ ca kuśāṃs tathā 
ṛtvigrūpaṃ yajñarūpam uddeśyaṃ dhyeyam eva ca
sruvaṃ ca puruṣaṃ pāśān sarvaṃ brahman visarjaya

tadvākyasamakālaṃ tu kramaśo yajñayoniṣu 
gārhapatye dakṣiṇāgnau tathā caiva mahāmune

pūrvasminn api caivāgnau kramaśo juhvatas tadā 
tatra tatra jagadyonim anusaṃdhāya pūruṣam

mantrapūtaṃ śuciḥ samyag yajñadevo jaganmayaḥ 
lokanātho viśvakartā kuṇḍānāṃ tatra saṃnidhau

śuklarūpadharo viṣṇur bhaved āhavanīyake 
śyāmo viṣṇur dakṣiṇāgneḥ pīto gṛhapateḥ kaveḥ

sarvakālaṃ teṣu viṣṇur ato deśeṣu saṃsthitaḥ 
na tena rahitaṃ kiṃcid viṣṇunā viśvayoninā

praṇītāyāḥ praṇayanaṃ mantraiś cākaravaṃ tataḥ 
praṇītodakam apy etat praṇīteti nadī śubhā

vyasarjayaṃ praṇītāṃ tāṃ mārjayitvā kuśair atha 
mārjane kriyamāṇe tu praṇītodakabindavaḥ

patitās tatra tīrthāni jātāni guṇavanti ca 
saṃjātā muniśārdūla snānāt kratuphalapradā

yālaṃkṛtā sarvakālaṃ devadevena śārṅgiṇā 
sopānapaṅktiḥ sarveṣāṃ vaikuṇṭhārohaṇāya sā

saṃmārjitāḥ kuśā yatra patitā bhūtale śubhe 
kuśatarpaṇam ākhyātaṃ bahupuṇyaphalapradam

kuśaiś ca tarpitāḥ sarve kuśatarpaṇam ucyate 
paścāc ca saṃgatā tatra gautamī kāraṇāntarāt

praṇītāyāṃ mahābuddhe praṇītāsaṃgamo 'bhavat 
kuśatarpaṇadeśe tu tat tīrthaṃ kuśatarpaṇam

tatraiva kalpito yūpo mayā vindhyasya cottare 
visṛṣṭo lokapūjyo 'sau viṣṇor āsīt samāśrayaḥ

akṣayaś cābhavac chrīmān akṣayo 'sau vaṭo 'bhavat 
nityaś ca kālarūpo 'sau smaraṇāt kratupuṇyadaḥ

maddevayajanaṃ cedaṃ daṇḍakāraṇyam ucyate 
saṃpūrṇe tu kratau viṣṇur mayā bhaktyā prasāditaḥ

yo virāḍ ucyate vede yasmān mūrtam ajāyata 
yasmāc ca mama cotpattir yasyedaṃ vikṛtaṃ jagat

tam ahaṃ devadeveśam abhivandya vyasarjayam 
yojanāni caturviṃśan maddevayajanaṃ śubham

tasmād adyāpi kuṇḍāni santi ca trīṇi nārada 
yajñeśvarasvarūpāṇi viṣṇor vai cakrapāṇinaḥ

tataḥ prabhṛti cākhyātaṃ maddevayajanaṃ ca tat 
tatrasthaḥ kṛmikīṭādiḥ so 'py ante muktibhājanam

dharmabījaṃ muktibījaṃ daṇḍakāraṇyam ucyate 
viśeṣād gautamīśliṣṭo deśaḥ puṇyatamo 'bhavat

praṇītāsaṃgame cāpi kuśatarpaṇa eva vā 
snānadānādi yaḥ kuryāt sa gacchet paramaṃ padam

smaraṇaṃ paṭhanaṃ vāpi śravaṇaṃ cāpi bhaktitaḥ 
sarvakāmapradaṃ puṃsāṃ bhuktimuktipradaṃ viduḥ

ubhayos tīrayos tatra tīrthāny āhur manīṣiṇaḥ 
ṣaḍaśītisahasrāṇi teṣu puṇyaṃ puroditam

vārāṇasyā api mune kuśatarpaṇam uttamam 
nānena sadṛśaṃ tīrthaṃ vidyate sacarācare

brahmahatyādipāpānāṃ smaraṇād api nāśanam 
tīrtham etan mune proktaṃ svargadvāraṃ mahītale

manyutīrtham iti khyātaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam 
sarvakāmapradaṃ nṝṇāṃ smaraṇād aghanāśanam

tasya prabhāvaṃ vakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣvāvahito mune 
devānāṃ dānavānāṃ ca saṃgaro 'bhūn mithaḥ purā

tatrājayan naiva surā dānavā jayino 'bhavan 
parāṅmukhāḥ suragaṇāḥ saṃgarād gatacetasaḥ

mām abhyetya samūcus te dehi no 'bhayakāraṇam 
tān ahaṃ pratyavocaṃ vai gaṅgāṃ gacchata sarvaśaḥ

tatra vai gautamītīre stutvā devaṃ maheśvaram 
anapāyanirāyāsasahajānandasundaram

lapsyate sarvavibudhā jayahetur maheśvarāt 
tathety uktvā suragaṇāḥ stuvanti sma maheśvaram

tapo 'tapyanta kecid vai nanṛtuś ca tathāpare 
asnāpayaṃś ca kecic ca 'pūjayaṃś ca tathāpare

tataḥ prasanno bhagavāñ śūlapāṇir maheśvaraḥ 
devān athābravīt tuṣṭo vriyatāṃ yad abhīpsitam

devā ūcuḥ surapatiṃ vijayāya dadasva naḥ 
puruṣaṃ paramaślāghyaṃ raṇeṣu purataḥ sthitam

yadbāhubalam āśritya bhavāmaḥ sukhino vayam 
tathety uvāca bhagavān devān prati maheśvaraḥ

ātmanas tejasā kaścin nirmitaḥ parameṣṭhinā 
manyunāmānam atyugraṃ devasainyapurogamam

taṃ natvā tridaśāḥ sarve śivaṃ natvā svam ālayam 
manyunā saha cābhyetya punar yuddhāya tasthire

yuddhe sthitvā tu danujair daiteyaiś ca mahābalaiḥ 
vibudhā jātasaṃnaddhā manyum ūcuḥ puraḥ sthitāḥ

sāmarthyaṃ tava paśyāmaḥ paścād yotsyāmahe paraiḥ 
tasmād darśaya cātmānaṃ manyo 'smākaṃ yuyutsatām
tad devavacanaṃ śrutvā manyur āha smayann iva

janitā mama deveśaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarvadṛk prabhuḥ 
yaḥ sarvaṃ vetti sarveṣāṃ dhāmanāma manaḥsthitam

naiva kaścic ca taṃ vetti yaḥ sarvaṃ vetti sarvadā 
amūrtaṃ mūrtam apy etad vetti kartā jaganmayaḥ

paro 'sau bhagavān sākṣāt tathā divy antarikṣagaḥ 
kas tasya rūpaṃ yo veda kasya kartā jaganmayaḥ

evaṃvidhād ahaṃ jāto māṃ kathaṃ vettum arhatha 
athavā draṣṭukāmā vai bhavanto mānupaśyata

ity uktvā darśayām āsa manyū rūpaṃ svakaṃ mahat 
tārtīyacakṣuṣodbhūtaṃ bhavasya parameṣṭhinaḥ

tejasā saṃbhṛtaṃ rūpaṃ yataḥ sarvaṃ tad ucyate 
pauruṣaṃ puruṣeṣv eva ahaṃkāraś ca jantuṣu

krodhaḥ sarvasya yo bhīma upasaṃhārakṛd bhavet 
taṃ śaṃkarapratinidhiṃ jvalantaṃ nijatejasā

sarvāyudhadharaṃ dṛṣṭvā praṇemuḥ sarvadevatāḥ 
vitresur daityadanujāḥ kṛtāñjalipuṭāḥ surāḥ

bhūtvā manyum athocus te tvaṃ senānīḥ prabho bhava 
tvayā dattam idaṃ rājyaṃ manyo bhokṣyāmahe vayam

tasmāt sarveṣu kāryeṣu jetā tvaṃ jayavardhanaḥ 
tvam indras tvaṃ ca varuṇo lokapālās tvam eva ca

asmāsu sarvadeveṣu praviśa tvaṃ jayāya vai 
manyuḥ provāca tān sarvān vinā matto na kiṃcana

sarveṣv antaḥ praviṣṭo 'haṃ na māṃ jānāti kaścana 
sa eva bhagavān manyus tato jātaḥ pṛthak pṛthak

sa eva rudrarūpī syād rudro manyuḥ śivo 'bhavat 
sthāvaraṃ jaṅgamaṃ caiva sarvaṃ vyāptaṃ hi manyunā

tam avāpya surāḥ sarve jayam āpuś ca saṃgare 
jayo manyuś ca śauryaṃ ca īśatejaḥsamudbhavam

manyunā jayam āpyātha kṛtvā daityaiś ca saṃgamam 
yathāgataṃ yayuḥ sarve manyunā parirakṣitāḥ

yatra vai gautamītīre śivam ārādhya te surāḥ 
manyum āpur jayaṃ caiva manyutīrthaṃ tad ucyate

utpattiṃ ca tathā manyor yo naraḥ prayataḥ smaret 
vijayo jāyate tasya na kaiścit paribhūyate

na manyutīrthasadṛśaṃ pāvanaṃ hi mahāmune 
yatra sākṣān manyurūpī sarvadā śaṃkaraḥ sthitaḥ 
tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca smaraṇaṃ sarvakāmadam

sārasvataṃ nāma tīrthaṃ sarvakāmapradaṃ śubham 
bhuktimuktipradaṃ nṝṇāṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam

sarvarogapraśamanaṃ sarvasiddhipradāyakam 
tatremaṃ śṛṇu vṛttāntaṃ vistareṇātha nārada

puṣpotkaṭāt pūrvabhāge parvato lokaviśrutaḥ 
śubhro nāma giriśreṣṭho gautamyā dakṣiṇe taṭe

śākalya iti vikhyāto muniḥ paramanaiṣṭhikaḥ 
tasmiñ śubhre puṇyagirau tapas tepe hy anuttamam

tapasyantaṃ dvijaśreṣṭhaṃ gautamītīram āśritam 
sarve bhūtagaṇā nityaṃ praṇamanti stuvanti tam

agniśuśrūṣaṇaparaṃ vedādhyayanatatparam 
ṛṣigandharvasumanaḥsevite tatra parvate

tasmin girau mahāpuṇye devadvijabhayaṃkaraḥ 
yajñadveṣī brahmahantā paraśur nāma rākṣasaḥ

kāmarūpī vicarati nānārūpadharo vane 
kṣaṇaṃ ca brahmarūpeṇa kadācid vyāghrarūpadhṛk

kadācid devarūpeṇa kadācit paśurūpadhṛk 
kadācit pramadārūpaḥ kadācin mṛgarūpataḥ

kadācid bālarūpeṇa evaṃ carati pāpakṛt 
yatrāste brāhmaṇo vidvāñ śākalyo munisattamaḥ

tam āyāti mahāpāpī paraśū rākṣasādhamaḥ 
śuciṣmantaṃ dvijaśreṣṭhaṃ paraśur nityam eva ca

netuṃ hantuṃ pravṛtto 'pi na śaśāka sa pāpakṛt 
sa kadācid dvijaśreṣṭho devān abhyarcya yatnataḥ

bhoktukāmaḥ kilāyātas tatrāyāt paraśur mune 
brahmarūpadharo bhūtvā śithilaḥ palito 'balī 
kanyām ādāya kāṃcic ca śākalyaṃ vākyam abravīt

bhojanasyārthinaṃ viddhi māṃ ca kanyām imāṃ dvija 
ātithyakāle saṃprāptaṃ kṛtakṛtyo 'si mānada

ta eva dhanyā loke 'smin yeṣām atithayo gṛhāt 
pūrṇābhilāṣā niryānti jīvanto 'pi mṛtāḥ pare

bhojane tūpaviṣṭe tu ātmārthaṃ kalpitaṃ tu yat 
atithibhyas tu yo dadyād dattā tena vasuṃdharā

etac chrutvā tu śākalyo dadāmīty evam abravīt 
āsane copaveśyāthājñānāt taṃ paraśuṃ dvijam

yathānyāyaṃ pūjayitvā śākalyo bhojanaṃ dadau 
āpośanaṃ kare kṛtvā paraśur vākyam abravīt

dūrād abhyāgataṃ śrāntam anugacchanti devatāḥ 
tasmiṃs tṛpte tu tṛptāḥ syur atṛpte tu viparyayaḥ

atithiś cāpavādī ca dvāv etau viśvabāndhavau 
apavādī haret pāpam atithiḥ svargasaṃkramaḥ

abhyāgataṃ pathi śrāntaṃ sāvajñaṃ yo 'bhivīkṣate 
tatkṣaṇād eva naśyanti tasya dharmayaśaḥśriyaḥ

tasmād abhyāgataḥ śrānto yāce 'haṃ tvāṃ dvijottama 
dāsyase yadi me kāmaṃ tad bhokṣye 'haṃ na cānyathā

dattam ity eva śākalyo bhuṅkṣvety evāha rākṣasam 
tataḥ provāca paraśur ahaṃ rākṣasasattamaḥ

nāhaṃ dvijas tava ripur na vṛddhaḥ palitaḥ kṛśaḥ 
bahūni me vyatītāni varṣāṇi tvāṃ prapaśyataḥ

śuṣyanti mama gātrāṇi grīṣme svalpodakaṃ yathā 
tasmān neṣye sānugaṃ tvāṃ bhakṣayiṣye dvijottama
śrutvā paraśuvākyaṃ tac chākalyo vākyam abravīt

ye mahākulasaṃbhūtā vijñātasakalāgamāḥ 
tat pratiśrutam abhyeti na jātv atra viparyayam

yathocitaṃ kuru sakhe tathāpi śṛṇu me vacaḥ 
nihantum apy udyateṣu vaktavyaṃ hitam uttamaiḥ

brāhmaṇo 'haṃ vajratanuḥ sarvato rakṣako hariḥ 
pādau rakṣatu me viṣṇuḥ śiro devo janārdanaḥ

bāhū rakṣatu vārāhaḥ pṛṣṭhaṃ rakṣatu kūrmarāṭ 
hṛdayaṃ rakṣatāt kṛṣṇo hy aṅgulī rakṣatān mṛgaḥ

mukhaṃ rakṣatu vāgīśo netre rakṣatu pakṣigaḥ 
śrotraṃ rakṣatu vitteśaḥ sarvato rakṣatād bhavaḥ 
nānāpatsv ekaśaraṇaṃ devo nārāyaṇaḥ svayam

evam uktvā tu śākalyo naya vā bhakṣa vā sukham 
māṃ rākṣasendra paraśo tvam idānīm atandritaḥ

rākṣasas tasya vacanād bhakṣaṇāya samudyataḥ 
nāsty eva hṛdaye nūnaṃ pāpināṃ karuṇākaṇaḥ

daṃṣṭrākarālavadano gatvā tasyāntikaṃ tadā 
brāhmaṇaṃ taṃ nirīkṣyaivaṃ paraśur vākyam abravīt

śaṅkhacakragadāpāṇiṃ tvāṃ paśye 'haṃ dvijottama 
sahasrapādaśirasaṃ sahasrākṣakaraṃ vibhum

sarvabhūtaikanilayaṃ chandorūpaṃ jaganmayam 
tvām adya vipra paśyāmi nāsti te pūrvakaṃ vapuḥ

tasmāt prasādaye vipra tvam eva śaraṇaṃ bhava 
jñānaṃ dehi mahābuddhe tīrthaṃ brūhy aghaniṣkṛtim

mahatāṃ darśanaṃ brahmañ jāyate nahi niṣphalam 
dveṣād ajñānato vāpi prasaṅgād vā pramādataḥ
ayasaḥ sparśasaṃsparśo rukmatvāyaiva jāyate

etad vākyaṃ samākarṇya rākṣasena samīritam 
śākalyaḥ kṛpayā prāha varadā sā sarasvatī

tavācirād daityapate tataḥ stuhi janārdanam 
manorathaphalaprāptau nānyan nārāyaṇastuteḥ

kiṃcid apy asti loke 'smin kāraṇaṃ śṛṇu rākṣasa 
prasannā tava sā devī madvākyāc ca bhaviṣyati

tathety uktvā sa paraśur gaṅgāṃ trailokyapāvanīm 
snātvā śucir yatamanā gaṅgām abhimukhaḥ sthitaḥ

tatrāpaśyad divyarūpāṃ divyagandhānulepanām 
sarasvatīṃ jagaddhātrīṃ śākalyavacane sthitām

jagajjāḍyaharāṃ viśvajananīṃ bhuvaneśvarīm 
tām uvāca vinītātmā paraśur gatakalmaṣaḥ

guruḥ śākalya ity āha mākāntaṃ stuhi vidhvajam 
tava prasādāt sā śaktir yathā me syāt tathā kuru

tathāstv iti ca sā prāha paraśuṃ śrīsarasvatī 
sarasvatyāḥ prasādena paraśus taṃ janārdanam

tuṣṭāva vividhair vākyais tatas tuṣṭo 'bhavad dhariḥ 
varaṃ prādād rākṣasāya kṛpāsindhur janārdanaḥ
yad yan manogataṃ rakṣas tat tat sarvaṃ bhaviṣyati

śākalyasya prasādena gautamyāś ca prasādataḥ 
sarasvatyāḥ prasādena narasiṃhaprasādataḥ

pāpiṣṭho 'pi tadā rakṣaḥ paraśur divam eyivān 
sarvatīrthāṅghripadmasya prasādāc chārṅgadhanvanaḥ

tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ sārasvatam iti śrutam 
tatra snānena dānena viṣṇuloke mahīyate

vāgjavaiṣṇavaśākalyaparaśuprabhavāṇi hi 
bahūny abhūvaṃs tīrthāni tasmin vai śvetaparvate

ciccikātīrtham ity uktaṃ sarvarogavināśanam 
sarvacintāpraharaṇaṃ sarvaśāntikaraṃ nṛṇām

tasya svarūpaṃ vakṣyāmi śubhre tasmin nagottame 
gaṅgāyā uttare pāre yatra devo gadādharaḥ

ciccikaḥ pakṣirāṭ tatra bheruṇḍo yo 'bhidhīyate 
sadā vasati tatraiva māṃsāśī śvetaparvate

nānāpuṣpaphalākīrṇaiḥ sarvartukusumair nagaiḥ 
sevite dvijamukhyaiś ca gautamyā copaśobhite

siddhacāraṇagandharvakiṃnarāmarasaṃkule 
tatsamīpe nagaḥ kaścid dvipadāṃ ca catuṣpadām

rogārtikṣuttṛṣācintāmaraṇānāṃ na bhājanam 
evaṃ guṇānvite śaile nānāmunigaṇāvṛte

pūrvadeśādhipaḥ kaścit pavamāna iti śrutaḥ 
kṣatradharmarataḥ śrīmān devabrāhmaṇapālakaḥ

balena mahatā yuktaḥ sapurodhā vanaṃ yayau 
reme strībhir manojñābhir nṛtyavāditrajaiḥ sukhaiḥ

sa ca evaṃ dhanuṣpāṇir mṛgayāśīlibhir vṛtaḥ 
evaṃ bhraman kadācit sa śrānto drumam upāgataḥ

gautamītīrasaṃbhūtaṃ nānāpakṣigaṇair vṛtam 
āśramāṇāṃ gṛhapatiṃ dharmajñam iva sevitam

tam āśritya nagaśreṣṭhaṃ pavamāno nṛpottamaḥ 
sa viśrānto janavṛta īkṣāṃ cakre nagottamam

tatrāpaśyad dvijaṃ sthūlaṃ dvimukhaṃ śobhanākṛtim 
cintāviṣṭaṃ tathā śrāntaṃ tam apṛcchan nṛpottamaḥ

ko bhavān dvimukhaḥ pakṣī cintāvān iva lakṣyase 
naivātra kaścid duḥkhārtaḥ kasmāt tvaṃ duḥkham āgataḥ

tataḥ provāca nṛpatiṃ pavamānaṃ śanaiḥ śanaiḥ 
samāśvastamanāḥ pakṣī cicciko niḥśvasan muhuḥ

matto bhayaṃ na cānyeṣāṃ mama vānyopapāditam 
nānāpuṣpaphalākīrṇaṃ munibhiḥ parisevitam

paśyeyaṃ śūnyam evādriṃ tataḥ śocāmi mām aham 
na labhāmi sukhaṃ kiṃcin na tṛpyāmi kadācana 
nidrāṃ prāpnomi na kvāpi na viśrāntiṃ na nirvṛtim
dvimukhasya dvijasyoktaṃ śrutvā rājātivismitaḥ

ko bhavān kiṃ kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ kasmāc chūnyaś ca parvataḥ 
ekenāsyena tṛpyanti prāṇino 'tra nagottame

kim utāsyadvayena tvaṃ na tṛptim upayāsyasi 
kiṃ vā te duṣkṛtaṃ prāptam iha janmany atho purā
tat sarvaṃ śaṃsa me satyaṃ trāsye tvāṃ mahato bhayāt
rājānaṃ taṃ dvijaḥ prāha niḥśvasann atha ciccikaḥ

vakṣye 'haṃ tvāṃ pūrvavṛttaṃ pavamāna śṛṇuṣva tat 
ahaṃ dvijātipravaro vedavedāṅgapāragaḥ

kulīno viditaprājñaḥ kāryahantā kalipriyaḥ 
vade puras tathā pṛṣṭhe anyad anyac ca jantuṣu

paravṛddhyā sadā duḥkhī māyayā viśvavañcakaḥ 
kṛtaghnaḥ satyarahitaḥ paranindāvicakṣaṇaḥ

mitrasvāmigurudrohī dambhācāro 'tinirghṛṇaḥ 
manasā karmaṇā vācā tāpayāmi janān bahūn

ayam eva vinodo me sadā yat parahiṃsanam 
yugmabhedaṃ gaṇocchedaṃ maryādābhedanaṃ sadā

karomi nirvicāro 'haṃ vidvatsevāparāṅmukhaḥ 
na mayā sadṛśaḥ kaścit pātakī bhavanatraye

tenāhaṃ dvimukho jātas tāpanād duḥkhabhāgy aham 
tasmād duḥkhena saṃtaptaḥ śūnyo 'yaṃ parvato mama

anyac ca śṛṇu bhūpāla vākyaṃ dharmārthasaṃhitam 
brahmahatyāsamaṃ pāpaṃ tad vinā tad avāpyate

kṣatriyaḥ saṃgaraṃ gatvā athavānyatra saṃgarāt 
palāyantaṃ nyastaśastraṃ viśvastaṃ ca parāṅmukham

avijñātaṃ copaviṣṭaṃ bibhemīti ca vādinam 
taṃ yadi kṣatriyo hanyāt sa tu syād brahmaghātakaḥ

adhītaṃ vismarati yas tvaṃ karoti tathottamam 
anādaraṃ ca guruṣu tam āhur brahmaghātakam

pratyakṣe ca priyaṃ vakti parokṣe paruṣāṇi ca 
anyad dhṛdi vacasy anyat karoty anyat sadaiva yaḥ

gurūṇāṃ śapathaṃ kartā dveṣṭā brāhmaṇanindakaḥ 
mithyā vinītaḥ pāpātmā sa tu syād brahmaghātakaḥ

devaṃ vedam athādhyātmaṃ dharmabrāhmaṇasaṃgatim 
etān nindati yo dveṣāt sa tu syād brahmaghātakaḥ

evaṃ bhūto 'py ahaṃ rājan dambhārthaṃ lajjayā tathā 
sadvṛtta iva varte 'haṃ tasmād rājan dvijo 'bhavam

evaṃ bhūto 'pi satkarma kiṃcit kartāsmi kutracit 
tenāhaṃ karmaṇā rājan svataḥ smartā purā kṛtam

tac ciccikavacaḥ śrutvā pavamānaḥ suvismitaḥ 
karmaṇā kena te muktir ity āha nṛpatir dvijam
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā nṛpatiṃ prāha pakṣirāṭ

asminn eva nagaśreṣṭhe gautamyā uttare taṭe 
gadādharaṃ nāma tīrthaṃ tatra māṃ naya suvrata

tad dhi tīrthaṃ puṇyatamaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam 
sarvakāmapradaṃ ceti mahadbhir munibhiḥ śrutam

na gautamyās tathā viṣṇor aparaṃ kleśanāśanam 
sarvabhāvena tat tīrthaṃ paśyeyam iti me matiḥ

matkṛtena prayatnena naitac chakyaṃ kadācana 
katham ākāṅkṣitaprāptir bhaved duṣkṛtakarmaṇām

saprayatno 'py ahaṃ vīra na paśye tat suduṣkaram 
tasmāt tava prasādāc ca paśyeyaṃ hi gadādharam

avijñāpitaduḥkhajñaṃ karuṇāvaruṇālayam 
yasmin dṛṣṭe bhavakleśā na dṛśyante punar naraiḥ
dṛṣṭvaiva taṃ divaṃ yāsye prasādāt tava suvrata

evam uktaḥ sa nṛpatiś ciccikena dvijanmanā 
darśayām āsa taṃ devaṃ tāṃ ca gaṅgāṃ dvijanmane
tataḥ sa ciccikaḥ snātvā gaṅgāṃ trailokyapāvanīm

gaṅge gautami yāvat tvāṃ trijagatpāvanīṃ naraḥ 
na paśyaty ucyate tāvad ihāmutrāpi pātakī

tasmāt sarvāgasam api mām uddhara saridvare 
saṃsāre dehinām anyā na gatiḥ kāpi kutracit 
tvāṃ vinā viṣṇucaraṇasaroruhasamudbhave

iti śraddhāviśuddhātmā gaṅgaikaśaraṇo dvijaḥ 
snānaṃ cakre smarann antar gaṅge trāyasva mām iti

gadādharaṃ tato natvā paśyatsu nagavāsiṣu 
pavamānābhyanujñātas tadaiva divam ākramat

pavamānaḥ svanagaraṃ prayayau sānugas tataḥ 
tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ pāvamānaṃ saciccikam

gadādharaṃ koṭitīrtham iti vedavido viduḥ 
koṭikoṭiguṇaṃ karma kṛtaṃ tatra bhaven nṛṇām

bhadratīrtham iti proktaṃ sarvāniṣṭanivāraṇam 
sarvapāpapraśamanaṃ mahāśāntipradāyakam

ādityasya priyā bhāryā uṣā tvāṣṭrī pativratā 
chāyāpi bhāryā savitus tasyāḥ putraḥ śanaiścaraḥ

tasya svasā viṣṭir iti bhīṣaṇā pāparūpiṇī 
tāṃ kanyāṃ savitā kasmai dadāmīti matiṃ dadhe

yasmai yasmai dātukāmaḥ sūryo lokaguruḥ prabhuḥ 
tac chrutvā bhīṣaṇā ceti kiṃ kurmo bhāryayānayā 
evaṃ tu vartamāne sā pitaraṃ prāha duḥkhitā

bālām eva pitā yas tu dadyāt kanyāṃ surūpiṇe 
sa kṛtārtho bhavel loke na ced duṣkṛtavān pitā

caturthād vatsarād ūrdhvaṃ yāvan na daśamātyayaḥ 
tāvad vivāhaḥ kanyāyāḥ pitrā kāryaḥ prayatnataḥ

śrīmate viduṣe yūne kulīnāya yaśasvine 
udārāya sanāthāya kanyā deyā varāya vai

etac ced anyathā kuryāt pitā sa nirayī sadā 
dharmasya sādhanaṃ kanyā viduṣām api bhāskara

narakasyeva mūrkhāṇāṃ kāmopahatacetasām 
ekataḥ pṛthivī kṛtsnā saśailavanakānanā

svalaṃkṛtopādhihīnā sukanyā caikataḥ smṛtā 
vikrīṇīte yaś ca kanyām aśvaṃ vā gāṃ tilān api

na tasya rauravādibhyaḥ kadācin niṣkṛtir bhavet 
vivāhātikramaḥ kāryo na kanyāyāḥ kadācana

tasmin kṛte yat pituḥ syāt pāpaṃ tat kena kathyate 
yāval lajjāṃ na jānāti yāvat krīḍati pāṃśubhiḥ

tāvat kanyā pradātavyā no cet pitror adhogatiḥ 
pituḥ svarūpaṃ putraḥ syād yaḥ pitā putra eva saḥ

ātmanaḥ sukhitāṃ loke ko na kuryāt karoti ca 
yat kanyāyāṃ pitā kuryād dānaṃ pūjanam īkṣaṇam

yat kṛtaṃ tat kṛtaṃ vidyāt tāsu dattaṃ tad akṣayam 
yad dattaṃ tāsu kanyāsu tad ānantyāya kalpate

putreṣu caiva pautreṣu ko na kuryāt sukhaṃ rave 
karoti yaḥ kanyakānāṃ sa saṃpadbhājanaṃ bhavet
evaṃ tāṃ vādinīṃ kanyāṃ viṣṭiṃ provāca bhāskaraḥ

kiṃ karomi na gṛhṇāti tvāṃ kaścid bhīṣaṇākṛtim 
kulaṃ rūpaṃ vayo vittaṃ vidyāṃ vṛttaṃ suśīlatām

mithaḥ paśyanti saṃbandhe vivāhe strīṣu puṃsu ca 
asmāsu sarvam apy asti vinā tava guṇaiḥ śubhe 
kiṃ karomi kva dāsyāmi vṛthā māṃ dhik karoṣi kim
evam uktvā punas tāṃ ca viṣṭiṃ provāca bhāskaraḥ

yasmai kasmai ca dātavyā tvaṃ vai yady anumanyase 
dīyase 'dya mayā viṣṭe anujānīhi māṃ tataḥ

pitaraṃ prāha sā viṣṭir bhartā putrā dhanaṃ sukham 
āyū rūpaṃ ca saṃprītir jāyate prāktanānugam

yat purā vihitaṃ karma prāṇinā sādhv asādhu vā 
phalaṃ tadanurodhena prāpyate 'pi bhavāntare

svadoṣa eva tat pitrā parihartavya ādarāt 
tādṛg eva phalaṃ tu syād yādṛg ācaritaṃ purā

tasmāt taddānasaṃbandhaṃ svavaṃśānugataṃ pitā 
karoti śeṣaṃ daivena yad bhāvyaṃ tad bhaviṣyati

tac chrutvā duhitur vākyaṃ tvaṣṭuḥ putrāya bhīṣaṇām 
viśvarūpāya tāṃ prādād viṣṭiṃ lokabhayaṃkarīm

viśvarūpo 'pi tadvac ca bhīṣaṇo bhīṣaṇākṛtiḥ 
evaṃ mithaḥ saṃcaratoḥ śīlarūpasamānayoḥ

prītiḥ kadācid vaiṣamyaṃ daṃpatyor abhavan mithaḥ 
gaṇḍo nāmābhavat putro hy atigaṇḍas tathaiva ca

raktākṣaḥ krodhanaś caiva vyayo durmukha eva ca 
tebhyaḥ kanīyān abhavad dharṣaṇo nāma puṇyabhāk

sutaḥ suśīlaḥ subhagaḥ śāntaḥ śuddhamatiḥ śuciḥ 
sa kadācid yamagṛhaṃ draṣṭuṃ mātulam abhyagāt

sa dadarśa bahūñ jantūn svargasthān iva duḥkhinaḥ 
sa mātulaṃ tu papraccha natvā dharmaṃ sanātanam
ka ime sukhinas tāta pacyante narake ca ke

evaṃ pṛṣṭo dharmarājaḥ sarvaṃ prāha yathārthavat 
tatkarmaṇāṃ gatiṃ sarvām aśeṣeṇa nyavedayat

vihitasya na kurvanti ye kadācid atikramam 
na te paśyanti nirayaṃ kadācid api mānavāḥ

na mānayanti ye śāstraṃ nācāraṃ na bahuśrutān 
vihitātikramaṃ kuryur ye te narakagāminaḥ
sa tu śrutvā dharmavākyaṃ harṣaṇaḥ punar abravīt

pitā tvāṣṭro bhīṣaṇaś ca mātā viṣṭiś ca bhīṣaṇā 
bhrātaraś ca mahātmāno yena te śāntabuddhayaḥ

surūpāś ca bhaviṣyanti nirdoṣā maṅgalapradāḥ 
tan me karma vadasvādya tatkartāsmi surottama

anyathā tān na gaccheyam ity uktaḥ prāha dharmarāṭ 
harṣaṇaṃ śuddhabuddhiṃ taṃ harṣaṇo 'si na saṃśayaḥ

bahavaḥ syuḥ sutāḥ kecin naiva te kulatantavaḥ 
eka eva sutaḥ kaścid yena tad dhriyate kulam

kulasyādhārabhūto yo yaḥ pitroḥ priyakārakaḥ 
yaḥ pūrvajān uddharati sa putras tv itaro gadaḥ

yasmāt tvayānurūpaṃ me proktaṃ mātāmaha priyam 
tasmāt tvaṃ gautamīṃ gaccha snātvā niyatamānasaḥ

stuhi viṣṇuṃ jagadyoniṃ śāntaṃ prītena cetasā 
sa tu prīto yadi bhavet sarvam iṣṭaṃ pradāsyati

iti śrutvā dharmavākyaṃ harṣaṇo gautamīṃ yayau 
śucis tuṣṭāva deveśaṃ hariṃ prīto 'bhavad dhariḥ

harṣaṇāya tataḥ prādāt kulabhadraṃ tatas tu saḥ 
sarvābhadrapraśamanapūrvakaṃ bhadram astu te

tad bhadrā procyate viṣṭiḥ pitā bhadras tathā sutāḥ 
tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ bhadratīrthaṃ tad ucyate

sarvamaṅgaladaṃ puṃsāṃ tatra bhadrapatir hariḥ 
tattīrthasevināṃ puṃsāṃ sarvasiddhipradāyakam 
maṅgalaikanidhiḥ sākṣād devadevo janārdanaḥ

patatritīrtham ākhyātaṃ rogaghnaṃ pāpanāśanam 
tasya śravaṇamātreṇa kṛtakṛtyo bhaven naraḥ

babhūvatuḥ kaśyapasya sutāv aruṇāv īśvarau 
saṃpātiś ca jaṭāyuś ca saṃbhavetāṃ tadanvaye

tārkṣyaprajāpateḥ putrāv aruṇo garuḍas tathā 
tadanvaye saṃbhūtaḥ ca saṃpātiḥ patagottamaḥ

jaṭāyur iti vikhyāto hy aparaḥ sodaro 'nujaḥ 
anyonyaspardhayā yuktāv unmattau svabalena tau

saṃjagmatur dinakaraṃ namaskartuṃ vihāyasi 
yāvat sūryasya sāmīpyaṃ prāptau tau vihagottamau

dagdhapakṣāv ubhau śrāntau patitau girimūrdhani 
bāndhavau patitau dṛṣṭvā niśceṣṭau gatacetasau

tāvad duḥkhābhibhūto 'sāv aruṇaḥ prāha bhāskaram 
tau dṛṣṭvā tv aruṇaḥ sūry.am prāhedaṃ patitau bhuvi 
āśvāsayaitau tigmāṃśo yāvan naitau mariṣyataḥ

tathety uktvā dinakaro jīvayām āsa tau khagau 
garuḍo 'pi tayoḥ śrutvā avasthāṃ saha viṣṇunā

āgatyāśvāsayām āsa sukhaṃ cakre ca nārada 
sarva eva tadā jagmur gaṅgāṃ tāpāpanuttaye

jaṭāyuś cāruṇaś caiva saṃpātir garuḍas tathā 
sūryo viṣṇus tat prayayau tat tīrthaṃ bahupuṇyadam

patatritīrtham ākhyātaṃ viṣaghnaṃ sarvakāmadam 
svayaṃ sūryas tathā viṣṇuḥ suparṇenāruṇena ca

āsate gautamītīre tathaiva vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ 
trayāṇām api devānāṃ sthites tat tīrtham uttamam

tatra snātvā śucir bhūtvā namaskuryāt surān imān 
ādhivyādhivinirmuktaḥ sa paraṃ saukhyam āpnuyāt

vipratīrtham iti khyātaṃ tathā nārāyaṇaṃ viduḥ 
tasyākhyānaṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu vismayakārakam

antarvedyāṃ dvijaḥ kaścid brāhmaṇo vedapāragaḥ 
tasya putrā mahāprājñā guṇarūpadayānvitāḥ

teṣāṃ kanīyān yo bhrātā śānto guṇagaṇair vṛtaḥ 
āsandiva iti khyātaḥ sarvajñāno mahāmatiḥ

vivāhāya pitā tasmāai āsandivāya yatnavān 
etasminn antare rātrau suptaṃ taṃ dvijaputrakam

aviṣṇusmaraṇaṃ saumyaśiraskam asamāhitam 
āsandivaṃ krūrarūpā rākṣasī kāmarūpiṇī

tam ādāyāgamac chīghraṃ gautamyā dakṣiṇe taṭe 
śrīgirer uttare pāre bahubrāhmaṇasevitam

nagaraṃ dharmanilayaṃ lakṣmyā nilayam eva ca 
tatra rājā bṛhatkīrtiḥ sarvakṣatraguṇānvitaḥ

tasyāmitakṣemasubhikṣayuktaṃ niśāvasāne dvijaputrayuktā
sā rākṣasī tat puram āsasāda manojñarūpāṇi bibharti nityam

sā kāmarūpeṇa caraty aśeṣāṃ mahīm imāṃ tena samaṃ dvijena
godāvarīdakṣiṇatīrabhāge vṛddhākṛtis taṃ dvijam āha bhīmā

eṣā tu gaṅgā dvijamukhya saṃdhyā upāsyatāṃ vipravaraiḥ sametya
yathocitaṃ vipravarās tu kāle nopāsate yatnata eva saṃdhyām

nīcās ta evābhihitāḥ sureśair antyāvasāyipravarās ta ete
ahaṃ janitrī tava ceti vācyaṃ no ced idānīṃ tvam upaiṣi nāśam

madvākyakartāsi yadi dvijendra sukhaṃ kariṣye tava yat priyaṃ ca
punaś ca deśaṃ nilayaṃ gurūṃś ca saṃprāpayiṣye nanu satyam etat

sa prāha kā tvaṃ dvijapuṃgavo 'pi sovāca taṃ rākṣasī kāmarūpā
viśvāsayantī śapathair anekais taṃ bhrāntacittaṃ munirājaputram

kaṅkālinī nāma jagatprasiddhā vipro 'pi tām āha niveditaṃ yat
tad eva kartāsmi na saṃśayo 'tra yat tat priyaṃ vacmi karomi caiva

tad vipravacanaṃ śrutvā rākṣasī kāmarūpiṇī 
vṛddhā tathāpi cārvaṅgī divyālaṃkārabhūṣaṇā

dvijam ādāya sarvatra matsuto 'yaṃ guṇākaraḥ 
evaṃ vadantī sarvatra yāti vakti karoti ca

taṃ vipraṃ rūpasaubhāgyavayovidyāvibhūṣitam 
tāṃ ca vṛddhāṃ guṇopetām asya māteti menire

tatra dvijavaraḥ kaścit svāṃ kanyāṃ bhūṣaṇānvitām 
rākṣasīṃ tāṃ puraskṛtya prādāt tasmai dvijātaye

sā kanyā taṃ patiṃ prāpya kṛtārthāsmīty acintayat 
sa dvijo 'pi guṇair yuktāṃ patnīṃ dṛṣṭvā suduḥkhitaḥ

mām iyaṃ bhakṣayed eva rākṣasī pāparūpiṇī 
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi kasyaitat kathayāmi vā

mahat saṃkaṭam āpannaṃ rakṣayiṣyati ko 'tra mām 
bhāryā mameyaṃ kalyāṇī guṇarūpavayoyutā 
enām apy aśubhākasmād bhakṣayiṣyati rākṣasī

etasminn antare tatra bhāryā sā guṇaśālinī 
vṛddhāpy atidurādharṣā sā gatā kutracit tadā

praśrayāvanatā bhūtvā bālā cāpi pativratā 
bhartāraṃ duḥkhitaṃ jñātvā patiṃ prāha rahaḥ śanaiḥ
kasmāt te duḥkham āpannaṃ svāmiṃs tattvaṃ vadasva me

śanaiḥ provāca tāṃ bhāryāṃ yathāvat pūrvavistaram 
kim akathyaṃ priye mitre kulīnāyāṃ ca yoṣiti
bhartṛvākyaṃ niśamyedaṃ provāca vadatāṃ varā

anātmanaḥ sarvato 'pi bhayam asti gṛheṣv api 
kuto bhayaṃ hy ātmavatāṃ kiṃ punar gautamītaṭe

vasatāṃ viṣṇubhaktānāṃ viraktānāṃ vivekinām 
atra snātvā śucir bhūtvā stuhi devam anāmayam

etad ākarṇya gaṅgāyāṃ snātvā vigatakalmaṣaḥ 
tuṣṭāva gautamītīre dvijo nārāyaṇaṃ tathā

tvam antarātmā jagato 'sya nātha tvam eva kartāsya mukunda hartā
tvaṃ pālakaḥ pālayase na dīnam anāthabandho narasiṃha kasmāt

śrutvaitat prārthanaṃ tasya jagacchokanivāraṇaḥ 
nārāyaṇo 'pi tāṃ pāpāṃ nijaghāna sa rākṣasīm

sudarśanena cakreṇa sahasrāreṇa bhāsvatā 
tasmai prādād varān iṣṭān prāpayac ca guruṃ prabhuḥ

tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ vipraṃ nārāyaṇaṃ viduḥ 
snānadānena pūjādyair yatra sidhyati vāñchitam

bhānutīrtham iti khyātaṃ tvāṣṭraṃ māheśvaraṃ tathā 
aindraṃ yāmyaṃ tathāgneyaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam

abhiṣṭuta iti khyāto rājāsīt priyadarśanaḥ 
hayamedhena puṇyena yaṣṭum ārabdhavān surān

tatrartvijaḥ ṣoḍaśa syur vasiṣṭhātripurogamāḥ 
kṣatriye yajamāne tu yajñabhūmiḥ kathaṃ bhavet

brāhmaṇe dīkṣite rājā bhuvaṃ dāsyati yajñiyām 
bhūpatau dīkṣite dātā ko bhavet ko nu yācate

yācñeyam akhilāśarmajananī pāparūpiṇī 
kenāpy ato na kāryaiva kṣatriyeṇa viśeṣataḥ

evaṃ mīmāṃsamāneṣu brāhmaṇeṣu parasparam 
tatra prāha mahāprājño vasiṣṭho dharmavittamaḥ

rājñi dīkṣāyamāṇe tu sūryo yācyo bhuvaṃ prati 
dehi me deva savitar yajanaṃ devatocitam

daivaṃ kṣatram asi brahman bhūtanātha namo 'stu te 
yācitaḥ savitā rājñā devānāṃ yajanaṃ śubham
dadāty eva tato rājan prārthayeśaṃ divākaram

tathety uktvābhiṣṭuto 'pi devadevaṃ divākaram 
śraddhayā prārthayām āsa harīśājātmakaṃ ravim
devānāṃ yajanaṃ dehi savitas te namo 'stu te

kṣatraṃ daivaṃ yataḥ sūryo dattā bhūr bhūpates tataḥ 
savitā devadeveśo dadāmīty abhyabhāṣata

evaṃ karoti yo yajñaṃ tasya riṣṭir na kācana 
tathā vājimakhe sattre brāhmaṇair vedapāragaiḥ

prārabdhe 'bhiṣṭutā rājñā yatrāgād bhūpatiṃ raviḥ 
devānāṃ yajanaṃ dātuṃ bhānutīrthaṃ tad ucyate

taṃ devakratum utkṛṣṭaṃ hayamedhaṃ surair yutam 
daityāś ca danujāś caiva tathānye yajñaghātakāḥ

brahmaveṣadharāḥ sarve gāyantaḥ sāmagā iva 
te 'pi tatra mahāprājñāḥ prāviśann anivāritāḥ

camasāni ca pātrāṇi somaṃ caṣālam eva ca 
somapānaṃ havis tyāgam ṛtvijo bhūpatiṃ tathā

nindanti nikṣipanty anye hasanty anye tathāsurāḥ 
teṣāṃ ceṣṭāṃ na jānanti viśvarūpaṃ vinā mune

viśvarūpo 'pi pitaraṃ prāha daityā ime iti 
tat putravacanaṃ śrutvā tvaṣṭā prāha surān idam

gṛhītvā vāridarbhāṃś ca prokṣayadhvaṃ samantataḥ 
ye nindanti makhaṃ puṇyaṃ camasaṃ somam eva ca
mayā tv apahatāḥ sarva ity uktvā pariṣiñcata

tathā cakruḥ suragaṇās tvaṣṭā cāpi tathākarot 
bhasmībhūtās tataḥ sarve kāṃdiśīkās tato 'bhavan

hatā mayā mahāpāpā ity uktvā vāry avākṣipat 
tataḥ kṣīṇāyuṣo daityāḥ prātiṣṭhan kupitās tataḥ

yatraitat prākṣipad vāri tvaṣṭā lokaprajāpatiḥ 
tvāṣṭraṃ tīrthaṃ tad ākhyātaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam

tvaṣṭur vākyāc cyutān daityān nijaghāna yamas tadā 
kāladaṇḍena cakreṇa kālapāśena manyunā

yatra te nihatā daityās tat tīrthaṃ yāmyam ucyate 
yatrābhavat kratuḥ pūrṇo hutvāgnau cāmṛtaṃ bahu

dhārābhiḥ śaramānābhir akhaṇḍābhir mahādhvare 
yatrābhavad dhavyavāhas tṛptas tasya hy abhiṣṭutaḥ

agnitīrthaṃ tad ākhyātam aśvamedhaphalapradam 
indro marudbhir nṛpatiṃ prāhedaṃ vacanaṃ śubham

tvaṃ saṃrāḍ bhavitā rājann ubhayor api lokayoḥ 
sakhā mama priyo nityaṃ bhavitā nātra saṃśayaḥ

sa kṛtārtho martyaloka indratīrthe ca tarpaṇam 
kuryāt pitṝṇāṃ prītyarthaṃ yamatīrthe viśeṣataḥ

māheśvaraṃ tu tat tīrthaṃ pūjito 'bhiṣṭutaḥ śivaḥ 
bhaktiyuktena vipraiś ca sarvakarmaviśāradaiḥ

vaidikair laukikaiś caiva mantraiḥ pūjyaṃ maheśvaram 
nṛtyair gītais tathā vādyair amṛtaiḥ pañcasaṃbhavaiḥ

upacāraiś ca bahubhir daṇḍapātapradakṣiṇaiḥ 
dhūpair dīpaiś ca naivedyaiḥ puṣpair gandhaiḥ sugandhibhiḥ

pūjayām āsa deveśaṃ viṣṇuṃ śaṃbhuṃ dhiyaikayā 
tataḥ prasannau deveśau varān dadatur ojasā

abhiṣṭute narendrāya bhuktimuktī ubhe api 
māhātmyam asya tīrthasya tathā dadatur uttamam

tataḥprabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ śaivaṃ vaiṣṇavam ucyate 
tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca sarvakāmapradaṃ viduḥ

imāni sarvatīrthāni smared api paṭheta vā 
vimuktaḥ sarvapāpebhyaḥ śivaviṣṇupuraṃ vrajet

bhānutīrthe viśeṣeṇa snānaṃ sarvārthasiddhidam 
tatra tīrthe mahāpuṇyaṃ tīrthānāṃ śatam atra hi

bhillatīrtham iti khyātaṃ rogaghnaṃ pāpanāśanam 
mahādevapadāmbhojayugabhaktipradāyakam

tatrāpy evaṃvidhāṃ puṇyāṃ kathāṃ śṛṇu mahāmate 
gaṅgāyā dakṣiṇe tīre śrīgirer uttare taṭe

ādikeśa iti khyāta ṛṣibhiḥ paripūjitaḥ 
mahādevo liṅgarūpī sadāste sarvakāmadaḥ

sindhudvīpa iti khyāto muniḥ paramadhārmikaḥ 
tasya bhrātā veda iti sa cāpi paramo ṛṣiḥ

tam ādikeśaṃ vai devaṃ tripurāriṃ trilocanam 
nityaṃ pūjayate bhaktyā prāpte madhyaṃdine ravau

bhikṣāṭanāya vedo 'pi yāti grāmaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ 
yāte tasmin dvijavare vyādhaḥ paramadhārmikaḥ

tasmin girivare puṇye mṛgayāṃ yāti nityaśaḥ 
aṭitvā vividhān deśān mṛgān hatvā yathāsukham

mukhe gṛhītvā pānīyam abhiṣekāya śūlinaḥ 
nyasya māṃsaṃ dhanuṣkoṭyāṃ śrānto vyādhaḥ śivaṃ prabhum

ādikeśaṃ samāgatya nyasya māṃsaṃ tato bahiḥ 
gaṅgāṃ gatvā mukhe vāri gṛhītvāgatya taṃ śivam

yasya kasyāpi pattrāṇi kareṇādāya bhaktitaḥ 
apareṇa ca māṃsāni naivedyārthaṃ ca tanmanāḥ

ādikeśaṃ samāgatya vedenārcitam ojasā 
pādenāhatya tāṃ pūjāṃ mukhānītena vāriṇā

snāpayitvā śivaṃ devam arcayitvā tu pattrakaiḥ 
kalpayitvā tu tan māṃsaṃ śivo me prīyatām iti

naiva kiṃcit sa jānāti śivabhaktiṃ vinā śubhām 
tato yāti svakaṃ sthānaṃ māṃsena tu yathāgatam

karoty etādṛg āgatyāgatya pratyaham eva saḥ 
tathāpīśas tutoṣāsya vicitrā hīśvarasthitiḥ

yāvan nāyāty asau bhillaḥ śivas tāvan na saukhyabhāk 
bhaktānukampitāṃ śaṃbhor mānātītāṃ tu vetti kaḥ

saṃpūjayaty ādikeśam umayā pratyahaṃ śivam 
evaṃ bahutithe kāle yāte vedaś cukopa ha

pūjāṃ mantravatīṃ citrāṃ śivabhaktisamanvitām 
ko nu vidhvaṃsate pāpo mattaḥ sa vadham āpnuyāt

gurudevadvijasvāmidrohī vadhyo muner api 
sarvasyāpi vadhārho 'sau śivasya drohakṛn naraḥ

evaṃ niścitya medhāvī vedaḥ sindhos tathānujaḥ 
kasyeyaṃ pāpaceṣṭā syāt pāpiṣṭhasya durātmanaḥ

puṣpair vanyabhavair divyaiḥ kandair mūlaphalaiḥ śubhaiḥ 
kṛtāṃ pūjāṃ sa vidhvasya hy anyāṃ pūjāṃ karoti yaḥ

māṃsena tarupattraiś ca sa ca vadhyo bhaven mama 
evaṃ saṃcintya medhāvī gopayitvā tanuṃ tadā

taṃ paśyeyam ahaṃ pāpaṃ pūjākartāram īśvare 
etasminn antare prāyād vyādho devaṃ yathā purā
nityavat pūjayantaṃ tam ādikeśas tadābravīt

bho bho vyādha mahābuddhe śrānto 'sīti punaḥ punaḥ 
cirāya katham āyātas tvāṃ vinā tāta duḥkhitaḥ 
na vindāmi sukhaṃ kiṃcit samāśvasihi putraka

tam evaṃvādinaṃ devaṃ vedaḥ śrutvā vilokya tu 
cukopa vismayāviṣṭo na ca kiṃcid uvāca ha

vyādhaś ca nityavat pūjāṃ kṛtvā svabhavanaṃ yayau 
vedaś ca kupito bhūtvā āgatyeśam uvāca ha

ayaṃ vyādhaḥ pāparataḥ kriyājñānavivarjitaḥ 
prāṇihiṃsārataḥ krūro nirdayaḥ sarvajantuṣu

hīnajātir akiṃcijjño gurukramavivarjitaḥ 
sadānucitakārī cānirjitākhilagogaṇaḥ

tasyātmānaṃ darśitavān na māṃ kiṃcana vakṣyasi 
pūjāṃ mantravidhānena karomīśa yatavrataḥ

tvadekaśaraṇo nityaṃ bhāryāputravivarjitaḥ 
vyādho māṃsena duṣṭena pūjāṃ tava karoty asau

tasya prasanno bhagavān na mameti mahādbhutam 
śāstim asya kariṣyāmi bhillasya hy apakāriṇaḥ

mṛdoḥ kopi bhavet prītaḥ kopi tadvad durātmanaḥ 
tasmād ahaṃ mūrdhni śilāṃ pātayeyam asaṃśayam
ity uktavati vai vede vihasyeśo 'bravīd idam
śvaḥ pratīkṣasva paścān me śilāṃ pātaya mūrdhani

tathety uktvā sa vedo 'pi śilāṃ saṃtyajya bāhunā 
upasaṃhṛtya taṃ kopaṃ śvaḥ karomīty uvāca ha

tataḥ prātaḥ samāgatya kṛtvā snānādikarma ca 
vedo 'pi nityavat pūjāṃ kurvan paśyati mastake

liṅgasya savraṇāṃ bhīmāṃ dhārāṃ ca rudhiraplutām 
vedaḥ sa vismito bhūtvā kim idaṃ liṅgamūrdhani

mahotpāto bhavet kasya sūcayed ity acintayat 
mṛdbhiś ca gomayenāpi kuśais taṃ gāṅgavāribhiḥ

prakṣālayitvā tāṃ pūjāṃ kṛtavān nityavat tadā 
etasminn antare prāyād vyādho vigatakalmaṣaḥ

mūrdhānaṃ vraṇasaṃyuktaṃ saraktaṃ liṅgamastake 
śaṃkarasyādikeśasya dadṛśe 'ntargatas tadā

dṛṣṭvaiva kim idaṃ citram ity uktvā niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ 
ātmānaṃ bhedayām āsa śatadhā ca sahasradhā

svāmino vaikṛtaṃ dṛṣṭvā kaḥ kṣametottamāśayaḥ 
muhur nininda cātmānaṃ mayi jīvaty abhūd idam

kaṣṭam āpatitaṃ kīdṛg aho durvidhivaiśasāt 
tat karma tasya saṃvīkṣya mahādevo 'tivismitaḥ 
tataḥ provāca bhagavān vedaṃ vedavidāṃ varam

paśya vyādhaṃ mahābuddhe bhaktaṃ bhāvena saṃyutam 
tvaṃ tu mṛdbhiḥ kuśair vārbhir mūrdhānaṃ spṛṣṭavān asi

anena sahasā brahman mamātmāpi niveditaḥ 
bhaktiḥ premāthavā śaktir vicāro yatra vidyate 
tasmād asmai varān dāsye paścāt tubhyaṃ dvijottama

vareṇa cchandayām āsa vyādhaṃ devo maheśvaraḥ 
vyādhaḥ provāca deveśaṃ nirmālyaṃ tava yad bhavet

tad asmākaṃ bhaven nātha mannāmnā tīrtham ucyatām 
sarvakratuphalaṃ tīrthaṃ smaraṇād eva jāyatām

tathety uvāca deveśas tatas tat tīrtham uttamam 
bhillatīrthaṃ samastāghasaṃghavicchedakāraṇam

śrīmahādevacaraṇamahābhaktividhāyakam 
abhavat snānadānādyair bhuktimuktipradāyakam 
vedasyāpi varān prādāc chivo nānāvidhān bahūn

cakṣustīrtham iti khyātaṃ rūpasaubhāgyadāyakam 
yatra yogeśvaro devo gautamyā dakṣiṇe taṭe

puraṃ bhauvanam ākhyātaṃ girimūrdhny abhidhīyate 
yatrāsau bhauvano rājā kṣatradharmaparāyaṇaḥ

tasmin puravare kaścid brāhmaṇo vṛddhakauśikaḥ 
tatputro gautama iti khyāto vedaviduttamaḥ

tasya mātur manodoṣād viparīto 'bhavad dvijaḥ 
sakhā tasya vaṇik kaścin maṇikuṇḍala ucyate

tena sakhyaṃ dvijasyāsīd viṣamaṃ dvijavaiśyayoḥ 
śrīmaddaridrayor nityaṃ parasparahitaiṣiṇoḥ

kadācid gautamo vaiśyaṃ vitteśaṃ maṇikuṇḍalam 
prāhedaṃ vacanaṃ prītyā rahaḥ sthitvā punaḥ punaḥ

gacchāmo dhanam ādātuṃ parvatān udadhīn api 
yauvanaṃ tad vṛthā jñeyaṃ vinā saukhyānukūlyataḥ 
dhanaṃ vinā tat kathaṃ syād aho dhiṅ nirdhanaṃ naram

kuṇḍalo dvijam āhedaṃ matpitropārjitaṃ dhanam 
bahv asti kiṃ dhanenādya kariṣye dvijasattama 
dvijaḥ punar uvācedaṃ maṇikuṇḍalam ojasā

dharmārthajñānakāmānāṃ ko nu tṛptaḥ praśasyate 
utkarṣaprāptir evaiṣāṃ sakhe ślāghyā śarīriṇām

svenaiva vyavasāyena dhanyā jīvanti jantavaḥ 
paradattārthasaṃtuṣṭāḥ kaṣṭajīvina eva te

sa putraḥ śasyate loke pitṛbhiś cābhinandyate 
yaḥ paitryam abhilipseta na vācāpi tu kuṇḍala

svabāhubalam āśritya yo 'rthān arjayate sutaḥ 
sa kṛtārtho bhavel loke paitryaṃ vittaṃ na tu spṛśet

svayam ārjya suto vittaṃ pitre dāsyati bandhave 
taṃ tu putraṃ vijānīyād itaro yonikīṭakaḥ

etac chrutvā tu tad vākyaṃ brāhmaṇasyābhilāṣiṇaḥ 
tatheti matvā tadvākyaṃ ratnāny ādāya satvaraḥ

ātmakīyāni vittāni gautamāya nyavedayat 
dhanenaitena deśāṃś ca paribhramya yathāsukham

dhanāny ādāya vittāni punar eṣyāmahe gṛham 
satyam eva vaṇig vakti sa tu vipraḥ pratārakaḥ

pāpātmā pāpacittaṃ ca na bubodha vaṇig dvijam 
tau parasparam āmantrya mātāpitror ajānatoḥ

deśād deśāntaraṃ yātau dhanārthaṃ tau vaṇigdvijau 
vaṇigghastasthitaṃ vittaṃ brāhmaṇo hartum icchati

yena kenāpy upāyena tad dhanaṃ hi samāhare 
aho pṛthivyāṃ ramyāṇi nagarāṇi sahasraśaḥ

iṣṭapradātryaḥ kāmasya devatā iva yoṣitaḥ 
manoharās tatra tatra santi kiṃ kriyate mayā

dhanam āhṛtya yatnena yoṣidbhyo yadi dīyate 
bhujyante tās tato nityaṃ saphalaṃ jīvitaṃ hi tat

nṛtyagītarato nityaṃ paṇyastrībhir alaṃkṛtaḥ 
bhokṣye kathaṃ tu tad vittaṃ vaiśyān maddhastam āgatam

evaṃ cintayamāno 'sau gautamaḥ prahasann iva 
maṇikuṇḍalam āhedam adharmād eva jantavaḥ

vṛddhiṃ sukham abhīṣṭāni prāpnuvanti na saṃśayaḥ 
dharmiṣṭhāḥ prāṇino loke dṛśyante duḥkhabhāginaḥ
tasmād dharmeṇa kiṃ tena duḥkhaikaphalahetunā

nety uvāca tato vaiśyaḥ sukhaṃ dharme pratiṣṭhitam 
pāpe duḥkhaṃ bhayaṃ śoko dāridryaṃ kleśa eva ca 
yato dharmas tato muktiḥ svadharmaḥ kiṃ vinaśyati

evaṃ vivadatos tatra saṃparāyas tayor abhūt 
yasya pakṣo bhavej jyāyān sa parārtham avāpnuyāt

pṛcchāvaḥ kasya prābalyaṃ dharmiṇo vāpy adharmiṇaḥ 
vedāt tu laukikaṃ jyeṣṭhaṃ loke dharmāt sukhaṃ bhavet

evaṃ vivadamānau tāv ūcatuḥ sakalāñ janān 
dharmasya vāpy adharmasya prābalyam anayor bhuvi

tad vadantu yathāvṛttam evam ūcatur ojasā 
evaṃ tatrocire kecid ye dharmeṇānuvartinaḥ

tair duḥkham anubhūyate pāpiṣṭhāḥ sukhino janāḥ 
saṃparāye dhanaṃ sarvaṃ jitaṃ vipre nyavedayat

maṇimān dharmavicchreṣṭhaḥ punar dharmaṃ praśaṃsati 
maṇimantaṃ dvijaḥ prāha kiṃ dharmam anuśaṃsasi 

tatheti cety āha vaiśyo brāhmaṇaḥ punar abravīt

jitaṃ mayā dhanaṃ vaiśya nirlajjaḥ kiṃ nu bhāṣase 
mayaiva vijito dharmo yatheṣṭacaraṇātmanā
tad brāhmaṇavacaḥ śrutvā vaiśyaḥ sasmita ūcivān

pulākā iva dhānyeṣu puttikā iva pakṣiṣu 
tathaiva tān sakhe manye yeṣāṃ dharmo na vidyate

caturṇāṃ puruṣārthānāṃ dharmaḥ prathama ucyate 
paścād arthaś ca kāmaś ca sa dharmo mayi tiṣṭhati 
kathaṃ brūṣe dvijaśreṣṭha mayā vijitam ity adaḥ

dvijo vaiśyaṃ punaḥ prāha hastābhyāṃ jāyatāṃ paṇaḥ 
tatheti manyate vaiśyas tau gatvā punar ūcatuḥ

pūrvaval laukikān gatvā jitam ity abravīd dvijaḥ 
karau chittvā tataḥ prāha kathaṃ dharmaṃ tu manyase 
ākṣipto brāhmaṇenaivaṃ vaiśyo vacanam abravīt

dharmam eva paraṃ manye prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatair api 
mātā pitā suhṛd bandhur dharma eva śarīriṇām

evaṃ vivadamānau tāv arthavān brāhmaṇo 'bhavat 
vimukto vaiśyakas tatra bāhubhyāṃ ca dhanena ca

evaṃ bhramantau saṃprāptau gaṅgāṃ yogeśvaraṃ harim 
yadṛcchayā muniśreṣṭha mithas tāv ūcatuḥ punaḥ

vaiśyo gaṅgāṃ tu yogeśaṃ dharmam eva praśaṃsati 
atikopād dvijo vaiśyam ākṣipan punar abravīt

gataṃ dhanaṃ karau chinnāv avaśiṣṭo śubhir bhavān 
tvam anyathā yadi brūṣa āhariṣye 'sinā śiraḥ
vihasya punar āhedaṃ vaiśyo gautamam añjasā

dharmam eva paraṃ manye yathecchasi tathā kuru 
brāhmaṇāṃś ca gurūn devān vedān dharmaṃ janārdanam

yas tu nindayate pāpo nāsau spṛśyo 'tha pāpakṛt 
upekṣaṇīyo durvṛttaḥ pāpātmā dharmadūṣakaḥ

tataḥ prāha sa kopena dharmaṃ yady anuśaṃsasi 
āvayoḥ prāṇayor atra paṇaḥ syād iti vai mune

evam ukte gautamena tathety āha vaṇik tadā 
punar apy ūcatur ubhau lokāṃl lokās tathocire

yogeśvarasya purato gautamyā dakṣiṇe taṭe 
taṃ nipātya viśaṃ vipraś cakṣur utpāṭya cābravīt

gato 'sīmāṃ daśāṃ vaiśya nityaṃ dharmapraśaṃsayā 
gataṃ dhanaṃ gataṃ cakṣuś cheditau karapallavau 
pṛṣṭo 'si mitra gacchāmi maivaṃ brūyāḥ kathāntare

tasmin prayāte vaiśyo 'sau cintayām āsa cetasi 
hā kaṣṭaṃ me kim abhavad dharmaikamanaso hare

sa kuṇḍalo vaṇikśreṣṭho nirdhano gatabāhukaḥ 
gatanetraḥ śucaṃ prāpto dharmam evānusaṃsmaran

evaṃ bahuvidhāṃ cintāṃ kurvann āste mahītale 
niśceṣṭo 'tha nirutsāhaḥ patitaḥ śokasāgare

dināvasāne śarvaryām udite candramaṇḍale 
ekādaśyāṃ śuklapakṣe tatrāyāti vibhīṣaṇaḥ

sa tu yogeśvaraṃ devaṃ pūjayitvā yathāvidhi 
snātvā tu gautamīṃ gaṅgāṃ saputro rākṣasair vṛtaḥ

vibhīṣaṇasya hi suto vibhīṣaṇa ivāparaḥ 
vaibhīṣaṇir iti khyātas tam apaśyad uvāca ha

vaiśyasya vacanaṃ śrutvā yathāvṛttaṃ sa dharmavit 
pitre nivedayām āsa laṅkeśāya mahātmane 
sa tu laṅkeśvaraḥ prāha putraṃ prītyā guṇākaram

śrīmān rāmo mama gurus tasya mānyaḥ sakhā mama 
hanumān iti vikhyātas tenānīto girir mahān

purā kāryāntare prāpte sarvauṣadhyāśrayo 'calaḥ 
jāte kārye tam ādāya himavantam athāgamat

viśalyakaraṇī ceti mṛtasaṃjīvanīti ca 
tadānīya mahābuddhī rāmāyākliṣṭakarmaṇe

nivedayitvā tat sādhyaṃ tasmin vṛtte samāgataḥ 
punar giriṃ samādāya āgacchad devaparvatam

tām ānīyāsya hṛdaye niveśaya hariṃ smaran 
tataḥ prāpsyaty ayaṃ sarvam apekṣitam udāradhīḥ

gacchatas tasya vegena viśalyakaraṇī punaḥ 
apatad gautamītīre yatra yogeśvaro hariḥ

tām oṣadhīṃ mama pitar darśayāśu vilamba mā 
parārtiśamanād anyac chreyo na bhuvanatraye

vibhīṣaṇas tathety uktvā tāṃ putrasyāpy adarśayat 
iṣe tvety asya vṛkṣasya śākhāṃ ciccheda tatsutaḥ 
vaiśyasya cāpi vai prītyā santaḥ parahite ratāḥ

yatrāpatan nage cāsmin sa vṛkṣas tu pratāpavān 
tasya śākhāṃ samādāya hṛdaye 'sya niveśaya 
tatspṛṣṭamātra evāsau svakaṃ rūpam avāpnuyāt

etac chrutvā pitur vākyaṃ vaibhīṣaṇir udāradhīḥ 
tathā cakāra vai samyak kāṣṭhakhaṇḍaṃ nyaveśayat

hṛdaye sa tu vaiśyo 'pi sacakṣuḥ sakaro 'bhavat 
maṇimantrauṣadhīnāṃ hi vīryaṃ ko 'pi na budhyate

tad eva kāṣṭham ādāya dharmam evānusaṃsmaran 
snātvā tu gautamīṃ gaṅgāṃ tathā yogeśvaraṃ harim

namaskṛtvā punar agāt kāṣṭhakhaṇḍena vaiśyakaḥ 
paribhraman nṛpapuraṃ mahāpuram iti śrutam

mahārāja iti khyātas tatra rājā mahābalaḥ 
tasya nāsti sutaḥ kaścit putrikā naṣṭalocanā

saiva tasya sutā putras tasyāpi vratam īdṛśam 
devo vā dānavo vāpi brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyo bhavet

vaiśyo vā śūdrayonir vā saguṇo nirguṇo 'pi vā 
tasmai deyā iyaṃ putrī yo netre āhariṣyati

rājyena saha deyeyam iti rājā hy aghoṣayat 
aharniśam asau vaiśyaḥ śrutvā ghoṣam athābravīt
ahaṃ netre āhariṣye rājaputryā asaṃśayam

taṃ vaiśyaṃ tarasādāya mahārājñe nyavedayat 
tatkāṣṭhasparśamātreṇa sanetrābhūn nṛpātmajā

tataḥ savismayo rājā ko bhavān iti cābravīt 
vaiśyo rājñe yathāvṛttaṃ nyavedayad aśeṣataḥ

brāhmaṇānāṃ prasādena dharmasya tapasas tathā 
dānaprabhāvād yajñaiś ca vividhair bhūridakṣiṇaiḥ 
divyauṣadhiprabhāvena mama sāmarthyam īdṛśam
etad vaiśyavacaḥ śrutvā vismito 'bhūn mahīpatiḥ

aho mahānubhāvo 'yaṃ prāyo vṛndārako bhavet 
anyathaitādṛg anyasya sāmarthyaṃ dṛśyate katham 
tasmād asmai tu tāṃ kanyāṃ pradāsye rājyapūrvikām

iti saṃkalpya manasi kanyāṃ rājyaṃ ca dattavān 
vihārārthaṃ gataḥ svairaṃ paraṃ khedam upāgataḥ

na mitreṇa vinā rājyaṃ na mitreṇa vinā sukham 
tam eva satataṃ vipraṃ cintayan vaiśyanandanaḥ

etad eva sujātānāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ bhuvi dehinām 
kṛpārdraṃ yan mano nityaṃ teṣām apy ahiteṣu hi

mahānṛpo vanaṃ prāyāt sa rājā maṇikuṇḍalaḥ 
tasmiñ śāsati rājyaṃ tu kadācid gautamaṃ dvijam

hṛtasvaṃ dyūtakaiḥ pāpair apaśyan maṇikuṇḍalaḥ 
tam ādāya dvijaṃ mitraṃ pūjayām āsa dharmavit

dharmāṇāṃ tu prabhāvaṃ taṃ tasmai sarvaṃ nyavedayat 
snāpayām āsa gaṅgāyāṃ taṃ sarvāghanivṛttaye

tena vipreṇa sarvais taiḥ svakīyair gotrajair vṛtaḥ 
vaiśyaiḥ svadeśasaṃbhūtair brāhmaṇasya tu bāndhavaiḥ

vṛddhakauśikamukhyaiś ca tasmin yogeśvarāntike 
yajñān iṣṭvā surān pūjya tataḥ svargam upeyivān

tataḥ prabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ mṛtasaṃjīvanaṃ viduḥ 
cakṣustīrthaṃ sayogeśaṃ smaraṇād api puṇyadam 
manaḥprasādajananaṃ sarvadurbhāvanāśanam

urvaśītīrtham ākhyātam aśvamedhaphalapradam 
snānadānamahādevavāsudevārcanādibhiḥ

maheśvaro yatra devo yatra śārṅgadharo hariḥ 
pramatir nāma rājāsīt sārvabhaumaḥ pratāpavān

ripūñ jitvā jagāmāśu indralokaṃ surair vṛtam 
tatrāpaśyat surapatiṃ marudbhiḥ saha nārada

jahāsendraṃ pāśahastaṃ pramatiḥ kṣatriyarṣabhaḥ 
taṃ hasantam athālakṣya hariḥ pramatim abravīt

devālaye mahābuddhe marudbhiḥ krīḍitair alam 
diśo jitvā divaṃ prāptaḥ kuru krīḍāṃ mayā saha

sakaṣāyaṃ harivaco niśamya pramatir nṛpaḥ 
tathety uvāca devendraṃ niṣkṛtiṃ kāṃ tu manyase 
tac chrutvā pramater vākyaṃ surarāṇ nṛpam abravīt
urvaśy eva paṇo 'smākaṃ prāpyā yā nikhilair makhaiḥ

etac chrutvendravacanaṃ pramatiḥ prāha garvitaḥ 
urvaśīṃ niṣkṛtiṃ manye tvaṃ rājan kiṃ nu manyase

yad bravīṣi sureśāna tan manye 'haṃ śatakrato 
prāhendraṃ pramatis tadvan niṣkṛtyai dakṣiṇaṃ karam 
savarma saśaraṃ dharmyaṃ dehi dīvyāmahe vayam

tāv evaṃ saṃvidaṃ kṛtvā devanāyopatasthatuḥ 
pramatir jitavāṃs tatra urvaśīṃ daivatastriyam 
tāṃ jitvā pramatiḥ prāha saṃrambhāt taṃ śatakratum
niṣkṛtyai punar anyan me paścād dīvye tvayā vibho

devayogyam atho vajraṃ jaitraṃ saratham uttamam 
dīvye 'haṃ tena nṛpate kareṇāpy avicārayan

sa gṛhītvā tadā pāśān anyāṃś ca maṇibhūṣitān 
jitam ity abravīc chakraṃ pramatiḥ prahasaṃs tadā

etasminn antare prāyād akṣajñas tatra nārada 
viśvāvasur iti khyāto gandharvāṇāṃ maheśvaraḥ

gandharvavidyayā rājaṃs tayā dīvyāmahe tvayā 
tathety uktvā sa nṛpatir jitam ity abravīt tadā
tau jitvā nṛpatir maurkhyād devendraṃ prāha kaśmalam

raṇe vā devane vāpi na tvaṃ jetā kathaṃcana 
mahendra satataṃ tasmād asmadārādhako bhava 
vada kena prakāreṇa jātā devendratā tava

tathā prāhorvaśīṃ garvād gaccha karmakarī bhava 
urvaśī prāha deveṣu yathā varte tathā tvayi 
varteya sarvabhāvena na māṃ dhikkartum arhasi

tatas tāṃ pramatiḥ prāha tvādṛśyaḥ santi cārikāḥ 
tvaṃ kiṃ vilajjase bhadre gaccha karmakarī bhava

etac chrutvā nṛpeṇoktaṃ gandharvādhipatis tadā 
citrasena iti khyātaḥ suto viśvāvasor balī

dīvye 'haṃ vai tvayā rājan sarveṇānena bhūpate 
rājyena jīvitenāpi madīyena tavāpi ca

tathety uktvā punar ubhau citrasenanṛpottamau 
dīvyetām abhisaṃrabdhau citraseno 'jayat tadā

gāndharvais taṃ mahāpāśair babandha nṛpatiṃ tadā 
citraseno 'jayat sarvam urvaśīmukhyataḥ paṇaiḥ

rājyaṃ kośaṃ balaṃ caiva yad anyad vasu kiṃcana 
citrasenasya taj jātaṃ yad āsīt pramater dhanam

tasya putro bāla eva purodhasam uvāca ha 
vaiśvāmitraṃ mahāprājñaṃ madhucchandasam ojasā

kiṃ me pitrā kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ kva vā baddho mahāmatiḥ 
katham eṣyati svaṃ sthānaṃ kathaṃ pāśair vimokṣyate

sumater vacanaṃ śrutvā dhyātvā sa munisattamaḥ 
madhucchandā jagādedaṃ pramater vartanaṃ tadā

devaloke tava pitā baddha āste mahāmate 
kaitavair bahudoṣaiś ca bhraṣṭarājyo babhūva ha

yo yāti kaitavasabhāṃ sa cāpi kleśabhāg bhavet 
dyūtamadyāmiṣādīni vyasanāni nṛpātmaja

pāpinām eva jāyante sadā pāpātmakāni hi 
ekaikam apy anarthāya pāpāya narakāya ca

yānāsanābhilāpādyaiḥ kṛtaiḥ kaitavavartibhiḥ 
kulīnāḥ kaluṣībhūtāḥ kiṃ punaḥ kitavo janaḥ

kitavasya tu yā jāyā tapyate nityam eva sā 
sa cāpi kitavaḥ pāpo yoṣitaṃ vīkṣya tapyate

tāṃ dṛṣṭvā vigatānando nityaṃ vadati pāpakṛt 
aho saṃsāracakre 'smin mayā tulyo na pātakī

na kiṃcid api yasyāste loke viṣayajaṃ sukham 
lokadvaye 'pi na sukhī kitavaḥ kopi dṛśyate

vibhāti ca tathā nityaṃ lajjayā dagdhamānasaḥ 
gatadharmo nirānando grastagarvas tathāṭati

akaitavī ca yā vṛttiḥ sā praśastā dvijanmanām 
kṛṣigorakṣyavāṇijyam api kuryān na kaitavam

yas tu kaitavavṛttyā hi dhanam āhartum icchati 
dharmārthakāmābhijanaiḥ sa vimucyeta pauruṣāt

vede 'pi dūṣitaṃ karma tava pitrā tadādṛtam 
tasmāt kiṃ kurmahe vatsa yad uktaṃ te vidhīyate
vidhātṛvihitaṃ mārgaṃ ko nu vātyeti paṇḍitaḥ
etat purodhaso vākyaṃ śrutvā sumatir abravīt
kiṃ kṛtvā pramatis tātaḥ punā rājyam avāpnuyāt
punar dhyātvā madhucchandāḥ sumatiṃ cedam abravīt

gautamīṃ yāhi vatsa tvaṃ tatra pūjaya śaṃkaram 
aditiṃ varuṇaṃ viṣṇuṃ tataḥ pāśād vimokṣyate

tathety uktvā jagāmāśu gaṅgāṃ natvā janārdanam 
pūjayām āsa śaṃbhuṃ ca tapas tepe yatavrataḥ

sahasram ekaṃ varṣāṇāṃ baddhaṃ pitaram ātmanaḥ 
mocayām āsa devebhyaḥ punā rājyam avāpa saḥ

śiveśābhyāṃ muktapāśo rājyaṃ prāpa sutāt svakāt 
avāpya vidyāṃ gāndharvīṃ priyaś cāsīc chatakratoḥ

śāṃbhavaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ caiva urvaśītīrtham eva ca 
tataḥprabhṛti tat tīrthaṃ kaitavaṃ ceti viśrutam

śivaviṣṇusarinmātuprasādād āpyate na kim 
tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca bahupuṇyaphalapradam 
pāpapāśavimokṣaṃ tu sarvadurgatināśanam

sāmudraṃ tīrtham ākhyātaṃ sarvatīrthaphalapradam 
tasya svarūpaṃ vakṣyāmi śṛṇu nārada tanmanāḥ

visṛṣṭā gautamenāsau gaṅgā pāpapraṇāśanī 
lokānām upakārārthaṃ prāyāt pūrvārṇavaṃ prati

āgacchantī devanadī kamaṇḍaludhṛtā mayā 
śirasā ca dhṛtā devī śaṃbhunā paramātmanā

viṣṇupādāt prasūtāṃ tāṃ brāhmaṇena mahātmanā 
ānītāṃ martyabhavanaṃ smaraṇād aghanāśanīm

guror gurutamāṃ sindhur dṛṣṭvā kṛtyam acintayat 
yā vandyā jagatām īśā brahmeśādyair namaskṛtā

tām ahaṃ pratigaccheyaṃ no cet syād dharmadūṣaṇam 
āgacchantaṃ mahātmānaṃ yo mohān nopatiṣṭhate

na tasya kopi trātāsti pāpino lokayor dvayoḥ 
evaṃ vimṛśya ratneśo mūrtimān vinayānvitaḥ 
kṛtāñjalipuṭo gaṅgām āhedaṃ saritāṃpatiḥ

rasātalagataṃ vāri pṛthivyāṃ yan nabhastale 
tan mām evātra viśatu nāhaṃ vakṣyāmi kiṃcana

mayi ratnāni pīyūṣaṃ parvatā rākṣasāsurāḥ 
etān apy akhilān anyān bhīmān saṃdhārayāmy aham

mamāntaḥ kamalāyukto viṣṇuḥ svapiti nityadā 
mamāśakyaṃ na kimapi vidyate sacarācare

mahaty abhyāgate kuryāt pratyutthānaṃ na yo madāt 
sa dharmādiparibhraṣṭo nirayaṃ tu samāpnuyāt

na tān me bibhrataḥ khedo vināgastyaparābhavāt 
kiṃ tu tvaṃ gauraveṇaiṣām atiriktā tatas tv aham

bravīmi devi gaṅge māṃ tvaṃ sāmyāt saṃgatā bhava 
naikarūpām ahaṃ śaktaḥ saṃgantuṃ bahudhā yadi

saṅgam eṣyasi devi tvaṃ saṃgacche 'haṃ na cānyathā 
gaṅge sameṣyasi yadi bahudhā tad vicāraye

tam evaṃvādinaṃ sindhum apām īśaṃ tadābravīt 
gaṅgā sā gautamī devī kuru caitad vaco mama

saptarṣīṇāṃ ca yā bhāryā arundhatipurogamāḥ 
bhartṛbhiḥ sahitāḥ sarvā ānaya tvaṃ tadā tv aham

alpabhūtā bhaviṣyāmi tataḥ syāṃ tava saṃgatā 
tathety uktvā saptarṣīṇāṃ bhāryābhir ṛṣibhir vṛtaḥ

ānayām āsa tāṃ devī saptadhā sā vyabhajyata 
sā ceyaṃ gautamī gaṅgā saptadhā sāgaraṃ gatā

saptarṣīṇāṃ tu nāmnā tu sapta gaṅgās tato 'bhavan 
tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca śravaṇaṃ paṭhanaṃ tathā

smaraṇaṃ cāpi yad bhaktyā sarvakāmapradaṃ bhavet 
nāsmād anyat paraṃ tīrthaṃ samudrād bhuvanatraye 
pāpahānau bhuktimuktiprāptau ca manaso mude

ṛṣisattram iti khyātam ṛṣayaḥ sapta nārada 
niṣedus tapase yatra yatra bhīmeśvaraḥ śivaḥ

tatredaṃ vṛttam ākhyāsye devarṣipitṛbṛṃhitam 
śṛṇu yatnena vakṣyāmi sarvakāmapradaṃ śubham

saptadhā vyabhajan gaṅgām ṛṣayaḥ sapta nārada 
vāsiṣṭhī dākṣiṇeyī syād vaiśvāmitrī taduttarā

vāmadevy aparā jñeyā gautamī madhyataḥ śubhā 
bhāradvājī smṛtā cānyā ātreyī cety athāparā

jāmadagnī tathā cānyā vyapadiṣṭā tu saptadhā 
taiḥ sarvair ṛṣibhis tatra yaṣṭum iṣṭair mahātmabhiḥ

niṣpāditaṃ mahāsattram ṛṣibhiḥ pāradarśibhiḥ 
etasminn antare tatra devānāṃ prabalo ripuḥ

viśvarūpa iti khyāto munīnāṃ sattram abhyagāt 
brahmacaryeṇa tapasā tān ārādhya yathāvidhi 
vinayenātha papraccha ṛṣīn sarvān anukramāt

dhruvaṃ sarve yathākāmaṃ mama svāsthyena hetunā 
yathā syād balavān putro devānām api durdharaḥ 
yajñair vā tapasā vāpi munayo vaktum arhatha
tatra prāha mahābuddhir viśvāmitro mahāmanāḥ

karmaṇā tāta labhyante phalāni vividhāni ca 
trayāṇāṃ kāraṇānāṃ ca karma prathamakāraṇam

tataś ca kāraṇaṃ kartā tataś cānyat prakīrtitam 
upādānaṃ tathā bījaṃ na ca karma vidur budhāḥ

karmaṇāṃ kāraṇatvaṃ ca kāraṇe puṣkale sati 
bhāvābhāvau phale dṛṣṭau tasmāt karmāśritaṃ phalam

karmāpi dvividhaṃ jñeyaṃ kriyamāṇaṃ tathā kṛtam 
kartavyaṃ kriyamāṇasya sādhanaṃ yad yad ucyate

tadbhāvāḥ karmasiddhau ca ubhayatrāpi kāraṇam 
yad yad bhāvayate jantuḥ karma kurvan vicakṣaṇaḥ

tadbhāvanānurūpeṇa phalaniṣpattir ucyate 
karoti karma vidhivad vinā bhāvanayā yadi

anyathā syāt phalaṃ sarvaṃ tasya bhāvānurūpataḥ 
tasmāt tapo vrataṃ dānaṃ japayajñādikāḥ kriyāḥ

karmaṇas tv anurūpeṇa phalaṃ dāsyanti bhāvataḥ 
tasmād bhāvānurūpeṇa karma vai dāsyate phalam

bhāvas tu trividho jñeyaḥ sāttviko rājasas tathā 
tāmasas tu tathā jñeyaḥ phalaṃ karmānusārataḥ

bhāvanānuguṇaṃ ceti vicitrā karmaṇāṃ sthitiḥ 
tasmād icchānusāreṇa bhāvaṃ kuryād vicakṣaṇaḥ

paścāt karmāpi kartavyaṃ phaladātāpi tadvidham 
phalaṃ dadāti phalināṃ phale yadi pravartate

karmakāro na tatrāsti kuryāt karma svabhāvataḥ 
tad eva copadānādi sattvādiguṇabhedataḥ

bhāvāt prārabhate tadvad bhāvaiḥ phalam avāpyate 
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ karma caiva hi kāraṇam

bhāvasthitaṃ bhavet karma muktidaṃ bandhakāraṇam 
svabhāvānuguṇaṃ karma svasyaiveha paratra ca

phalāni vividhāny āśu karoti samatānugam 
eka eva padārtho 'sau bhāvair bhedaḥ pradṛśyate

kriyate bhujyate vāpi tasmād bhāvo viśiṣyate 
yathābhāvaṃ karma kuru yathepsitam avāpsyasi

etac chrutvā ṛṣer vākyaṃ viśvāmitrasya dhīmataḥ 
tapas taptvā bahukālaṃ tāmasaṃ bhāvam āśritaḥ

viśvarūpaḥ karma bhīmaṃ cakāra surabhīṣaṇam 
paśyatsu ṛṣimukhyeṣu vāryamāṇo 'pi nityaśaḥ

ātmakopānusāreṇa bhīmaṃ karma tathākarot 
bhīṣaṇe kuṇḍakhāte tu bhīṣaṇe jātavedasi

bhīṣaṇaṃ raudrapuruṣaṃ dhyātvātmānaṃ guhāśayam 
evaṃ tapantam ālakṣya vāg uvācāśarīriṇī

jaṭājūṭaṃ vinātmānaṃ na ca vṛtro vyajīyata 
vṛthātmānaṃ viśvarūpo juhuyāj jātavedasi

sa evendraḥ sa varuṇaḥ sa ca syāt sarvam eva ca 
tyaktvātmānaṃ jaṭāmātraṃ hutavān vṛjinodbhavaḥ

vṛtra ity ucyate vede sa cāpi vṛjino 'bhavat 
bhīmasya mahimānaṃ ko jānāti jagadīśituḥ

sṛjaty aśeṣam api yo na ca saṅgena lipyate 
virarāmeti saṃkīrtya sā vāṇy enaṃ munīśvarāḥ

bhīmeśvaraṃ namaskṛtya jagmuḥ svaṃ svam athāśramam 
viśvarūpo mahābhīmo bhīmakarmā tathākṛtiḥ

bhīmabhāvo bhīmatanuṃ dhyātvātmānaṃ juhāva ha 
tasmād bhīmeśvaro devaḥ purāṇe paripaṭhyate 
tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca muktidaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ

iti paṭhati śṛṇoti yaś ca bhaktyā vibudhapatiṃ śivam atra bhīmarūpam
jagati viditam aśeṣapāpahāri smṛtipadaśaraṇena muktidaś ca

godāvarī tāvad aśeṣapāpa samūhahantrī paramārthadātrī
sadaiva sarvatra viśeṣatas tu yatrāmburāśiṃ samanupraviṣṭā

snātvā tu tasmin sukṛtī śarīrī godāvarīvāridhisaṃgame yaḥ
uddhṛtya tīvrān nirayād aśeṣāt sa pūrvajān yāti puraṃ purāreḥ

vedāntavedyaṃ yad upāsitavyaṃ tad brahma sākṣāt khalu bhīmanāthaḥ
dṛṣṭe hi tasmin na punar viśanti śarīriṇaḥ saṃsmṛtim ugraduḥkhām

sā saṃgatā pūrvam apāṃpatiṃ taṃ gaṅgā surāṇām api vandanīyā
devaiś ca sarvair anugamyamānā saṃstūyamānā munibhir marudbhiḥ

vasiṣṭhajābālisayājñavalkya kratvaṅgirodakṣamarīcivaiṣṇavāḥ
śātātapaḥ śaunakadevarāta bhṛgvagniveśyātrimarīcimukhyāḥ

sudhūtapāpā manugautamādayaḥ sakauśikās tumbaruparvatādyāḥ
agastyamārkaṇḍasapippalādyāḥ sagālavā yogaparāyaṇāś ca

savāmadevāṅgiraso 'tha bhārgavāḥ smṛtipravīṇāḥ śrutibhir manojñāḥ
sarve purāṇārthavido bahujñās te gautamīṃ devanadīṃ tu gatvā

stoṣyanti mantraiḥ śrutibhiḥ prabhūtair hṛdyaiś ca tuṣṭair muditair manobhiḥ
tāṃ saṃgatāṃ vīkṣya śivo hariś ca ātmānam ādarśayatāṃ munibhyaḥ

ādityā vasavo rudrā maruto lokapālakāḥ 
kṛtāñjalipuṭāḥ sarve stuvanti hariśaṃkarau

saṃgameṣu prasiddheṣu nityaṃ saptasu nārada 
samudrasya ca gaṅgāyā nityaṃ devau pratiṣṭhitau

gautameśvara ākhyāto yatra devo maheśvaraḥ 
nityaṃ saṃnihitas tatra mādhavo ramayā saha

brahmeśvara iti khyāto mayaiva sthāpitaḥ śivaḥ 
lokānām upakārārtham ātmanaḥ kāraṇāntare

cakrapāṇir iti khyātaḥ stuto devair mayā saha 
tatra saṃnihito viṣṇur devaiḥ saha marudgaṇaiḥ

aindratīrtham iti khyātaṃ tad eva hayamūrdhakam 
hayamūrdhā tatra viṣṇus tanmūrdhani surā api 
somatīrtham iti khyātaṃ yatra someśvaraḥ śivaḥ

indrasya somaśravaso devaiś ca ṛṣibhis tathā 
prārthitaḥ soma evādāv indrāyendo parisrava

sapta diśo nānāsūryāḥ sapta hotāra ṛtvijaḥ 
devā ādityā ye sapta tebhiḥ somābhirakṣa na

yat te rājañ chṛtaṃ havis tena somābhirakṣa naḥ 
arātīvā mā nas tārīn mo ca naḥ kiṃcanāmamad

ṛṣe mantrakṛtāṃ stomaiḥ kaśyapodvardhayan giraḥ 
somaṃ namasya rājānaṃ yo jajñe vīrudhāṃ patir

kārur ahaṃ tato bhiṣag upalaprakṣiṇī nanā 
nānādhiyo vasūyavo 'nu gā iva tasthima

evam uktvā ca ṛṣibhiḥ somaṃ prāpya ca vajriṇe 
tebhyo dattvā tato yajñaḥ pūrṇo jātaḥ śatakratoḥ

tat somatīrtham ākhyātam āgneyaṃ puratas tu tat 
agnir iṣṭvā mahāyajñair mām ārādhya manīṣitam

saṃprāptavān matprasādād ahaṃ tatraiva nityaśaḥ 
sthito lokopakārārthaṃ tatra viṣṇuḥ śivas tathā

tasmād āgneyam ākhyātam ādityaṃ tadanantaram 
yatrādityo vedamayo nityam eti upāsitum

rūpāntareṇa madhyāhne draṣṭuṃ māṃ śaṃkaraṃ harim 
namaskāryas tatra sadā madhyāhne sakalo janaḥ

rūpeṇa kena savitā samāyātīty aniścayāt 
tasmād ādityam ākhyātaṃ bārhaspatyam anantaram

bṛhaspatiḥ suraiḥ pūjāṃ tasmāt tīrthād avāpa ha 
īje ca yajñān vividhān bārhaspatyaṃ tato viduḥ

tattīrthasmaraṇād eva grahaśāntir bhaviṣyati 
tasmād apy aparaṃ tīrtham indragope nagottame

pratiṣṭhitaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ kasmiṃścit kāraṇāntare 
himālayena tat tīrtham adritīrthaṃ tad ucyate

tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca sarvakāmapradaṃ śubham 
evaṃ sā gautamī gaṅgā brahmādreś ca viniḥsṛtā

yāvat sāgaragā devī tatra tīrthāni kānicit 
saṃkṣepeṇa mayoktāni rahasyāni śubhāni ca

vede purāṇe ṛṣibhiḥ prasiddhā yā gautamī lokanamaskṛtā ca
vaktuṃ kathaṃ tām atisuprabhāvām aśeṣato nārada kasya śaktiḥ

bhaktyā pravṛttasya yathākathaṃcin naivāparādho 'sti na saṃśayo 'tra
tasmāc ca diṅmātramatiprayāsāt saṃsūcitaṃ lokahitāya tasyāḥ

kas tasyāḥ pratitīrthaṃ tu prabhāvaṃ vaktum īśvaraḥ 
api lakṣmīpatir viṣṇur alaṃ someśvaraḥ śivaḥ

kvacit kasmiṃś ca tīrthāni kālayoge bhavanti hi 
guṇavanti mahāprājña gautamī tu sadā nṛṇām

sarvatra sarvadā puṇyā ko nv asyā guṇakīrtanam 
vaktuṃ śaktas tatas tasyai nama ity eva yujyate

tridaivatyāṃ sureśāna gaṅgāṃ brūṣe sureśvara 
brāhmaṇenāhṛtāṃ puṇyāṃ jagataḥ pāvanīṃ śubhām

ādimadhyāvasāne ca ubhayos tīrayor api 
yā vyāptā viṣṇuneśena tvayā ca surasattama 
punaḥ saṃkṣepato brūhi na me tṛptiḥ prajāyate

kamaṇḍalusthitā pūrvaṃ tato viṣṇupadānugā 
maheśvarajaṭājūṭe sthitā saiva namaskṛtā

brahmatejaḥprabhāveṇa śivam ārādhya yatnataḥ 
tataḥ prāptā giriṃ puṇyaṃ tataḥ pūrvārṇavaṃ prati

āgatya saṃgatā devī sarvatīrthamayī nṛṇām 
īpsitānāṃ tathā dātrī prabhāvo 'syā viśiṣyate

etasyā nādhikaṃ manye kiṃcit tīrthaṃ jagattraye 
asyāś caiva prabhāveṇa bhāvyaṃ yac ca manaḥsthitam

adyāpy asyā hi māhātmyaṃ vaktuṃ kaiścin na śakyate 
bhaktito vakṣyate nityaṃ yā brahma paramārthataḥ

tasyāḥ parataraṃ tīrthaṃ na syād iti matir mama 
anyatīrthena sādharmyaṃ na yujyeta kathaṃcana

śrutvā madvākyapīyūṣair gaṅgāyā guṇakīrtanam 
sarveṣāṃ na matiḥ kasmāt tatraivoparatiṃ gatā 
iti bhāti vicitraṃ me mune khalu jagattraye

dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ tvaṃ vettā copadeśakaḥ 
chandāṃsi sarahasyāni purāṇasmṛtayo 'pi ca

dharmaśāstrāṇi yac cānyat tava vākye pratiṣṭhitam 
tīrthānām atha dānānāṃ yajñānāṃ tapasāṃ tathā

devatāmantrasevānām adhikaṃ kiṃ vada prabho 
yad brūṣe bhagavan bhaktyā tathā bhāvyaṃ na cānyathā

etaṃ me saṃśayaṃ brahman vākyāt tvaṃ chettum arhasi 
iṣṭaṃ manogataṃ śrutvā tasmād vismayam āgataḥ

śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi rahasyaṃ dharmam uttamam 
caturvidhāni tīrthāni tāvanty eva yugāni ca

guṇās trayaś ca puruṣās trayo devāḥ sanātanāḥ 
vedāś ca smṛtibhir yuktāś catvāras te prakīrtitāḥ

puruṣārthāś ca catvāro vāṇī cāpi caturvidhā 
guṇā hy api tu catvāraḥ samatveneti nārada

sarvatra dharmaḥ sāmānyo yato dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ 
sādhyasādhanabhāvena sa eva bahudhā mataḥ

tasyāśrayaś ca dvividho deśaḥ kālaś ca sarvadā 
kālāśrayaś ca yo dharmo hīyate vardhate sadā

yugānām anurūpeṇa pādaḥ pādo 'sya hīyate 
dharmasyeti mahāprājña deśāpekṣā tathobhayam

kālena cāśrito dharmo deśe nityaṃ pratiṣṭhitaḥ 
yugeṣu kṣīyamāṇeṣu na deśeṣu sa hīyate

ubhayatra vihīne ca dharmasya syād abhāvatā 
tasmād deśāśrito dharmaś catuṣpāt supratiṣṭhitaḥ

sa cāpi dharmo deśeṣu tīrtharūpeṇa tiṣṭhati 
kṛte deśaṃ ca kālaṃ ca dharmo 'vaṣṭabhya tiṣṭhati

tretāyāṃ pādahīnena sa tu pādaḥ pradeśataḥ 
dvāpare cārdhataḥ kāle dharmo deśe samāsthitaḥ

kalau pādena caikena dharmaś calati saṃkaṭam 
evaṃvidhaṃ tu yo dharmaṃ vetti tasya na hīyate

yugānām anubhāvena jātibhedāś ca saṃsthitāḥ 
guṇebhyo guṇakartṛbhyo vicitrā dharmasaṃsthitiḥ

guṇānām anubhāvena udbhavābhibhavau tathā 
tīrthānām api varṇānāṃ vedānāṃ svargamokṣayoḥ

tādṛgrūpapravṛttyā tu tad eva ca viśiṣyate 
kālo 'bhivyañjakaḥ prokto deśo 'bhivyaṅgya ucyate

yadā yadā abhivyaktiṃ kālo dhatte tadā tadā 
tad eva vyañjanaṃ brahmaṃs tasmān nāsty atra saṃśayaḥ

yugānurūpā mūrtiḥ syād devānāṃ vaidikī tathā 
karmaṇām api tīrthānāṃ jātīnām āśramasya tu

tridaivatyaṃ satyayuge tīrthaṃ lokeṣu pūjyate 
dvidaivatyaṃ yuge 'nyasmin dvāpare caikadaivikam

kalau na kiṃcid vijñeyam athānyad api tac chṛṇu 
daivaṃ kṛtayuge tīrthaṃ tretāyām āsuraṃ viduḥ

ārṣaṃ ca dvāpare proktaṃ kalau mānuṣam ucyate 
athānyad api vakṣyāmi śṛṇu nārada kāraṇam

gautamyāṃ yat tvayā pṛṣṭaṃ tat te vakṣyāmi vistarāt 
yadā ceyaṃ haraśiraḥ prāptā gaṅgā mahāmune

tadā prabhṛti sā gaṅgā śaṃbhoḥ priyatarābhavat 
tad devasya mataṃ jñātvā gajavaktram uvāca sā

umā lokatrayeśānā mātā ca jagato hitā 
śāntā śrutir iti khyātā bhuktimuktipradāyinī
tan mātur vacanaṃ śrutvā gajavaktro 'bhyabhāṣata
kiṃ kṛtyaṃ śādhi māṃ mātas tatkartāham asaṃśayam

umā sutam uvācedaṃ maheśvarajaṭāsthitā 
tvayāvatāryatāṃ gaṅgā satyam īśapriyā satī

punaś ceśas tatra citram adhyāste sarvadā suta 
śivo yatra surās tatra tatra vedāḥ sanātanāḥ

tatraiva ṛṣayaḥ sarve manuṣyāḥ pitaras tathā 
tasmān nivartayeśānaṃ devadevaṃ maheśvaram

tasyā nivartite deve gaṅgāyāḥ sarva eva hi 
nivṛttās te bhaviṣyanti śṛṇu cedaṃ vaco mama 
nivartaya tatas tasyāḥ sarvabhāvena śaṃkaram
mātus tad vacanaṃ śrutvā punar āha gaṇeśvaraḥ

naiva śakyaḥ śivo devo mayā tasyā nivartitum 
anivṛtte śive tasyā devā api nivartitum

na śakyā jagatāṃ mātar athānyac cāpi kāraṇam 
gaṅgāvatāritā pūrvaṃ gautamena mahātmanā

ṛṣiṇā lokapūjyena trailokyahitakāriṇā 
sāmopāyena tadvākyāt pūjyena brahmatejasā

ārādhayitvā deveśaṃ tapobhiḥ stutibhir bhavam 
tuṣṭena śaṃkareṇedam ukto 'sau gautamas tadā

varān varaya puṇyāṃś ca priyāṃś ca manasepsitān 
yad yad icchasi tat sarvaṃ dātā te 'dya mahāmate

evam uktaḥ śivenāsau gautamo mayi śṛṇvati 
idam eva tadovāca sajaṭāṃ dehi śaṃkara 
gaṅgāṃ me yācate puṇyāṃ kim anyena vareṇa me
punaḥ provāca taṃ śaṃbhuḥ sarvalokopakārakaḥ
uktaṃ na cātmanaḥ kiṃcit tasmād yācasva duṣkaram
gautamo 'dīnasattvas taṃ bhavam āha kṛtāñjaliḥ

etad eva ca sarveṣāṃ duṣkaraṃ tava darśanam 
mayā tad adya saṃprāptaṃ kṛpayā tava śaṃkara

smaraṇād eva te padbhyāṃ kṛtakṛtyā manīṣiṇaḥ 
bhavanti kiṃ punaḥ sākṣāt tvayi dṛṣṭe maheśvare

evam ukte gautamena bhavo harṣasamanvitaḥ 
trayāṇām upakārārthaṃ lokānāṃ yācitaṃ tvayā

na cātmano mahābuddhe yācety āha śivo dvijam 
evaṃ proktaḥ punar vipro dhyātvā prāha śivaṃ tathā

vinītavad adīnātmā śivabhaktisamanvitaḥ 
sarvalokopakārāya punar yācitavān idam 
śṛṇvatsu lokapāleṣu jagādedaṃ sa gautamaḥ

yāvat sāgaragā devī nisṛṣṭā brahmaṇo gireḥ 
sarvatra sarvadā tasyāṃ sthātavyaṃ vṛṣabhadhvaja

phalepsūnāṃ phalaṃ dātā tvam eva jagataḥ prabho 
tīrthāny anyāni deveśa kvāpi kvāpi śubhāni ca

yatra te saṃnidhir nityaṃ tad eva śubhadaṃ viduḥ 
yatra gaṅgā tvayā dattā jaṭāmukuṭasaṃsthitā 
sarvatra tava sāṃnidhyāt sarvatīrthāni śaṃkara
tad gautamavacaḥ śrutvā punar harṣāc chivo 'bravīt

yatra kvāpi ca yat kiṃcid yo vā bhavati bhaktitaḥ 
yātrāṃ snānam atho dānaṃ pitṝṇāṃ vāpi tarpaṇam

śravaṇaṃ paṭhanaṃ vāpi smaraṇaṃ vāpi gautama 
yaḥ karoti naro bhaktyā godāvaryā yatavrataḥ

saptadvīpavatī pṛthvī saśailavanakānanā 
saratnā sauṣadhī ramyā sārṇavā dharmabhūṣitā

dattvā bhavati yo dharmaḥ sa bhaved gautamīsmṛteḥ 
evaṃvidhā ilā vipra godānād yābhidhīyate

candrasūryagrahe kāle matsāṃnidhye yatavrataḥ 
bhūbhṛte viṣṇave bhaktyā sarvakālaṃ kṛtā sudhīḥ

gāḥ sundarāḥ savatsāś ca saṃgame lokaviśrute 
yo dadāti dvijaśreṣṭha tatra yat puṇyam āpnuyāt

tasmād varaṃ puṇyam eti snānadānādinā naraḥ 
gautamyāṃ viśvavandyāyāṃ mahānadyāṃ tu bhaktitaḥ

tasmād godāvarī gaṅgā tvayā nītā bhaviṣyati 
sarvapāpakṣayakarī sarvābhīṣṭapradāyinī

etac chrutaṃ mayā mātar vadato gautamaṃ śivāt 
etasmāt kāraṇāc chaṃbhur gaṅgāyāṃ niyataḥ sthitaḥ

ko nivartayituṃ śaktas tam amba karuṇodadhim 
athāpi mātar etat syān mānuṣā vighnapāśakaiḥ

vinibaddhā na gacchanti godām apy antikasthitām 
na namanti śivaṃ devaṃ na smaranti stuvanti na

tathā mātaḥ kariṣyāmi tava saṃtoṣahetave 
saṃniroddhum atho kleśas tava vākyaṃ kṣamasva me

tataḥ prabhṛti vighneśo mānuṣān prati kiṃcana 
vighnam ācarate yas tu tam upāsya pravartate

atho vighnam anādṛtya gautamīṃ yāti bhaktitaḥ 
sa kṛtārtho bhavel loke na kṛtyam avaśiṣyate

vighnāny anekāni bhavanti gehān nirgantukāmasya narādhamasya
nidhāya tanmūrdhni padaṃ prayāti gaṅgāṃ na kiṃ tena phalaṃ pralabdham

asyāḥ prabhāvaṃ ko brūyād api sākṣāt sadāśivaḥ 
saṃkṣepeṇa mayā proktam itihāsapadānugam

dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ sādhanaṃ yac carācare 
tad atra vidyate sarvam itihāse savistare

vedoditaṃ śrutisakalarahasyam uktaṃ satkāraṇaṃ samabhidhānam idaṃ sadaiva
samyak ca dṛṣṭaṃ jagatāṃ hitāya proktaṃ purāṇaṃ bahudharmayuktam

asya ślokaṃ padaṃ vāpi bhaktitaḥ śṛṇuyāt paṭhet 
gaṅgā gaṅgeti vā vākyaṃ sa tu puṇyam avāpnuyāt

kalikalaṅkavināśanadakṣam idaṃ sakalasiddhikaraṃ śubhadaṃ śivam
jagati pūjyam abhīṣṭaphalapradaṃ gāṅgam etad udīritam uttamam

sādhu gautama bhadraṃ te ko 'nyo 'sti sadṛśas tvayā 
ya enāṃ gautamīṃ gaṅgāṃ daṇḍakāraṇyam āpnuyāt

gaṅgā gaṅgeti yo brūyād yojanānāṃ śatair api 
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo viṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati

tisraḥ koṭyo 'rdhakoṭī ca tīrthāni bhuvanatraye 
tāni snātuṃ samāyānti gaṅgāyāṃ siṃhage gurau

ṣaṣṭir varṣasahasrāṇi bhāgīrathyavagāhanam 
sakṛd godāvarīsnānaṃ siṃhayukte bṛhaspatau

iyaṃ tu gautamī putra yatra kvāpi mamājñayā 
sarveṣāṃ sarvadā nṝṇāṃ snānān muktiṃ pradāsyati

aśvamedhasahasrāṇi vājapeyaśatāni ca 
kṛtvā yat phalam āpnoti tad asya śravaṇād bhavet

yasyaitat tiṣṭhati gṛhe purāṇaṃ brahmaṇoditam 
na bhayaṃ vidyate tasya kalikālasya nārada

yasya kasyāpi nākhyeyaṃ purāṇam idam uttamam 
śraddadhānāya śāntāya vaiṣṇavāya mahātmane

idaṃ kīrtyaṃ bhuktimuktidāyakaṃ pāpanāśakam 
etacchravaṇamātreṇa kṛtakṛtyo bhaven naraḥ

likhitvā pustakam idaṃ brāhmaṇāya prayacchati 
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ punar garbhaṃ na saṃviśet

nahi nas tṛptir astīha śṛṇvatāṃ bhagavatkathām 
punar eva paraṃ guhyaṃ vaktum arhasy aśeṣataḥ

anantavāsudevasya na samyag varṇitaṃ tvayā 
śrotum icchāmahe deva vistareṇa vadasva naḥ

pravakṣyāmi muniśreṣṭhāḥ sārāt sārataraṃ param 
anantavāsudevasya māhātmyaṃ bhuvi durlabham

ādikalpe purā viprās tv aham avyaktajanmavān 
viśvakarmāṇam āhūya vacanaṃ proktavān idam

variṣṭhaṃ devaśilpīndraṃ viśvakarmāgrakarmiṇam 
pratimāṃ vāsudevasya kuru śailamayīṃ bhuvi

yāṃ prekṣya vidhivad bhaktāḥ sendrā vai mānuṣādayaḥ 
yena dānavarakṣobhyo vijñāya sumahad bhayam

tridivaṃ samanuprāpya sumeruśikharaṃ ciram 
vāsudevaṃ samārādhya nirātaṅkā vasanti te

mama tad vacanaṃ śrutvā viśvakarmā tu tatkṣaṇāt 
cakāra pratimāṃ śuddhāṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharām

sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyuktāṃ puṇḍarīkāyatekṣaṇām 
śrīvatsalakṣmasaṃyuktām atyugrāṃ pratimottamām

vanamālāvṛtoraskāṃ mukuṭāṅgadadhāriṇīm 
pītavastrāṃ supīnāṃsāṃ kuṇḍalābhyām alaṃkṛtām

evaṃ sā pratimā divyā guhyamantrais tadā svayam 
pratiṣṭhākālam āsādya mayāsau nirmitā purā

tasmin kāle tadā śakro devarāṭ khecaraiḥ saha 
jagāma brahmasadanam āruhya gajam uttamam

prasādya pratimāṃ śakraḥ snānadānaiḥ punaḥ punaḥ 
pratimāṃ tāṃ samārādhya svapuraṃ punar āgamat

tāṃ samārādhya suciraṃ yatavākkāyamānasaḥ 
vṛtrādyān asurān krūrān namucipramukhān sa ca

nihatya dānavān bhīmān bhuktavān bhuvanatrayam 
dvitīye ca yuge prāpte tretāyāṃ rākṣasādhipaḥ

babhūva sumahāvīryo daśagrīvaḥ pratāpavān 
daśa varṣasahasrāṇi nirāhāro jitendriyaḥ

cacāra vratam atyugraṃ tapaḥ paramaduścaram 
tapasā tena tuṣṭo 'haṃ varaṃ tasmai pradattavān

avadhyaḥ sarvadevānāṃ sa daityoragarakṣasām 
śāpapraharaṇair ugrair avadhyo yamakiṃkaraiḥ

varaṃ prāpya tadā rakṣo yakṣān sarvagaṇān imān 
dhanādhyakṣaṃ vinirjitya śakraṃ jetuṃ samudyataḥ

saṃgrāmaṃ sumahāghoraṃ kṛtvā devaiḥ sa rākṣasaḥ 
devarājaṃ vinirjitya tadā indrajiteti vai

rākṣasas tatsuto nāma meghanādaḥ pralabdhavān 
amarāvatīṃ tataḥ prāpya devarājagṛhe śubhe

dadarśāñjanasaṃkāśāṃ rāvaṇas tu balānvitaḥ 
pratimāṃ vāsudevasya sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutām

śrīvatsalakṣmasaṃyuktāṃ padmapattrāyatekṣaṇām 
vanamālāvṛtoraskāṃ mukuṭāṅgadabhūṣitām

śaṅkhacakragadāhastāṃ pītavastrāṃ caturbhujām 
sarvābharaṇasaṃyuktāṃ sarvakāmaphalapradām

vihāya ratnasaṃghāṃś ca pratimāṃ śubhalakṣaṇām 
puṣpakeṇa vimānena laṅkāṃ prāsthāpayad drutam

purādhyakṣaḥ sthitaḥ śrīmān dharmātmā sa vibhīṣaṇaḥ 
rāvaṇasyānujo mantrī nārāyaṇaparāyaṇaḥ

dṛṣṭvā tāṃ pratimāṃ divyāṃ devendrabhavanacyutām 
romāñcitatanur bhūtvā vismayaṃ samapadyata

praṇamya śirasā devaṃ prahṛṣṭenāntarātmanā 
adya me saphalaṃ janma adya me saphalaṃ tapaḥ

ity uktvā sa tu dharmātmā praṇipatya muhur muhuḥ 
jyeṣṭhaṃ bhrātaram āsādya kṛtāñjalir abhāṣata

rājan pratimayā tvaṃ me prasādaṃ kartum arhasi 
yām ārādhya jagannātha nistareyaṃ bhavārṇavam

bhrātur vacanam ākarṇya rāvaṇas taṃ tadābravīt 
gṛhāṇa pratimāṃ vīra tv anayā kiṃ karomy aham

svayaṃbhuvaṃ samārādhya trailokyaṃ vijaye tv aham 
nānāścaryamayaṃ devaṃ sarvabhūtabhavodbhavam

vibhīṣaṇo mahābuddhis tadā tāṃ pratimāṃ śubhām 
śatam aṣṭottaraṃ cābdaṃ samārādhya janārdanam

ajarāmaraṇaṃ prāptam aṇimādiguṇair yutam 
rājyaṃ laṅkādhipatyaṃ ca bhogān bhuṅkte yathepsitān

aho no vismayo jātaḥ śrutvedaṃ paramāmṛtam 
anantavāsudevasya saṃbhavaṃ bhuvi durlabham

śrotum icchāmahe deva vistareṇa yathātatham 
tasya devasya māhātmyaṃ vaktum arhasy aśeṣataḥ

tadā sa rākṣasaḥ krūro devagandharvakiṃnarān 
lokapālān samanujān munisiddhāṃś ca pāpakṛt

vijitya samare sarvān ājahāra tadaṅganāḥ 
saṃsthāpya nagarīṃ laṅkāṃ punaḥ sītārthamohitaḥ

śaṅkito mṛgarūpeṇa sauvarṇena ca rāvaṇaḥ 
tataḥ kruddhena rāmeṇa raṇe saumitriṇā saha

rāvaṇasya vadhārthāya hatvā vāliṃ manojavam 
abhiṣiktaś ca sugrīvo yuvarājo 'ṅgadas tathā

hanumān nalanīlaś ca jāmbavān panasas tathā 
gavayaś ca gavākṣaś ca pāṭhīnaḥ paramaujasaḥ

etaiś cānyaiś ca bahubhir vānaraiḥ samahābalaiḥ 
samāvṛto mahāghorai rāmo rājīvalocanaḥ

girīṇāṃ sarvasaṃghātaiḥ setuṃ baddhvā mahodadhau 
balena mahatā rāmaḥ samuttīrya mahodadhim

saṃgrāmam atulaṃ cakre rakṣogaṇasamanvitaḥ 
yamahastaṃ prahastaṃ ca nikumbhaṃ kumbham eva ca

narāntakaṃ mahāvīryaṃ tathā caiva yamāntakam 
mālāḍhyaṃ mālikāḍhyaṃ ca hatvā rāmas tu vīryavān

punar indrajitaṃ hatvā kumbhakarṇaṃ sarāvaṇam 
vaidehīṃ cāgnināśodhya dattvā rājyaṃ vibhīṣaṇe

vāsudevaṃ samādāya yānaṃ puṣpakam āruhat 
līlayā samanuprāpad ayodhyāṃ pūrvapālitām

kaniṣṭhaṃ bharataṃ snehāc chatrughnaṃ bhaktavatsalaḥ 
abhiṣicya tadā rāmaḥ sarvarājye 'dhirājavat

purātanīṃ svamūrtiṃ ca samārādhya tato hariḥ 
daśa varṣasahasrāṇi daśa varṣaśatāni ca

bhuktvā sāgaraparyantāṃ medinīṃ sa tu rāghavaḥ 
rājyam āsādya sugatiṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ padam āviśat

tāṃ cāpi pratimāṃ rāmaḥ samudreśāya dattavān 
dhanyo rakṣayitāsi tvaṃ toyaratnasamanvitaḥ

dvāparaṃ yugam āsādya yadā devo jagatpatiḥ 
dharaṇyāś cānurodhena bhāvaśaithilyakāraṇāt

avatīrṇaḥ sa bhagavān vasudevakule prabhuḥ 
kaṃsādīnāṃ vadhārthāya saṃkarṣaṇasahāyavān

tadā tāṃ pratimāṃ viprāḥ sarvavāñchāphalapradām 
sarvalokahitārthāya kasyacit kāraṇāntare

tasmin kṣetravare puṇye durlabhe puruṣottame 
ujjahāra svayaṃ toyāt samudraḥ saritāṃ patiḥ

tadā prabhṛti tatraiva kṣetre muktiprade dvijāḥ 
āste sa devo devānāṃ sarvakāmaphalapradaḥ

ye saṃśrayanti cānantaṃ bhaktyā sarveśvaraṃ prabhum 
vāṅmanaḥkarmabhir nityaṃ te yānti paramaṃ padam

dṛṣṭvānantaṃ sakṛd bhaktyā saṃpūjya praṇipatya ca 
rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ phalaṃ daśaguṇaṃ labhet

sarvakāmasamṛddhena kāmagena suvarcasā 
vimānenārkavarṇena kiṅkiṇījālamālinā

triḥsaptakulam uddhṛtya divyastrīgaṇasevitaḥ 
upagīyamāno gandharvair naro viṣṇupuraṃ vrajet

tatra bhuktvā varān bhogāñ jarāmaraṇavarjitaḥ 
divyarūpadharaḥ śrīmān yāvad ābhūtasaṃplavam

puṇyakṣayād ihāyātaś caturvedī dvijottamaḥ 
vaiṣṇavaṃ yogam āsthāya tato mokṣam avāpnuyāt

evaṃ mayā tv ananto 'sau kīrtito munisattamāḥ 
kaḥ śaknoti guṇān vaktuṃ tasya varṣaśatair api

evaṃ vo 'nantamāhātmyaṃ kṣetraṃ ca puruṣottamam 
bhuktimuktipradaṃ nṝṇāṃ mayā proktaṃ sudurlabham

yatrāste puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ 
pītāmbaradharaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ kaṃsakeśiniṣūdanaḥ

ye tatra kṛṣṇaṃ paśyanti surāsuranamaskṛtam 
saṃkarṣaṇaṃ subhadrāṃ ca dhanyās te nātra saṃśayaḥ

trailokyādhipatiṃ devaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam 
ye dhyāyanti sadā kṛṣṇaṃ muktās te nātra saṃśayaḥ

kṛṣṇe ratāḥ kṛṣṇam anusmaranti rātrau ca kṛṣṇaṃ punar utthitā ye
te bhinnadehāḥ praviśanti kṛṣṇaṃ havir yathā mantrahutaṃ hutāśam

tasmāt sadā muniśreṣṭhāḥ kṛṣṇaḥ kamalalocanaḥ 
tasmin kṣetre prayatnena draṣṭavyo mokṣakāṅkṣibhiḥ

śayanotthāpane kṛṣṇaṃ ye paśyanti manīṣiṇaḥ 
halāyudhaṃ subhadrāṃ ca hareḥ sthānaṃ vrajanti te

sarvakāle 'pi ye bhaktyā paśyanti puruṣottamam 
rauhiṇeyaṃ subhadrāṃ ca viṣṇulokaṃ vrajanti te

āste yaś caturo māsān vārṣikān puruṣottame 
pṛthivyās tīrthayātrāyāḥ phalaṃ prāpnoti cādhikam

ye sarvakālaṃ tatraiva nivasanti manīṣiṇaḥ 
jitendriyā jitakrodhā labhante tapasaḥ phalam

tapas taptvānyatīrtheṣu varṣāṇām ayutaṃ naraḥ 
yad āpnoti tad āpnoti māsena puruṣottame

tapasā brahmacaryeṇa saṅgatyāgena yat phalam 
tat phalaṃ satataṃ tatra prāpnuvanti manīṣiṇaḥ

sarvatīrtheṣu yat puṇyaṃ snānadānena kīrtitam
